ref: God blesses those people who refuse evil advice and won't follow sinners or join in sneering at God.
text: Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamagyi aha lalahɛ asʋnsʋ, ɔtamabwɛ lakpan abwɛpʋ bwɛhɛ, ɔtamatsia ɔblɔla abwɛpʋtɔ.

ref: ) The Way to Happiness
text: ) Aha Yile Bʋ Ansigyi

ref: Instead, they find happiness in the Teaching of the Lord, and they think about it day and night.
text: Tamɛ Nana Bulu atosunahɛsʋgyi tegyi mʋ ansɩ, ɔtɔgywɩɩn mʋ́ ɩwɩ ɔpa-onye.

ref: They are like trees growing beside a stream, trees that produce fruit in season and always have leaves. Those people succeed in everything they do.
text: Ogyi fɛ oyiá boswie mʋ́ ntsu ɔnɔ, itoswie abi mʋ́ swiebɩ, ɩtamakpa atɛ. Togyitɔá ɔbwɛ tɔwa alɛ ha mʋ.

ref: That isn't true of those who are evil— they are like straw blown by the wind.
text: Tamɛ aha lalahɛ bʋtamanya mʋ́ alɩ. Bʋgyi fɛ ntɛtɛá afu dɛ mʋ́ tsʋn.

ref: Sinners won't have an excuse on the day of judgment, and they won't have a place with the people of God.
text: Aha lalahɛ bʋméenya ɔlɩɩkpa Bulu asʋn ogyikpa. Lakpan abwɛpʋ ɛ bʋméenya otsiakpa yile abwɛpʋtɔ.

ref: The Lord protects everyone who follows him, but the wicked follow a road that leads to ruin.
text: Tsufɛ Nana Bulu tɛkpa yile abwɛpʋ, tamɛ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ mʋ́ bɛ́ta.

ref: Why do the nations plot, and why do their people make useless plans?
text: Ntogyi sʋ ɔmá-ɔmá banya ɔblɔ, bwɛ agywɩɩn kʋkʋ kpalɩ?

ref: The kings of this earth have all joined together to turn against the Lord and his chosen king.
text: Ɔmásʋ agyipʋ badɩda atɔ. Wulu ahandɛ batɩ aba fia, kɩta agywɩɩn lalahɛ Nana Bulu mʋa ɔha amʋʋ alada ofuli amʋsʋ.

ref: They say, “Let's cut the ropes and set ourselves free!”
text: Bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Mlɩha alɛ ɩwɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩtɔ, adalɩ amʋ́ ɔhɩɛ asɩ.”

ref: In heaven the Lord laughs as he sits on his throne, making fun of the nations.
text: Anɩ Wie tsie ɔsʋsʋ mʋ owie-obiasʋ ɔdɛ amʋ́ mɔsɩ, bwɛ amʋ́ ɔblɔla.

ref: The Lord becomes furious and threatens them. His anger terrifies them as he says,
text: Mʋ́ ɔma a, ɔbɛ́bla amʋ́ asʋn ɔblɔsʋ, wa ɩyɩn wa amʋ́ ɔbɛɛ,

ref: “I've put my king on Zion, my sacred hill.”
text: “Mɩ mʋ́ nayaɩ mɩ owie mɩ onuto ɩbʋ Sionsʋ.”

ref: I will tell the promise that the Lord made to me: “You are my son, because today I have become your father.
text: Owie amʋ ɔbɛɛ, nɛ́bla mlɩ asʋn ánɩ́ Nana Bulu lablɩ. Ɔlɛbla mɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Mɩ Bi gyi fʋ. Ndɛ nabwɛ fʋ Sɩ.”

ref: Ask me for the nations, and every nation on earth will belong to you.
text: Kʋlɩ mɩ, nɔ́pʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́ ha fʋ; fégyi mʋ́sʋ yeyi ɔyɩ ɔka.

ref: Be smart, all you rulers, and pay close attention.
text: Mʋ́ sʋ awie, mlɩtɩn ansɩ. Ɩsʋ agyipʋ, mlɩkɩ wanklaan.

ref: Serve and honor the Lord; be glad and tremble.
text: Mlɩpʋ ifu sum Nana Bulu. Ɩwɩ ɩkpɩnkɩ mlɩ, amlɩnya ansigyi.

ref: Show respect to his son because if you don't, the Lord might become furious and suddenly destroy you. But he blesses and protects everyone who runs to him.
text: Mlɩba ɩwɩasɩ ha Bulu mʋ bi amʋ, mɛnɩ oméenya ɔblɔ, mlɩmɛ́ɛta ɔkpatɔ. Tsufɛ mʋ ɔblɔ tɔkɔsɩ wa ɩyɩn. Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛsrɩ tanʋ mʋ.

ref: I have a lot of enemies, Lord. Many fight against
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ alupʋ badʋbɩ! Adʋn bakʋsʋ mɩsʋ!

ref: me and say, “God won't rescue you!”
text: Bʋdɛtɔɩ mɩsʋ bɛɛ, “Bulu mɔ́ɔhɔ mʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ!” Ɩya.

ref: But you are my shield, and you give me victory and great honor.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, fʋlegyi ɩban wa mɩ. Fʋgyi mɩ numnyam, fʋtotsu mɩ ansɩtɔ fʋa.

ref: I pray to you, and you answer from your sacred hill.
text: Nosu kpoli Nana Bulu kʋklʋkʋʋ. Ɔlɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ tsu mʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋsʋ. Ɩya.

ref: I sleep and wake up refreshed because you, Lord, protect me.
text: Nɛklɛdɩ dɩdɩ. Nalatsinki, tsufɛ Nana Bulu togyo mɩ ɩwɩ.

ref: Ten thousand enemies attack from every side, but I am not afraid.
text: Alupʋ idu-lafa babomli mɩ, mmɛdɛ amʋ́ ifu nya.

ref: Come and save me, Lord God! Break my enemies' jaws and shatter their teeth,
text: Oo Nana Bulu, kʋsʋ. Mɩ Bulu, hɔ mɩ. Tsufɛ fʋtɛda mɩ alupʋ lɛ da, kpa awuntɔlɩnpʋ abɩn.

ref: because you protect and bless your people.
text: Nana Bulu, fʋ ɩbɩtɔ nkpahɔ bʋ. Ha fʋ oyula ɩba fʋ abisʋ. Ɩya.

ref: You are my God and protector. Please answer my prayer. I was in terrible distress, but you set me free. Now have pity and listen as I pray.
text: Oo Bulu, nɩ nosu kpoli fʋ a, sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ. Fʋtɛha ntegyi asʋ! Brɛá mbʋ ɩkplantɔ a, fɛlɛ mɩ. Wun mɩ nwɛ, afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.

ref: How long will you people refuse to respect me? You love foolish things, and you run after what is worthless.
text: Oo anyankpʋsa, mlɩméesi mɩ kpɔɩ? Mlɩméesi asʋn ánɩ́ ɩma labi ɔma gya, si afunu buo? Ɩya.

ref: The Lord has chosen everyone who is faithful to be his very own, and he answers my prayers.
text: Mlɩbɩá Nana Bulu lalɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamakpa mʋ ɔma yaɩ ha mʋ ɩwɩ. Nɩ nokpoli mʋ a, ɔtɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.

ref: But each of you had better tremble and turn from your sins. Silently search your heart as you lie in bed.
text: Ɔblɔ ɩkɩta mlɩ a, ɩmáha amlɩbwɛ lakpan. Nɩ mlɩda mlɩ ɔklansʋ a, mlɩbwɛ diin amlɩyɔ mlɩ ɩklʋntɔ. Ɩya.

ref: Offer the proper sacrifices and trust the Lord.
text: Mlɩbɔ afɔdɩɛ wanklaan, amlɩpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ.

ref: There are some who ask, “Who will be good to us?” Let your kindness, Lord, shine brightly on us.
text: Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ma ɔbɔ́bwɛ yile ha anɩ?” Oo Nana Bulu, wa awɩtɔlɛ ha anɩ.

ref: You brought me more happiness than a rich harvest of grain and grapes.
text: Faha ansɩ lahɩɛ gyi mɩ, dʋn ansɩá itegyi amʋ́ brɛá amʋ́ atogyihɛ pʋ́ amʋ́ nta labusʋ.

ref: I can lie down and sleep soundly because you, Lord, will keep me safe.
text: Nɛ́klɛdɩ iwilwiitɔ, dɩdɩ fɛ́ɛ́. Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ nkʋlɛ ɔbɛ́ha tɔtɔ mɔ́ɔbwɛ mɩ.

ref: Listen, Lord, as I pray! Pay attention when I groan.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, yaa asʋ. Nu mɩ asʋn, afʋnu mɩ isu.

ref: You are my King and my God. Answer my cry for help because I pray to you.
text: Mɩ Wie pʋ́ mɩ Bulu, nu mɩ isu, afʋgyi mɩ bʋalɛ, tsufɛ fʋ ndesu kpoli.

ref: Each morning you listen to my prayer, as I bring my requests to you and wait for your reply.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, bakɛ fónu mɩ ɔmɛ. Nɔ́pʋ mɩ asʋn tswɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ nyankɩ, si ntsie ndɛ fʋ ansɩtɔ kɩ.

ref: You are not the kind of God who is pleased with evil. Sinners can't stay with you.
text: Oo Bulu, lalahɛbwɛ tamagyi fʋ ansɩ. Fʋtamafia lalahɛ abwɛpʋ.

ref: No one who boasts can stand in your presence, Lord, and you hate evil people.
text: Fʋtamakleá fówun ɩwɩ atsupʋ. Fʋtekisi lalahɛ abwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: You destroy every liar, and you despise violence and deceit.
text: Fʋteyinta afunupʋ, fʋtekisi aha amɔpʋ pʋ́ aha amlɛpʋ.

ref: Because of your great mercy, I come to your house, Lord, and I am filled with wonder as I bow down to worship at your holy temple.
text: Tamɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ, nébitiwie fʋ woyitɔ. Nɔ́pʋ ifu bun sum fʋ fʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ.

ref: You do what is right, and I ask you to guide me. Make your teaching clear because of my enemies.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ asʋn da ɔkpa. Mɩ alupʋ bɔdʋbɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ kpa mɩ, ambwɛ fʋ ɔdwɛla. Suna mɩ fʋ ɔkpa, antsʋn mʋ́sʋ.

ref: Nothing they say is true! They just want to destroy. Their words are deceitful like a hidden pit, and their tongues are good only for telling lies.
text: Bʋtamablɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ kʋkʋ. Lalahɛ pɛ bʋ amʋ́ ɩklʋntɔ. Amʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn blɩhɛ tobon fɛ fuli ɔbɔtɔ. Bʋtɔpʋ amʋ́ ɔnɔ mlɛ aha.

ref: Punish them, God, and let their own plans bring their downfall. Get rid of them! They keep committing crimes and turning against you.
text: Oo Bulu, ha amʋ́ ɩpɔn! Amʋ́ onuto agywɩɩn lalahɛ ɩtɩ lowu ha amʋ́. Amʋ́ lakpan tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ pʋ́ alɩá bakʋsʋ lɩɩ fʋsʋ, sʋ gya amʋ́ lɛ fʋ ansɩsʋ.

ref: Let all who run to you for protection always sing joyful songs. Provide shelter for those who truly love you and let them rejoice.
text: Tamɛ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛsrɩ tanʋ fʋ fɛ́ɛ́ abʋnya ansigyi. Ha amʋ́ abʋwa ansigyi ɩlʋ. Bun amʋ́sʋ, mɛnɩ ansɩ bégyi fʋ adwɛpʋ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Our Lord, you bless those who live right, and you shield them with your kindness.
text: Tsufɛ Nana Bulu, fʋtoyula yile abwɛpʋ. Fʋ awɩtɔlɛ legyi ɩban bomli amʋ́.

ref: Don't punish me, Lord, or even correct me when you are angry!
text: Oo Nana Bulu, máwa ɩyɩn wa mɩ ɔblɔsʋ. Mákʋla ɔblɔ bɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ!

ref: Have pity on me and heal my feeble body. My bones tremble with fear,
text: Nahɩɛ pɔn, sʋ wun mɩ nwɛ. Awútɔ dɛ mɩ dwiindwiin, lawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn.

ref: and I am in deep distress. How long will it be?
text: Oo Nana Bulu, ifu dɛ mɩ ɔkla. Máha mʋ́ ɩwa ɔpá asa afʋtsa mɩ ɩlɔ.

ref: Turn and come to my rescue. Show your wonderful love and save me, Lord.
text: Nana Bulu, damli kɩ mɩ afʋhɔ mɩ nkpa. Fʋ ɔdwɛ ma ɔka. Mʋ́ sʋ lɛ mɩ tsu lowutɔ.

ref: If I die, I cannot praise you or even remember you.
text: Tsufɛ ɔha owu a, ɔtamatra kaɩn fʋsʋ. Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ kanfʋ fʋ afulitɔ?

ref: My groaning has worn me out. At night my bed and pillow are soaked with tears.
text: Ahʋmɩtɩ dɛ mɩ mɔ. Onyegyionye nɛklɛdɩ ntosu, fɔ mɩ sumuɛ mɩɔn-mɩɔn-mɩɔn.

ref: Sorrow has made my eyes dim, and my sight has failed because of my enemies.
text: Mɩ alupʋ baha nasu alɩɩ, mɩ ansibi lapunya tin. Mmɛdɛ atɔ wun.

ref: You, Lord, heard my crying, and those hateful people had better leave me alone.
text: Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ, mlɩnatɩ tɛɩ mɩsʋ, tsufɛ Nana Bulu lanu mɩ isu.

ref: You have answered my prayer and my plea for mercy.
text: Alanu mɩ isu, ɔbɔ́sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.

ref: My enemies will be ashamed and terrified, as they quickly run away in complete disgrace.
text: Pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta mɩ alupʋ fɛ́ɛ́, ifu bɛ́kɩta amʋ́. Bɔ́pʋ nsʋpa yinki ɔma ɔsasʋ.

ref: You, Lord God, are my protector. Rescue me and keep me safe from all who chase me.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ. Hɔ mɩ, afʋlɛ mɩ tsu aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: Or else they will rip me apart like lions attacking a victim, and no one will save me.
text: Nɩ megyi alɩ bɛ́kɩta mɩ, tɩtɩ mɩ fɛ gyata; mma ɔhɔpʋ.

ref: I am innocent, Lord God!
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, nɩ nawa ɩbɩ lalahɛtɔ,

ref: I have not betrayed a friend or had pity on an enemy who attacks for no reason.
text: nɩ napʋ lalahɛ ka mɩ ba kɔ, ntɛ nasisi mɩ olupʋ kʋkʋ kpalɩ. Nɩ napʋ ɩnɩtɔ ɩkʋ gyi ɔkʋ fiin.

ref: If I have done any of this, then let my enemies chase and capture me. Let them trample me to death and leave me in the dirt.
text: Mʋmʋ ha mɩ alupʋ abʋdɩnka mɩsʋ, abʋnya mɩ. Bʋtsatsa mɩsʋ, abʋsʋpa mɩ fuli. Ɩya.

ref: Get angry, Lord God! Do something! Attack my furious enemies. See that justice is done.
text: Nana Bulu, pʋ ɔblɔ kʋsʋ lɩɩ. Mɩ Bulu kʋsʋ, mɩ alupʋ bawa ɩyɩn. Fʋlɔpʋ asʋngyi ba.

ref: Make the nations come to you, as you sit on your throne above them all.
text: Ha ɔmá-ɔmá abʋbefia fʋ ansɩtɔ, afʋtsia fʋ owie-obiasʋ ɔsʋsʋ gyi amʋ́ asʋn.

ref: Our Lord, judge the nations! Judge me and show that I am honest and innocent.
text: Nana Bulu, fʋgyi ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn ogyipʋ. Oo Nana Bulu, gyi ha mɩ, tsufɛ mɩ asʋn da ɔkpa. Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ.

ref: You know every heart and mind, and you always do right. Now make violent people stop, but protect all of us who obey you.
text: Bulu, ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi. Fʋtɛkali anɩ agywɩɩn pʋ́ anɩ ɩklʋntɔ asʋn. Ka lalahɛ abwɛpʋ tin, afʋha yile abwɛpʋ abʋlɩɩ.

ref: You, God, are my shield, the protector of everyone whose heart is right.
text: Bulu legyi ɩban wa mɩ. Mʋtɔhɔ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.

ref: You see that justice is done, and each day you take revenge.
text: Asʋn ogyipʋ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ Bulu gyi. Ɔtɛlɛ mʋ ɔblɔ suna ekekegyiɛkɛ.

ref: Whenever your enemies refuse to change their ways, you sharpen your sword and string your bow.
text: Nɩ bʋmɛtsɛ amʋ́ itsiatɔ a, ɔbɛ́ya mʋ ɔdayi. Alabɩtɩ mʋ ɔbɩn dodo.

ref: Your deadly arrows are ready with flaming tips.
text: Alakʋla mʋ akɔtɔ akinkin tsan, nɩna mʋ mbɩn pɩɔn-pɩɔn.

ref: An evil person is like a woman about to give birth to a hateful, deceitful, and rebellious child.
text: Kɩ alɩá banya lalahɛ ɔmɛ́. Lakpan ɔmɛ́ ɩdɛ amʋ́ dwiin. Bɔ́kwɩɩ afunu.

ref: Such people dig a deep hole, then fall in it themselves.
text: Bʋtokwi ɔbɔ, loti mʋ́tɔ klukluuklu, amʋ́ onuto bʋtɛkpa wie mʋ́tɔ.

ref: The trouble they cause comes back on them, and their heads are crushed by their own evil deeds.
text: Amʋ́ onuto lalahɛ teyinki ba amʋ́sʋ. Amʋ́ owuntɔlɩn teyinki bobun amʋ́ nwunsʋ.

ref: I will praise you, Lord! You always do right. I will sing about you, the Lord Most High.
text: Nɛ́da Nana Bulu ɩpan mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩwa sʋ. Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ Nana Bulu, Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ mʋ Wie ɩda.

ref: Our Lord and Ruler, your name is wonderful everywhere on earth! You let your glory be seen in the heavens above.
text: Oo anɩ Wie Nana Bulu, fʋ ɩda lɔkʋkʋ moni ɔyɩtɔ o! Fʋ numnyam lɔfʋa dafa nwʋlʋta.

ref: With praises from children and from tiny infants, you have built a fortress. It makes your enemies silent, and all who turn against you are left speechless.
text: Fasuna nyebi mʋ́a abi bɔbwɛ alɩá bʋkanfʋ fʋ. Ɩlaha fʋ alupʋ bawun fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn. Mʋ́ sʋ amʋ́a aha ánɩ́ bʋtamasi ɩla kie bakpa ɔnɔ bun.

ref: I often think of the heavens your hands have made, and of the moon and stars you put in place.
text: Nɩ notsu ansɩ kɩ ɔsʋsʋ, fʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ atɔ bwɛhɛ, ɔtsra mʋ́a ntsrakpabiá fɔbwɛ dɩnka nwʋlʋtasʋ a,

ref: Then I ask, “Why do you care about us humans? Why are you concerned for us weaklings?”
text: ntɛfɩtɛ mɩ ɩwɩ mbɛɛ, “Ntɔ nyankpʋsa lɔkʋkʋ ogyi, sʋ fʋtɔgywɩɩn mʋ ɩwɩ alɩ? Ntɔ nyankpʋsa gyi, sʋ fʋtɛkɩ mʋsʋ?”

ref: You made us a little lower than you yourself, and you have crowned us with glory and honor.
text: Fɛba mʋ asɩ dʋn fʋ abɔpʋ. Fɔpʋ numnyam pʋ́ obú dɩnka mʋsʋ.

ref: You let us rule everything your hands have made. And you put all of it under our power—
text: Fɔbwɛ mʋ fʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ogyipʋ, fɔpʋ togyitɔ wa mʋ asɩ.

ref: the sheep and the cattle, and every wild animal,
text: Akufa, nnantswie pʋ́ pututɔ-mbwɩ fɛ́ɛ́;

ref: the birds in the sky, the fish in the sea, and all ocean creatures.
text: mbubwi mʋ́a ntsutso-aye pʋ́ ntobiá bʋna ɔpʋtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Our Lord and Ruler, your name is wonderful everywhere on earth!
text: Oo anɩ Wie Nana Bulu, fʋ ɩda lɔkʋkʋ moni ɔyɩtɔ o!

ref: I will praise you, Lord, with all my heart and tell about the wonders you have worked.
text: Nana Bulu, nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ tsu mɩ ɩklʋntɔ. Nɛ́bla aha ofula akpɔnkpɔntɩá fabwɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: God Most High, I will rejoice; I will celebrate and sing because of you.
text: Fʋ sʋ ansɩ bɛ́hɩɛ gyi mɩ. Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie, nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɩda.

ref: When my enemies face you, they run away and stumble and are destroyed.
text: Mɩ alupʋ bowun fʋ bʋteyinki ɔma, dɩda wu,

ref: You take your seat as judge, and your fair decisions prove that I was in the right.
text: tsufɛ asʋn ogyipʋ ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi. Fatsia fʋ obiasʋ, gyi mɩ asʋn wanklaan ha mɩ.

ref: You warn the nations and destroy evil people; you wipe out their names forever and ever.
text: Bulu, fawa ɩyɩn wa ɔmá ánɩ́ bʋmeyin fʋ. Faha lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bata, tsitsi amʋ́ ada lɛ ɩnʋ plɩplɩplɩ.

ref: Our enemies are destroyed completely for all time. Their cities are torn down, and they will never be remembered again.
text: Anɩ alupʋ klɛtɔ lata fɛ́ɛ́. Fabwie amʋ́ awulu fɛ́ɛ́. Bʋmɛ́ɛtra tɩ amʋ́ ada ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: You rule forever, Lord, and you are on your throne, ready for judgment.
text: Tamɛ Nana Bulu tsie brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Alayaɩ mʋ obia ha asʋngyi.

ref: You judge the world fairly and treat all nations with justice.
text: Obégyi ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ asʋn mʋ́ ɔkpasʋ. Obégyi ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.

ref: The poor can run to you because you are a fortress in times of trouble.
text: Nana Bulu gyi ɔtanʋkpa kinkin ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ hɩɛ. Ɔtanʋkpa kinkin ogyi ha aha ánɩ́ bawie ɩkplantɔ.

ref: Everyone who honors your name can trust you, because you are faithful to all who depend on you.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, aha ánɩ́ bʋyin fʋ ɩda bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ, tsufɛ fʋtamatswɛ fʋ adunkapʋ kpʋkpʋ.

ref: You rule from Zion, Lord, and we sing about you to let the nations know everything you have done.
text: Mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ Nana Buluá otsie Sion! Mlɩda mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔkan ɔmágyiɔmátɔ.

ref: You did not forget to punish the guilty or listen to the cries of those in need.
text: Tsufɛ mʋtɛka ɔha ánɩ́ alawa ɩbɩ obugyatɔ ɩkɔ. Ɔtamakina ipian awunpʋ isu nu.

ref: Please have mercy, Lord! My enemies mistreat me. Keep me from the gates that lead to death,
text: Oo Nana Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ! Kɩ alɩá mɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ ipiantɔ wa! Fʋtɛlɛ mɩ tsu lowu ɔbɔnɔ,

ref: and I will sing about you at the gate to Zion. I will be happy there because you rescued me.
text: mɛnɩ nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ Sionfɔ ofiakpa. Ansɩ bégyi mɩ, tsufɛ fahɔ mɩ nkpa.

ref: Our Lord, the nations fell into their own pits, and their feet were caught in their own traps.
text: Ɔmá-ɔmá bakpawie amʋ́ ɔbɔ kwihɛtɔ. Amʋ́ onuto ayibi fɩnɩhɛ lalɛ amʋ́.

ref: You showed what you are like, and you made certain that justice is done, but evil people are trapped by their own evil deeds.
text: Nana Bulu lalɛ ɩwɩ suna tsʋn mʋ asʋnbua ɔnɔkwalɩtɔ. Aha lalahɛ amʋ onuto ɩbɩ ɔnɔ gyumagyihɛ lalɛ amʋ́. Mlɩfʋlɩ ɩkpɛ amʋ kʋklʋ. Ɩya.

ref: The poor and the homeless won't always be forgotten and without hope.
text: Tsufɛ fʋmɛ́ɛtan ahianfɔsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Ipian awunpʋ ɔkpakɩ ɛ ɩmɔ́ɔbwɛ kpalɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: Do something, Lord! Don't let the nations win. Make them stand trial in your court of law.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, kʋsʋ! Máha nyankpʋsa ɔwa ɔkpayi fʋ ansɩtɔ ɔbɛɛ, magyi ɩsʋ. Ɔmá-ɔmá bʋgyi ɩpɔn fʋ ansɩtɔ!

ref: Make the nations afraid and let them all discover just how weak they are.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, pʋ ifu wa amʋ́tɔ, abʋbɩá anyankpʋsa kɛkɛ bʋgyi. Ɩya.

ref: Why are you far away, Lord? Why do you hide yourself when I am in trouble?
text: Oo Nana Bulu, ntogyi sʋ fawa ɩfɔ alɩ? Ntogyi sʋ faŋain ɩwɩ brɛá anɩbʋ ɩkplantɔ?

ref: Proud and brutal people hunt down the poor. But let them get caught by their own evil plans!
text: Aha lalahɛ bapʋ ɩwɩtsu bʋgya ahianfɔ. Ha amʋ́ agywɩɩn lalahɛ ibufa amʋ́sʋ.

ref: The wicked brag about their deepest desires. Those greedy people hate and curse you, Lord.
text: Tsufɛ aha lalahɛ bʋtɔpʋ amʋ́ ɔwɔlɩ lalahɛ tsu ɩwɩ. Bʋtoyula aha asisipʋ, kpɔɩ Nana Bulu.

ref: The wicked are too proud to turn to you or even think about you.
text: Ɩwɩtsu sʋ bʋtamapʋ Bulu bwɛ tɔtɔ. Amʋ́ agywɩɩn fɛ́ɛ́ gyi, “Bulu ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋ.”

ref: They are always successful, though they can't understand your teachings, and they keep sneering at their enemies.
text: Togyitɔ tɔwa alɛ ha amʋ́ bregyibrɛ. Bulu asʋnbua lɔfʋa dʋn amʋ́, bʋmɛdɛ mʋ́ wun. Amʋ́ alupʋ bʋmegyi tɔtɔ amʋ́ ansɩtɔ.

ref: In their hearts they say, “Nothing can hurt us! We'll always be happy and free from trouble.”
text: Bʋtɛblɩ wa nwuntɔ bɛɛ, “Tɔtɔ mɛ́ɛlɛ anɩ da. Anɩmóowie ɩkplantɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”

ref: They curse and tell lies, and all they talk about is how to be cruel or how to do wrong.
text: Ɩlwɩɩ mʋ́a afunu pʋ́ asʋn-sɩnsɩn blɩ bʋtegyi dɩ. Asʋnkpan mʋ́a asʋn lalahɛ blɩ ma amʋ́ ɔpá.

ref: They hide outside villages, waiting to strike and murder some innocent victim.
text: Bʋteŋain awulu nkusubisʋ mɔ aha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma amʋ́ ɩwɩ. Bʋtɛtɛ aha ánɩ́ ɔkla ma amʋ́ ogya.

ref: They are hungry lions hiding in the bushes, hoping to catch some helpless passerby. They trap the poor in nets and drag them away.
text: Bʋteŋain fɛ ɔtapʋ dɛ ɔbwɩ tɛ, gyo apɔnpʋ. Bʋtɛfɩnɩ ayibi kɩta apɔnpʋ, bɩtɩa amʋ́ natɩ.

ref: They crouch down and wait to grab a victim.
text: Bʋtɛda apɔnpʋ lɛ da, yia amʋ́ manta ɔsʋlʋtɔ mamaama.

ref: They say, “God can't see! He's got on a blindfold.”
text: Aha lalahɛ anfɩ bʋtɛblɩ wa amʋ́ nwuntɔ bɛɛ, “Bulu ansɩ mɛdɩn mʋ́sʋ. Alabun ansibi. Omóowun mʋ́ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”

ref: Do something, Lord God, and use your powerful arm to help those in need.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, wa ɔsa bɩtɩ aha lalahɛ ɩsʋ, afʋkaɩn ɩwɩɔsɩn awunpʋsʋ.

ref: The wicked don't respect you. In their hearts they say, “God won't punish us!”
text: Ntogyi sʋ aha lalahɛ basi Bulu ɔmagya, bʋdɛblɩ wa nwuntɔ bɛɛ, “Ɔmɛ́ɛbɩtɩ anɩ ɩsʋ?”

ref: But you see the trouble and the distress, and you will do something. The poor can count on you, and so can orphans.
text: Tamɛ togyitɔ ɩda fʋ ansɩtɔ, tsufɛ fʋdɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn pʋ́ ipian awunpʋ wun. Fʋtekleá fɔ́bʋa amʋ́ bregyibrɛ. Apɔnpʋ bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ, fʋtegyi awumbi bʋalɛ bregyibrɛ.

ref: Now break the power of all merciless people. Punish them for doing wrong and make them stop.
text: Kpa aha lalahɛ anfɩ pʋ́ awuntɔlɩnpʋ ɩba. Bɩtɩ amʋ́ lalahɛá babwɛ ɩsʋ yɛfʋn brɛá bési bwɛ.

ref: Our Lord, you will always rule, but every godless nation will vanish from the earth.
text: Nana Bulu gyi Owie brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Ɔmá bamba bata lɛ mʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: You listen to the longings of those who suffer. You offer them hope, and you pay attention to their cries for help.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, fʋtonu ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ isu. Fʋtɔwa amʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn, yaa asʋ nu amʋ́ asʋn.

ref: You defend orphans and everyone else in need, so that no one on earth can terrify others again.
text: Fʋtegyi ha awumbi pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ amʋ́ hɩɛ, mɛnɩ nyankpʋsa gyi-wʋdɩ, gyi-nfɔlɩ mɛ́ɛtra wa amʋ́ ifu.

ref: The Lord is my fortress! Don't say to me, “Escape like a bird to the mountains!”
text: Nana Bulu nasrɩ tanʋ. Ɔkpa mɔmʋsʋ mlɩdɛ mɩ bla mlɩaa, “Wa ɔsa srɩ ŋain, fɛ alɩá obubwi tofuli yɔ ɩbʋsʋ?

ref: You tell me, “Watch out! Those evil people have put their arrows on their bows, and they are standing in the shadows, aiming at good people.
text: Tsufɛ aha lalahɛ baklɩ amʋ́ ɩta, bɩtɩ mʋ́. Baŋain okluntɔ bɔ́tswɩ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.

ref: What can an honest person do when everything crumbles?”
text: Nɩ bobwie ntswɩasɩ amʋ bun a, ntɔ ɔha yile ɔbɛ́talɩ bwɛ?”

ref: The Lord is sitting in his sacred temple on his throne in heaven. He knows everything we do because he sees us all.
text: Nana Bulu bʋ mʋ Ɔtswɛkpa. Otsie mʋ owie-obiasʋ ɔsʋsʋ. Ɔdɛ anyankpʋsa ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ kɩ. Odewun tɔá bʋdɛbwɛ.

ref: The Lord tests honest people, but despises those who are cruel and love violence.
text: Nana Bulu tɛkapʋ yile abwɛpʋ pʋ́ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ kɩ, tamɛ otekisi aha ánɩ́ bʋtekle owuntɔlɩn.

ref: He will send fiery coals and flaming sulfur down on the wicked, and they will drink nothing but a scorching wind.
text: Ɔbɛ́ha atonkodu mʋ́a agyawunuá ɩdɛhɔ bótswie wʋlɩ lakpan abwɛpʋsʋ. Lɩlɩtɔ afuá mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn ɔbɔ́pʋnuna amʋ́.

ref: The Lord always does right and wants justice done. Everyone who does right will see his face.
text: Tsufɛ yile ɔbwɛpʋ Nana Bulu gyi. Otekle yile. Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa obówun mʋ ansɩtɔ.

ref: Please help me, Lord! All who were faithful and all who were loyal have disappeared.
text: Nana Bulu, hɔ anɩ, tsufɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋtama dalɩ Bulu ɔma bata! Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ɔkʋkʋ tra ɔma ɔyɩtɔ.

ref: Everyone tells lies, and no one is sincere.
text: Ɔhagyiɔha dɛ afunu wa suna mʋ ba. Bʋbʋ ɔnɔwankɩ. Amʋ́ wʋlɛwʋlɛ bogyoli nfɩ, batsula nana.

ref: Won't you chop off all flattering tongues that brag so loudly?
text: Nana Bulu, ka anɔwankɩpʋ pʋ́ ɩwɩatsupʋ itin.

ref: They say to themselves, “We are great speakers. No one else has a chance.”
text: Amʋ́tɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Anɩ ɔdandʋ bɛ́lɛ anɩ. Anɩbʋ ɔnɔ, ma ɔbɔ́dʋn anɩ?”

ref: But you, Lord, tell them, “I will do something! The poor are mistreated and helpless people moan. I'll rescue all who suffer.”
text: Nana Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Bʋdɛ owuntɔlɩn wa ahianfɔsʋ, aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ bʋdesu. Mʋ́ sʋ nɔ́kʋsʋ ngya! Négyi ɩban wa nkpa adunkapʋ.”

ref: Our Lord, you are true to your promises, and your word is like silver heated seven times in a fiery furnace.
text: Nana Bulu asʋn igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ. Igyi fɛ sika fututuá baŋlaɩn mʋ́, dɩnkɩ ipi lɛ mʋ́ ansɩtɔ tse sienɔ.

ref: You will protect us and always keep us safe from those people.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, gyo anɩ ɩwɩ, afʋlɛ anɩ tsu ndɛmba-abi anfɩ ɩbɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: But all who are wicked will keep on strutting, while everyone praises their shameless deeds.
text: Aha bʋbuo lalahɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋdɛtsʋntsʋn.

ref: How much longer, Lord, will you forget about me? Will it be forever? How long will you hide?
text: Oo Nana Bulu, ɔmɛnkɛ fɛ́damli kɩ mɩ? Fatan mɩsʋ fɛ́ɛ́? Ɔmɛnkɛ fɛ́lɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan suna mɩ?

ref: How long must I be confused and miserable all day? How long will my enemies keep beating me down?
text: Nwa nwɛ mɩ klʋntɔ yɛfʋn ɔmɛnkɛ? Ngywɩɩn ɔpa mʋ́a onye yɛfʋn ɔmɛnkɛ? Mɩ alupʋ bʋgyi mɩsʋ yɛfʋn ɔmɛnkɛ?

ref: Please listen, Lord God, and answer my prayers. Make my eyes sparkle again, or else I will fall into the sleep of death.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, damli kɩ mɩ; afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ. Ha mɩ ansɩsʋ ɩtɩtɩ mɩ, mɛnɩ mmɛ́ɛdɩdɩ sin mʋ́tɔ.

ref: My enemies will say, “Now we've won!” They will be greatly pleased when I am defeated.
text: Mɛnɩ mɩ olupʋ mɛ́ɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Nadʋn mʋ”, ansɩ méegyi amʋ́ ánɩ́ nadɩda.

ref: I trust your love, and I feel like celebrating because you rescued me.
text: Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ mɩ ansɩ ɩdɩn fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka amʋsʋ. Ansɩ bégyi mɩ, tsufɛ fahɔ mɩ nkpa.

ref: You have been good to me, Lord, and I will sing about you.
text: Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ ha Nana Bulu, tsufɛ alawa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ.

ref: Only a fool would say, “There is no God!” People like that are worthless; they are heartless and cruel and never do right.
text: Aha mimlahɛ nkʋlɛ dɛ amʋ́ ɩwɩ bla bɛɛ, “Bulu má ɩnʋ.” Bayinta. Bamli mbusuo abɔpʋ. Ɔbakʋlɛ kʋraa mɛ́dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.

ref: From heaven the Lord looks down to see if anyone is wise enough to search for him.
text: Nana Bulu tɛkɩ anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ sɩsɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ, kɩ bɛɛ, menya ɔtɩansɩpʋ ɔkʋá otodunka mʋ ɔkpa.

ref: But all of them are corrupt; no one does right.
text: Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ badamli ɔma ha Bulu. Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔkpa motswii. Yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋ. Ɔbakʋlɛ kʋraa mɛ́dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.

ref: Won't you evil people learn? You refuse to pray, and you gobble up the Lord's people.
text: Mʋ́ sʋ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋmóonu asʋn asɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ? Bʋdɛ mɩ aha wɩ fɛ iye bʋdɛwɩ, bʋtamasu kpoli mɩ.

ref: But you will be frightened, because God is on the side of every good person.
text: Tamɛ ifu bɛ́hɩɛ kɩta amʋ́ ɩnʋ, tsufɛ Bulu buo yile abwɛpʋ.

ref: You may spoil the plans of the poor, but the Lord protects them.
text: Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ, mlɩteyinta ahianfɔ nhɩhɩɛ, tamɛ Nana Bulu gyi amʋ́ okpikplikpa.

ref: I long for someone from Zion to come and save Israel! Our Lord, when you bless your people again, Jacob's family will be glad, and Israel will celebrate.
text: Nhɩɛ ndɛ Nana Bulu kokoli mbɛɛ, ɔkʋ otsu Sionbʋsʋ bɔhɔ Israelfɔ. Ɛkɛá Bulu ɔbɛ́latsu mʋ aha kʋsʋ a, ɩhɩɛ wa Yakob abi-aná ɔdwɛ, ansɩ ɩhɩɛ gyi Israelfɔ.

ref: Who may stay in God's temple or live on the holy mountain of the Lord?
text: Oo Nana Bulu, ma ɔbɔ́swɩɩ fʋ tati-obuto? Ma obétsia fʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋsʋ?

ref: Only those who obey God and do as they should. They speak the truth
text: Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma mʋ ɩwɩ, ɔtɔbwɛ yile; ɔtɛblɩ ɔnɔkwalɩ tsu mʋ ɩklʋntɔ.

ref: and don't spread gossip; they treat others fairly and don't say cruel things.
text: Ɔtamatsii aha, ɔtamapʋ lalahɛ gyi mʋ aba. Ɔtamatɩn mʋ aba ɔnɔ,

ref: They hate worthless people, but show respect for all who worship the Lord. And they keep their promises, no matter what the cost.
text: otekisi lalahɛ abwɛpʋ. Mboun otobu Nana Bulu ifu anyapʋ, ɔtamaka ntam yinki ɔma, nɩ lowutɔ igyi o.

ref: They lend their money without charging interest, and they don't take bribes to hurt the innocent. Those who do these things will always stand firm.
text: Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtamafɛ kɔba, ɔtamatsula abʋha mʋ nta, ɔdamli ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa asʋn bun. Tɔtɔ má ɩnʋá ɩbɛ́ha ɔha ánɩ́ ogyi alɩ ɔbɛ́dɩda ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: Protect me, Lord God! I run to you for safety,
text: Oo Nana Bulu, hɔ mɩ; tsufɛ fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ.

ref: and I have said, “Only you are my Lord! Every good thing I have is a gift from you.”
text: Nabla Nana Bulu mbɛɛ, “Fʋgyi mɩ Wie. Mma itoyile kʋkʋʋkʋ dʋn fʋ.”

ref: Your people are wonderful, and they make me happy,
text: Bulu aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ gyi anumnyampʋá mɩ ansɩ tɛhɩɛ gyi amʋ́ ɩwɩ.

ref: but worshipers of other gods will have much sorrow. I refuse to offer sacrifices of blood to those gods or worship in their name.
text: Aha ánɩ́ bʋbuo ɩkpɩ bʋtekle asʋn tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ha amʋ́ ɩwɩ. Mmɔ́ɔwa ɩbɩ amʋ́ afɔdɩɛ obugyatɔ. Mmɔ́ɔpʋ amʋ́ ɩkpɩ ada dɩnka mɩ ɔnɔsʋ.

ref: You, Lord, are all I want! You are my choice, and you keep me safe.
text: Nana Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ ogyikpa pʋ́ togyitɔá ɩbɔ́fʋn mɩ. Fʋtogyo mɩ ɔsʋlʋ ha mɩ.

ref: You make my life pleasant, and my future is bright.
text: Ɔsʋlʋ amʋʋ bɔbɔɩ ha mɩ amʋ legyi mɩ ansɩ. Lɛlɛ, mbʋ ogyikpa wanklaan!

ref: I praise you, Lord, for being my guide. Even in the darkest night, your teachings fill my mind.
text: Nɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu, mʋtosuna mɩ asʋn. Mɩ ɩklʋn ɛ tɔtɔɩ kpla mɩ onye.

ref: I will always look to you, as you stand beside me and protect me from fear.
text: Mɩ ansɩ dɩn Nana Bulusʋ bregyibrɛ. Ɔlɩɩ mɩ gyɔpɩsʋ. Mʋ́ sʋ tɔtɔ ɩmɛ́ɛlɛ mɩ da.

ref: With all my heart, I will celebrate, and I can safely rest.
text: Mʋ́ sʋ ansɩ tegyi mɩ, mɩ ɔkla ɛ dɛ ansigyi nya. Tɔtɔ mɛdɛ mɩ han,

ref: I am your chosen one. You won't leave me in the grave or let my body decay.
text: tsufɛ fʋméesi mɩ wa afulitɔ. Mmɔkʋkpa fʋ ɔma. Mʋ́ sʋ fʋmɛ́ɛha mmɔ́ɔplɔ.

ref: You have shown me the path to life, and you make me glad by being near to me. Sitting at your right side, I will always be joyful.
text: Fósuna mɩ nkpa ɔkpa. Fʋ wa ansigyiá ɩlɔfʋn bʋ. Fʋ gyɔpɩsʋ ansigyiá ɩma ɔka bʋ.

ref: I am innocent, Lord! Won't you listen as I pray and beg for help? I am honest! Please hear my prayer.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, nu asʋn ánɩ́ ɩda ɔkpa, afʋnu mɩ isu! Nu mɩ mpaɩ, imotsu ofunupʋ ɔnɔ.

ref: Only you can say that I am innocent, because only your eyes can see the truth.
text: Gyi mɩ asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ, afʋpʋ ansɩ kɩ tɔá ɩda ɔkpa.

ref: You know my heart, and even during the night you have tested me and found me innocent. I have made up my mind never to tell a lie.
text: Fʋtɛtɛtɛ mɩ klʋntɔ kɩ, fʋtɛsɩna mɩ onye sɔ mɩ kɩ. Tamɛ fʋmɔkʋwun tsitsa kʋkʋ mɩtɔ. Nahɩɛá asʋkpan kʋkʋ ɩmɛ́ɛdalɩ tsu mɩ ɔnɔ.

ref: I don't do like others. I obey your teachings and am not cruel.
text: Fɛ alɩá akʋ bʋtɔbwɛ a, mɩ mʋ́ ndɛ fʋ mblatɔ. Ntamabwɛ awuntɔlɩnpʋ bwɛhɛ.

ref: I have followed you, without ever stumbling.
text: Nna fʋ ɔkpasʋ bregyibrɛ. Mmɔkʋsrɛɩ dalɩ ɔkpa amʋsʋ.

ref: I pray to you, God, because you will help me. Listen and answer my prayer!
text: Oo Bulu, nasu kpoli fʋ, tsufɛ fɔ́sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ. Yaa asʋ, afʋnu mɩ mpaɩ.

ref: Show your wonderful love. Your mighty arm protects those who run to you for safety from their enemies.
text: Lɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka suna alɩá ɩbɔ́wa ifu. Fʋtɔpʋ fʋ gyɔpɩ hɔ aha ánɩ́ basrɩ tanʋ fʋ, lɛ amʋ́ alupʋá bakʋsʋ lɩɩ amʋ́sʋ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: Protect me as you would your very own eyes; hide me in the shadow of your wings.
text: Gyo mɩ ɩwɩ, fɛ alɩá fʋtogyo fʋ nsibi klambi. Ŋain mɩ fʋ abambasɩ.

ref: Don't let my brutal enemies attack from all sides and kill me.
text: Lɛ mɩ tsu aha lalahɛá bʋgya mɩ ɩbɩtɔ, tsu adʋn ánɩ́ bakafia mɩ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: They refuse to show mercy, and they keep bragging.
text: Nwewun kʋkʋ ɩma amʋ́tɔ. Bʋtɔtɔɩ ɩwɩtsusʋ.

ref: They have caught up with me! My enemies are everywhere, eagerly hoping to smear me in the dirt.
text: Basrɩ gya mɩ, kafia mɩ. Bʋdɛ ɔkpa dunka ánɩ́ bɛ́lɛ mɩ da kpla.

ref: They are like hungry lions hunting for food, or like young lions hiding in ambush.
text: Baka gyo mɩ, fɛ gyata ánɩ́ akʋn dɛ mʋ. Fɛ gyata ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ lafɩnɩ ogyo ɔbwɩ.

ref: Do something, Lord! Attack and defeat them. Take your sword and save me from those evil people.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, kʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩ alupʋsʋ, afʋba amʋ́ asɩ. Pʋ fʋ ɔdayi kɔ hɔ mɩ, tsu aha lalahɛ anfɩ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: Use your powerful arm and rescue me from the hands of mere humans whose world won't last. You provide food for those you love. Their children have plenty, and their grandchildren will have more than enough.
text: Pʋ fʋ tumi hɔ mɩ lɛ aha anfɩ ɩbɩ. Hɔ mɩ tsu aha anfɩ banya ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ ogyikpa anfɩ ɩbɩ. Amʋ́ lanya ɩwɩ gyi sian amʋ́ abi, ɩlasian ha amʋ́ aná.

ref: I am innocent, Lord, and I will see your face! When I awake, all I want is to see you as you are.
text: Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, mɩ asʋn da ɔkpa. Mʋ́ sʋ nówun fʋ ansɩtɔ. Nɩ netsinki wun fʋ tsiatɔ a, nɔ́mwɛ.

ref: I love you, Lord God, and you make me strong.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔwapʋ; ntɛhɩɛ dwɛ fʋ.

ref: You are my mighty rock, my fortress, my protector, the rock where I am safe, my shield, my powerful weapon, and my place of shelter.
text: Fʋgyi mɩ ɩbʋ fʋahɛ, mɩ oŋainkpa kpikpli pʋ́ mɩ ɔlɛpʋ. Mɩ Bulu, mɩ ɩbʋta ánɩ́ ntɛsrɩ tanʋ. Mɩ ɩwɩ ɩban, mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ánɩ́ ɔtɔhɔ mɩ nkpa pʋ́ mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.

ref: I praise you, Lord! I prayed, and you rescued me from my enemies.
text: Ntosu kpoli Nana Bulu, ɩkanfʋ mʋ wie. Ɔtɔhɔ mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: Death had wrapped its ropes around me, and I was almost swallowed by its flooding waters.
text: Lowu ɩfla lɔwa kɩta mɩ. Ntsuá ɩbʋ ɩyɩn lɔbʋla kɩta mɩ.

ref: I was in terrible trouble when I called out to you, but from your temple you heard me and answered my prayer.
text: Nosu kpoli Nana Bulu brɛá mbʋ ɩkplan anfɩtɔ. Nɔkplʋn kpoli mɩ Bulu mbɛɛ, ɔlɛ mɩ. Olonu mɩ isu mʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ. Mɩ okitikiti lɔtʋ mʋ. Mɩ isu lowie mʋ asʋtɔ.

ref: The earth shook and shivered, and the mountains trembled down to their roots. You were angry
text: Ɩnʋ ɔsʋlʋ lɛkan ɩwɩ, kpɩnkɩ. Abʋ tsitsi ɛ lɛka ɩwɩ kpɩnkɩ, tsufɛ ɔblɔ dɛ mʋ.

ref: and breathed out smoke. Scorching heat and fiery flames spewed from your mouth.
text: Mʋ ɔwɔntɩtɔ ɩdɛ ogyasi, ogya plɛnplɛn ánɩ́ mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn dɛdalɩ tsu mʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ. Agyawunuá ɩdɛhɔ lɛdalɩ tsu mʋtɔ.

ref: You opened the heavens like curtains, and you came down with storm clouds under your feet.
text: Ɔlɛnɛ ɔsʋsʋ, kplɩ ba ayasɩ. Oklun tuun bun mʋ ayabiasɩ.

ref: You rode on the backs of flying creatures and swooped down with the wind as wings.
text: Ɔlɛdɩnka kerubsʋ, fuli ba. Ɔlɛdɩnka afu bambisʋ ba hwim.

ref: Darkness was your robe; thunderclouds filled the sky, hiding you from sight.
text: Ɔlɔpʋ oklun bun ɩwɩ. Nyankpʋ mʋ́a agyinde tuun lobomli mʋ.

ref: Hailstones and fiery coals lit up the sky in front of you.
text: Mʋ ɩwɩ lɔwankɩ. Nsaɩntɔ lɛkpa ogya, atsufolibi lotswie tsu mʋ ɩwɩwankɩ amʋtɔ tsʋn agyinde amʋtɔ ba.

ref: Lord Most High, your voice thundered from the heavens, as hailstones and fiery coals poured down like rain.
text: Nana Bulu lɛha ɔprada lɔpʋtɩ ɔsʋsʋ. Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie ɔmɛ lɛlɩn. Nsaɩntɔ lɛkpa ogya, atsufolibi lotswie.

ref: You scattered your enemies with arrows of lightning.
text: Ɔlɔtswɩ mʋ mbɩn da mʋ alupʋ saɩn. Ɔlɛha nsaɩntɔ lɛkpa ogya, begyigya.

ref: You roared at the sea, and its deepest channels could be seen. You snorted, and the earth shook to its foundations.
text: Nana Bulu, fɔwa ɩyɩn, si ɔŋɛ da fwɩfwɩ; ɔpʋ bʋnkpatɔ lɛya. Ɔsʋlʋ ntswɩasɩ lɛdɩ yaya.

ref: You reached down from heaven, and you lifted me from deep in the ocean.
text: Fɔtswɩ ɩbɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ kɩta mɩ, bɩtɩa mɩ lɛ ntsu kluklutɔ.

ref: You rescued me from enemies, who were hateful and too powerful for me.
text: Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ tsu mɩ ɔdʋkplakpatɩ ɩbɩtɔ, lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩ, tsufɛ bʋhɩɛ bʋdʋn mɩ.

ref: On the day disaster struck, they came and attacked, but you defended me.
text: Bowie mɩtɔ ɛkɛá mbʋ ɩkplantɔ, tamɛ Nana Bulu lɔbwɛ mɩ ɔma ɔlɩɩpʋ.

ref: When I was fenced in, you freed and rescued me because you love me.
text: Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ, pʋ mɩ ba ɔtɛɩkpa, tsufɛ mɩ asʋn tegyi mʋ ansɩ.

ref: You are good to me, Lord, because I do right, and you reward me because I am innocent.
text: Mɩ yilebwɛ sʋ Nana Bulu legyi mɩ bʋalɛ. Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɔpʋ yile ka mɩ ɩkɔ.

ref: I do what you want and never turn to do evil.
text: Tsufɛ nagyi Nana Bulu asʋnsʋ. Mmɔkʋbwɛ lakpan yinki mɩ Bulu ɔma.

ref: I keep your laws in mind and never look away from your teachings.
text: Ntegyi mʋ mblasʋ. Mmɔkʋsi mʋ amandɩɛ tswɩ.

ref: I obey you completely and guard against sin.
text: Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ mʋ ansɩtɔ. Ntɛkɩ mɩ ɔtsakpa, mɛnɩ mméegyi ɩpɔn.

ref: You have been good to me because I do right; you have rewarded me for being innocent by your standards.
text: Mɩ yilebwɛ sʋ Nana Bulu lagyi mɩ bʋalɛ. Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ alapʋ yile ka mɩ ɩkɔ.

ref: You are always loyal to your loyal people, and you are faithful to the faithful.
text: Fʋtegyi ɔnɔkwalɩ ha ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ. Fʋma ɔlala ha ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma mʋ ɩwɩ.

ref: With all who are sincere, you are sincere, but you treat the unfaithful as their deeds deserve.
text: Fʋtɛlɛ fʋ ɩklʋntɔ wankɩhɛ suna ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ɩklʋntɔ lɔwankɩ. Fʋyin alɩá fʋtɔpʋkpa ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ɔkpa lɔnɔ.

ref: You rescue the humble, but you put down all who are proud.
text: Tsufɛ fʋtɔhɔ ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ nkpa, tamɛ fʋtɛba ɩwɩ atsupʋ asɩ.

ref: You, the Lord God, keep my lamp burning and turn darkness to light.
text: Lɛlɛ, fʋtɛha mɩ ɔkandɩɛ tɔwankɩ. Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, fʋtɛha mɩ oklun temli wankɩ.

ref: You help me defeat armies and capture cities.
text: Fʋ sʋ ntɛtalɩ gyi adʋnsʋ. Ɩna fʋ sʋ ntɛtalɩ fuli nyankɩ abuntisʋ bwie awulu.

ref: Your way is perfect, Lord, and your word is correct. You are a shield for those who run to you for help.
text: Bulu mʋ́ a, mʋ ɔkpa lɔfʋn. Tɔá ɔlɛhɩɛ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋ mʋ́tɔ. Otegyi ɩban wa ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛsrɩ tanʋ mʋ.

ref: You alone are God! Only you are a mighty rock.
text: Tsufɛ Nana Bulu ɔma a, Bulu ɔmɔmʋ bʋ ɩnʋ? Bulu ɔma a, bʋta mɔmʋ bʋ ɩnʋ?

ref: You give me strength and guide me right.
text: Mʋtɔwa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, ɔtɛha ɔkpatɔ tolwii ha mɩ pisii.

ref: You make my feet run as fast as those of a deer, and you help me stand on the mountains.
text: Mʋlɔwa mɩ ayabi ɔwʋnlɩn fɛ nani, pʋ mɩ lɩɩ ɔfʋakpa.

ref: You teach my hands to fight and my arms to use a bow of bronze.
text: Mʋtosuna mɩ ɩbɩ ɩsa kɔ, ntɛtalɩ nɛ kɔɔbrɩ ɩta.

ref: You alone are my shield. Your right hand supports me, and by coming to help me, you have made me famous.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, fʋlegyi ɩban wa mɩ, hɔ mɩ nkpa. Fʋ gyɔpɩ ɩbɩ lɛkɩta mɩ lɩɩ. Fʋlaba ɩwɩasɩ, ha mɩ nabwɛ ɔha kpɔnkpɔntɩ.

ref: You clear the way for me, and now I won't stumble.
text: Fɔtɔ ɔkpa ha mɩ, mɩ otebi mɔtswɩ tsɛlɛ.

ref: I kept chasing my enemies, until I caught them and destroyed them.
text: Nɛdɩnka mɩ alupʋsʋ yɛkɩta amʋ́. Mmeyinki ɔma yɛfʋn brɛá bɛta fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: I stuck my sword through my enemies, and they were crushed under my feet.
text: Nobwie amʋ́ bun mɩ ayabiasɩ, bʋmɛtalɩ tra kʋsʋ.

ref: You helped me win victories, and you forced my attackers to fall victim to me.
text: Tsufɛ fɔwa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ha ɩsakɔ. Fɛba mɩ adʋn asɩ, pʋ amʋ́ wa mɩ asɩ.

ref: You made my enemies run, and I killed them.
text: Fɛha mɩ alupʋ bɛsanki amʋ́ yama srɩ. Nɔmɔ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩsa kɔ.

ref: They cried out for help, but no one saved them; they called out to you, but there was no answer.
text: Bosu kpoli, tamɛ ɔhɔpʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋ. Bosu kpoli Nana Bulu ɛ, tamɛ ɔmɛkpla amʋ́.

ref: I ground them to dust blown by the wind, and I poured them out like mud in the streets.
text: Nɔkwɛ amʋ́ pukupuku, fɛ otutu afu ansɩtɔ. Nɛtsɛɩ amʋ́ wʋlɩ, fɛ dɩnsʋ ipi.

ref: You rescued me from stubborn people, and you made me the leader of foreign nations, who are now my slaves.
text: Adʋn bɔkʋsʋ mɩsʋ, fɔhɔ mɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩ. Fɛyaɩ mɩ ɔmá-ɔmá ɔkpapʋ. Aha ánɩ́ mmeyin kʋraa bosum mɩ.

ref: They have lost all courage, and from their fortresses, they come trembling.
text: Atɛtɔ lowu amʋ́, bʋdɛkpɩnkɩ kpakpakpakpa wɔ dalɩ amʋ́ oŋainkpa.

ref: You are the living Lord! I will praise you. You are a mighty rock. I will honor you for keeping me safe.
text: Nana Bulu tsie nkpa! Bʋkanfʋ mɩ bʋta. Bʋtsu mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu fʋa.

ref: You took revenge for me, and you put nations in my power.
text: Bulu tɛka mɩ alupʋ ɩkɔ. Ɔtɛba ɔmá-ɔmá asɩ, pʋ amʋ́ wa mɩ asɩ.

ref: You protected me from violent enemies and made me much greater than all of them.
text: Mʋtɛlɛ mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩ. Fotsu mɩ fʋa dʋn amʋ́; fɛlɛ mɩ lɛ awuntɔlɩnpʋ ɩbɩ.

ref: I will praise you, Lord, and I will honor you among the nations.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, ɩnɩ sʋ nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ ɔmá-ɔmá ansɩtɔ. Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɩda.

ref: You give glorious victories to your chosen king. Your faithful love for David and for his descendants will never end.
text: Fʋtɛha fʋ owie ɩsʋgyi akpɔnkpɔntɩ. Fʋtɛlɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka suna mɩ Dawid ánɩ́ fada ofuli mʋa mʋ abi-aná brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: The heavens keep telling the wonders of God, and the skies declare what he has done.
text: Kɩ alɩá ɔsʋsʋ ɩdɛ Bulu numnyam ɔwan lɛ, pʋ́ alɩá nwʋlʋta lakʋkʋ ɩdɛ Bulu atɔ bwɛhɛ lɛ suna.

ref: Each day informs the following day; each night announces to the next.
text: Ekekegyiɛkɛ ɩdɛ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ. Onyegyionye ɛ ɩdɛ mʋ lɛ suna.

ref: They don't speak a word, and there is never the sound of a voice.
text: Bʋmɛdɛ ɔblɩ kʋkʋ blɩ, bʋmɛdɛtɔɩ, tamɛ anɩdɛ mʋ asɩ nu.

ref: Yet their message reaches all the earth, and it travels around the world. In the heavens a tent is set up for the sun.
text: Amʋ́ ɔmɛ towie ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́, amʋ́ asʋn tɔyɔ ɔyɩ ɔka. Bulu labwɛ otsiakpa nwʋlʋtasʋ ha owi.

ref: It rises like a bridegroom and gets ready like a hero eager to run a race.
text: Ɔtɛdalɩ tsu ɩnʋ fɛ ɔka pɔpwɛ otsiapʋ dɛdalɩ mʋ obutotɔ. Ansɩ tegyi mʋ fɛ ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ oyetsii ɔsrɩ.

ref: It travels all the way across the sky. Nothing hides from its heat.
text: Ɔtɔkʋsʋ tsu nwʋlʋta ɔka yewie mʋ́ ɔka. Ɔtɛkplɩ yewie fʋnka nyɔsɩ. Tɔtɔ tamaŋain mʋ okunku.

ref: The Law of the Lord is perfect; it gives us new life. His teachings last forever, and they give wisdom to ordinary people.
text: Nana Bulu atosunahɛ lɔfʋn. Ɩtɔwa ɔha ɩklʋn ɔwʋnlɩn. Mʋ ɔnɔlɛ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ. Ɩtɛha ɔha mimlahɛ tɛtɩn ansɩ.

ref: The Lord's instruction is right; it makes our hearts glad. His commands shine brightly, and they give us light.
text: Nana Bulu mbla ɩda ɔkpa, ɩtɛha ansɩ tegyi ɔha. Mʋ mbla lɔwankɩ. Ɩtɛtɩtɩ ɔha ansɩsʋ.

ref: Worshiping the Lord is sacred; he will always be worshiped. All his decisions are correct and fair.
text: Nana Bulu ifunya bʋ alɛ. Ɩbʋ ɩnʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Mʋ asʋnbua igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ. Mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ da ɔkpa.

ref: They are worth more than the finest gold and are sweeter than honey from a honeycomb.
text: Ɩbʋ ibia dʋn sika pɛpɛ. Ɩdʋn sika pɛpɛ onuto-onuto. Ɩbʋ ɔdwɛ dʋn ɔkwɛn. Ɩbʋ ɔdwɛ dʋn akwatabitɔ ɔkwɛn.

ref: By your teachings, Lord, I am warned; by obeying them, I am greatly rewarded.
text: Ɩtɛda mɩ fʋ osumbi ɔla. Mʋ́sʋ gyi ɩhɩɛ bʋ labi kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ.

ref: None of us know our faults. Forgive me when I sin without knowing it.
text: Ma ɔbɛ́talɩ wun tsitsa ánɩ́ mabwɛ? Si mɩ lalahɛá mmowun kie mɩ.

ref: Don't let me do wrong on purpose, Lord, or let sin have control over my life. Then I will be innocent, and not guilty of some terrible fault.
text: Máha mɩ fʋ osumbi anfɩ ankɩansɩ bwɛ lakpan. Máha mʋ́ igyi mɩsʋ, mɛnɩ ɔlala méetsia mɩ ɩwɩ. Fówun mméegyi ɩpɔn ánɩ́ nabwɛ lakpan kpɔnkpɔntɩ.

ref: Let my words and my thoughts be pleasing to you, Lord, because you are my mighty rock and my protector.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ ɩbʋta pʋ́ mɩ ɔkalɛpʋ, ha mɩ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn pʋ́ mɩ asʋn susuhɛ igyi fʋ ansɩ.

ref: I pray that the Lord will listen when you are in trouble, and that the God of Jacob will keep you safe.
text: Nana Bulu ɔsɔ fʋ ɔnɔ fʋ ɔkplankɛ. Buluá anɩ nain Yakob losum ogyo fʋ ɩwɩ.

ref: May the Lord send help from his temple and come to your rescue from Mount Zion.
text: Ɔpʋ mbʋa sɩsɩ fʋ tsu mʋ otsiakpa, ɔwa fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn tsu Sion.

ref: May he remember your gifts and be pleased with what you bring.
text: Ɔkaɩn fʋ atɔ-abi-afɔdɩɛ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ, fʋ mbwɩ tɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ ɛ igyi mʋ ansɩ. Ɩya.

ref: May God do what you want most and let all go well for you.
text: Ɔha fʋ tɔá fʋ ɩklʋn dedunka, ɔha tɔá fʋdekle ɩba mʋ́tɔ ha fʋ.

ref: Then you will win victories, and we will celebrate, while raising our banners in the name of our God. May the Lord answer all your prayers!
text: Fʋ ɩsʋgyi sʋ abɔ́sʋra okitikiti ansigyisʋ. Abótsu anɩ ɔfranka fʋa anɩ Bulu ɩdatɔ. Nana Bulu ɔha fʋ fʋ atɔ kʋlɩhɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: I am certain, Lord, that you will help your chosen king. You will answer my prayers from your holy place in heaven, and you will save me with your mighty arm.
text: Sei nabɩá Nana Bulu tɔhɔ ɔha ánɩ́ alada mʋ ofuli. Ɔtɔpʋ mʋ nkpahɔ tumi sɔ mʋ ɔnɔ, tsu mʋ otsiakpa ɔsʋsʋ.

ref: Some people trust the power of chariots or horses, but we trust you, Lord God.
text: Akʋ bʋtɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mpɔnkɔsʋ, akʋ bʋtɔpʋdɩnka akekesʋ. Tamɛ anɩ mʋ́ anɩ ansɩ dɩn Nana Bulu, anɩ Bulu amʋ ɩdasʋ.

ref: Others will stumble and fall, but we will be strong and stand firm.
text: Amʋ́ mʋ́ bɛ́tɩn da, tamɛ anɩ mʋ́ abɔ́kʋsʋ lɩɩ tikpa.

ref: Give the king victory, Lord, and answer our prayers.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, ha owie ogyi ɩsʋ. Asu kpoli fʋ a, sɔ anɩ ɔnɔ.

ref: Our Lord, your mighty power makes the king glad, and he celebrates victories that you have given him.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, owie lanya ansigyi fʋ ɩsʋgyi sʋ. Kɩ alɩá awútɔ lakʋkʋ sankɩ mʋ.

ref: You did what he wanted most and never told him “No.”
text: Tɔá ɔlɔkʋlɩ tsu mʋ ɩklʋntɔ faha mʋ a. Fʋmekina tɔá ɔlɛfɩtɛ fʋ. Ɩya.

ref: You truly blessed the king, and you placed on him a crown of finest gold.
text: Tsufɛ foyula mʋ, yile lefia mʋ. Fɔpʋ sika pɛpɛpa bun mʋ nwun.

ref: He asked to live a long time, and you promised him life that never ends.
text: Ɔlɔkʋlɩ nkpa, fɛha mʋ nkpa tɩntɩn; obétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: The king is highly honored. You have let him win victories that have made him famous.
text: Ɩsʋgyiá fɛha mʋ sʋ alahɩɛ nya numnyam. Fapʋ obú dɩnka mʋsʋ, tsu mʋ ansɩtɔ fʋa.

ref: You have given him blessings that will last forever, and you have made him glad by being so near to him.
text: Ee, faha mʋ oyula ánɩ́ ɩmɛ́ɛka itin. Fʋ wa tsia tɛhɩɛ kana mʋ,

ref: Lord Most High, the king trusts you, and your kindness keeps him from defeat.
text: tsufɛ owie lɔpʋ mʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ. Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ, ɔmɛ́ɛha mʋ ɔmɛ́ɛdɩda ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: With your mighty arm, Lord, you will strike down all of your hateful enemies.
text: Fʋ ɩbɩ bɛ́da fʋ alupʋ. Fʋ gyɔpɩ bénya fʋ adʋn.

ref: They will be destroyed by fire once you are here, and because of your anger, flames will swallow them.
text: Nɩ fɛba a, fɔ́pʋ obuntɔ ogya hɔ amʋ́. Fɔ́pʋ ɔblɔ mɛ amʋ́, ogya bɔ́hɔ amʋ́.

ref: You will wipe their families from the earth, and they will disappear.
text: Fɛ́ha amʋ́ asɩ bɛ́ta lɛ ɔyɩtɔ. Amʋ́ abi-aná bʋmɛ́ɛtra tsia anyankpʋsatɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: All their plans to harm you will come to nothing.
text: Nɩ bosuan fʋsʋ, ntɛ kʋsʋ fʋsʋ a, bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ.

ref: You will make them run away by shooting your arrows at their faces.
text: Fɔ́wa amʋ́ ifu, bɛ́srɩ; tsufɛ fɔ́pʋ fʋ ɔbɩn sʋta amʋ́.

ref: Show your strength, Lord, so that we may sing and praise your power.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn sʋ, aha bʋtsu fʋ fʋa. Fʋ hayinhɛgyi sʋ abɔ́wa ɩlʋ, da akwɛ kanfʋ fʋ.

ref: My God, my God, why have you deserted me? Why are you so far away? Won't you listen to my groans and come to my rescue?
text: Mɩ Bulu, mɩ Bulu, ntogyi sʋ fakpa mɩ ɔma? Nasu kpoli fʋ nwɛsʋ, tamɛ mɩ Ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, fawa ɩfɔ mɩ wa.

ref: I cry out day and night, but you don't answer, and I can never rest.
text: Mɩ Bulu, ntokpoli fʋ ɔyɩkɛhɛ, fʋtamanu mɩ isu. Ntamasi fʋ kpoli onye, tamɛ ɩwɩ molwii mɩ.

ref: Yet you are the holy God, ruling from your throne and praised by Israel.
text: Tamɛ fʋ mʋ́ fʋna ɔtsan. Israelfɔ kanfʋ gyi fʋ obia.

ref: Our ancestors trusted you, and you rescued them.
text: Fʋsʋ anɩ anain bɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka. Bɛdɩnka ansɩ fʋsʋ, fɛlɛ amʋ́ tsu ɩkplantɔ.

ref: When they cried out for help, you saved them, and you did not let them down when they depended on you.
text: Fʋ bosu kpoli, fɛlɛ amʋ́. Fʋsʋ bɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka, pɛlɩ mɛkɩta amʋ́.

ref: But I am merely a worm, far less than human, and I am hated and rejected by people everywhere.
text: Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, nyambi ngyi. Mmegyi nyankpʋsa. Ɩwɩ nyankɩla ngyi ha anyankpʋsa. Ɔhaa tamafia mɩ.

ref: Everyone who sees me makes fun and sneers. They shake their heads,
text: Ɔhagyiɔha owun mɩ ɔtɔbwɛ mɩ ɔblɔla. Bʋtenyankpa ansɩtɔ, kpʋkpʋ nwuntɔ, blɩ bɛɛ,

ref: and say, “Trust the Lord! If you are his favorite, let him protect you and keep you safe.”
text: “Mʋ ansɩ dɩn Nana Bulusʋ, ɔhɔ mʋ. Mʋ ansɩ tegyi mʋ ɩwɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛ mʋ!”

ref: You, Lord, brought me safely through birth, and you protected me when I was a baby at my mother's breast.
text: Fʋlɛlɛ mɩ tsu mɩ yin opunitɔ. Fɛha nɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ brɛá ndenyɔpʋ.

ref: From the day I was born, I have been in your care, and from the time of my birth, you have been my God.
text: Besi mɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ tsu brɛá bɔkwɩɩ mɩ. Tsu mɩ yin iputɔ ɔpá fʋgyi mɩ Bulu.

ref: Don't stay far off when I am in trouble with no one to help me.
text: Máwa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ, tsufɛ ɩkplan latʋ mɩ ta. Ɔhɔpʋ má mɩ ɩnʋ.

ref: Enemies are all around like a herd of wild bulls. Powerful bulls from Bashan are everywhere.
text: Mɩ alupʋ bakafia mɩ, fɛ nnantswie yinhɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ. Basan ɔmátɔ nnantswieá bʋbʋ ifu babomli mɩ.

ref: My enemies are like lions roaring and attacking with jaws open wide.
text: Mɩ alupʋ anfɩ bayaa ɔnɔ gblaun wa mɩ. Fɛ gyata ɔtrapʋ dekpoun, ɔdɛ ɔbwɩá alakɩta tɩtɩ.

ref: I have no more strength than a few drops of water. All my bones are out of joint; my heart is like melted wax.
text: Mɩ ntsantsin yɔyɔɔyɔ, fɛ ntsu batsɛɩ wʋlɩ. Mɩ ɩklʋn labwɛ fɛ okpin, ɩlaŋlaɩn wa mɩ ɩwɩtɔ.

ref: Brutal enemies attack me like a pack of dogs, tearing at my hands and my feet.
text: Akɩaɩ bakafia mɩ. Aha lalahɛ bada ɔbʋn wa mɩ. Amʋ́ ayín lafuti mɩ ɩbɩ pʋ́ mɩ ayabi fɛ gyata.

ref: I can count all my bones, and my enemies just stare and sneer at me.
text: Nɛ́talɩ kla mɩ awú fɛ́ɛ́. Mɩ alupʋ bówun mɩ, lɛ ansɩ yi mɩsʋ.

ref: They took my clothes and gambled for them.
text: ­­Beye mɩ atadɩɛ ha aba, bɔtswɩ abi mɩ atadɩɛ tɩntɩnsʋ.

ref: Don't stay far away, Lord! My strength comes from you, so hurry and help.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, máwa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ, mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn ɔwapʋ, wa ɔsa bɔhɔ mɩ.

ref: Rescue me from enemy swords and save me from those dogs.
text: Hɔ mɩ lɛ ɔdayi ɔnɔ. Hɔ mɩ ɔkla ɔkʋkʋnʋ ɔkʋlɛ lɛ akɩaɩ anfɩ ɩbɩ.

ref: Don't let lions eat me. You rescued me from the horns of wild bulls,
text: Lɛ mɩ tsu agyata anfɩ ɔnɔ. Tsú akpokpo anfɩ bʋbʋ ɩyɩn anfɩ nsiebi ɔnɔ.

ref: and when your people meet, I will praise you, Lord.
text: Nɛ́kla fʋ bwɛhɛ suna mɩ apio. Nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.

ref: All who worship the Lord, now praise him! You belong to Jacob's family and to the people of Israel, so fear and honor the Lord!
text: Nana Bulu ifu anyapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ. Yakob abi-aná, mlɩwa mʋ numnyam. Israel abi-aná, mlɩbu mʋ.

ref: The Lord doesn't hate or despise the helpless in all of their troubles. When I cried out, he listened and did not turn away.
text: Tsufɛ ɔtamakɩ ohiani mʋ ipian owunkɛ, ki nwun. Ɔtamadamli ɔma ha mʋ. Osu kpoli mʋ a, ɔtɔsɔ mʋ ɔnɔ.

ref: When your people meet, you will fill my heart with your praises, Lord, and everyone will see me keep my promises to you.
text: Fʋtɛha ntɛkanfʋ fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ. Nɛ́ka fʋ ɩkɔá notsula fʋ ifu anyapʋ ansɩtɔ.

ref: The poor will eat and be full, and all who worship you will be thankful and live in hope.
text: Aha ánɩ́ bʋma tɔtɔ bégyi mwɛ. Fʋ adunkapʋ bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ. Ɩwa alɛ ha amʋ́ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́!

ref: Everyone on this earth will remember you, Lord. People all over the world will turn and worship you,
text: Nana Bulu, ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kaɩn fʋsʋ, damli kɩ fʋ. Abusuangyiabusuan bósum fʋ.

ref: because you are in control, the ruler of all nations.
text: Tsufɛ Nana Bulu bʋ iwiegyi. Mʋdɛ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi.

ref: All who are rich and have more than enough will bow down to you, Lord. Even those who are dying and almost in the grave will come and bow down.
text: Ɔyɩtɔ ɩwɩ atsupʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ba ɩwɩasɩ sum mʋ. Aha ánɩ́ bowun ánɩ́ bʋmɛ́ɛtalɩ hɔ amʋ́ ɩwɩ nkpa fɛ́ɛ́, pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bóbowu bóbun sum mʋ.

ref: In the future, everyone will worship and learn about you, our Lord.
text: Abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́ bósum mʋ. Bɛ́blɩ mʋ ɩwɩ asʋn suna amʋ́ aná.

ref: People not yet born will be told, “The Lord has saved us!”
text: Bɛ́da mʋ yilebwɛ ɔkan suna aha ánɩ́ bɛ́bɛlɩn ánɩ́ mʋlabwɛ.

ref: You, Lord, are my shepherd. I will never be in need.
text: Nana Bulu gyi mɩ ɔkpapʋ. Tɔtɔ mɛdɛ mɩ hian.

ref: You let me rest in fields of green grass. You lead me to streams of peaceful water,
text: Ɔtɛkpa mɩ yɔtswɩ atɔ ogyikpa ɩfa mlɔɔtɔ. Ɔtɛkpa mɩ ya ntsuá ɩdɛtsʋn pʋtɔɔ ɔnɔ.

ref: and you refresh my life. You are true to your name, and you lead me along the right paths.
text: Ɔtɛlawa mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. Ɔtɛkpa mɩ tsʋn ɔkpa wanklaansʋ, mʋ ɩdatɔ.

ref: I may walk through valleys as dark as death, but I won't be afraid. You are with me, and your shepherd's rod makes me feel safe.
text: Nɩ nna tsonkolitɔ, oklun tuuntɔ kʋraa a, ntamanya tɔtɔ ifu. Tsufɛ fʋbʋ mɩ wa. Fʋtɔpʋ fʋ okpetin pʋ́ fʋ oyi yiahɛ gyo mɩ ɩwɩ, ɩklʋn tolwii mɩ.

ref: You treat me to a feast, while my enemies watch. You honor me as your guest, and you fill my cup until it overflows.
text: Fatswɩ ɔpʋnʋ mɩ alupʋ ansɩtɔ ha mɩ. Faklɩ mɩ aba. Mɩ onunwe labʋla, idetsitsa.

ref: Your kindness and love will always be with me each day of my life, and I will live forever in your house, Lord.
text: Ee, yile mʋ́a ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bóbuo mɩ, mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Fʋ woyi ɔbɔ́bwɛ mɩ otsiakpa mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: The earth and everything on it, including its people, belong to the Lord. The world and its people belong to him.
text: Nana Bulu bʋ ɔsʋlʋ pʋ́ mʋ́sʋ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Ɔyɩ mʋ́a mʋ́tɔ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyi mʋ klɛ.

ref: The Lord placed it all on the oceans and rivers.
text: Tsufɛ ɔlɔwa ɔyɩ ntswɩasɩ dɩnka ɔpʋsʋ, oleyi mʋ́ dɩnka ntsusʋ.

ref: Who may climb the Lord's hill or stand in his holy temple?
text: Ma ɔbɔ́dʋ Nana Bulu ɩbʋ amʋ? Ma ɔbɛ́lɩɩ mʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ?

ref: Only those who do right for the right reasons, and don't worship idols or tell lies under oath.
text: Ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ ɩbɩ fʋtʋʋ, mʋ ɩklʋntɔ lɛtɩn; ɔtamatswɛ ɩkpɩ, ntɛ pʋ ɔnɔlɩ ka ntam.

ref: The Lord God, who saves them, will bless and reward them,
text: Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ Nana Bulu obóyula. Mʋ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu ɔbɛ́ha asʋ.

ref: because they worship and serve the God of Jacob.
text: Aha anfɩ gyi aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ Nana Bulu dunka, bʋdekleá bówun Yakob Bulu amʋ nɩ. Ɩya.

ref: Open the ancient gates, so that the glorious king may come in.
text: Bulu ɔtswɛkpa aklʋn, mlɩfinki. Bɩmbɩ ɔpá aklʋn, mlɩfinki ɩwɩ, Numnyam Owie obitiwie.

ref: Who is this glorious king? He is our Lord, a strong and mighty warrior.
text: Ma gyi Numnyam Owie anfɩ? Mʋgyi Nana Bulu, ɔha yinhɛ pʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn mʋ wie. Nana Bulu, ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ otumipʋ amʋ.

ref: Open the ancient gates, so that the glorious king may come in.
text: Bulu ɔtswɛkpa aklʋn, mlɩfinki. Bɩmbɩ ɔpá aklʋn, mlɩfinki ɩwɩ, Numnyam Owie obitiwie.

ref: Who is this glorious king? He is our Lord, the All-Powerful!
text: Ma gyi Numnyam Owie anfɩ? Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu, gyi Numnyam Owie amʋ nɩ. Ɩya.

ref: I offer you my heart, Lord God,
text: Oo! Nana Bulu, fʋsʋ napʋ mɩ ɩklʋn dɩnka.

ref: and I trust you. Don't make me ashamed or let enemies defeat me.
text: Oo! mɩ Bulu, fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn. Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ. Máha ansɩ igyi mɩ alupʋ mɩ sʋ.

ref: Don't disappoint any of your worshipers, but disappoint all deceitful liars.
text: Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Aha ánɩ́ bʋtamagyi amʋ́ asʋn blɩhɛsʋ mboun pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta.

ref: Show me your paths and teach me to follow;
text: Oo Nana Bulu, ha mɩ ambɩ fʋ ɩkpa. Suna mɩ fʋ ɔtsʋnkpa.

ref: guide me by your truth and instruct me. You keep me safe, and I always trust you.
text: Kpa mɩ ambuo fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ, afʋsuna mɩ atɔ, tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu. Fʋ ansɩtɔ ndɛkɩ ɔyɩkɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Please, Lord, remember, you have always been patient and kind.
text: Anɩ Wie Bulu, kaɩn fʋ nwewun pʋ́ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔkasʋ, tsufɛ ɩbʋ nʋ tsu bɩmbɩ ɔpá.

ref: Forget each wrong I did when I was young. Show how truly kind you are and remember me.
text: Nana Bulu, mákaɩn mɩ nyebitɔ lakpan mʋ́a mɩ bwɛhɛ lalahɛ. Mboun fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ wanklaan sʋ kaɩn mɩsʋ.

ref: You are honest and merciful, and you teach sinners how to follow your path.
text: Ɔha wanklaan Nana Bulu gyi. Mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa. Mʋ́ sʋ otosuna lakpan abwɛpʋ ɔkpa.

ref: You lead humble people to do what is right and to stay on your path.
text: Ɔtɛkpa ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ, bʋtɔbwɛ yile. Otosuna amʋ́ mʋ ɔkpa.

ref: In everything you do, you are kind and faithful to everyone who keeps our agreement with you.
text: Nana Bulu ɩkpa fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka mʋ́a ɔnɔkwalɩ, ha mʋ ntam pʋ́ ɔnɔá ɔlɛlɛsʋ agyipʋ.

ref: Be true to your name, Lord, by forgiving each one of my terrible sins.
text: Oo Nana Bulu! Fʋ ɩda sʋ si mɩ lalahɛ kie mɩ. Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá ilomoni dʋbɩ.

ref: You will show the right path to all who worship you.
text: Ma tenya Nana Bulu ifu? Mʋgyi ɔha ánɩ́ Nana Bulu tosuna ɔtsʋnkpa.

ref: Then they will have plenty, and their children will receive the land.
text: Mʋ obétsia ɔdwɛtɔ, mʋ abi-aná bégyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ.

ref: Our Lord, you are the friend of your worshipers, and you make an agreement with all of us.
text: Nana Bulu tɛlɛ mʋ nwuntɔ asʋn suna mʋ ifu anyapʋ. Ɔtɛha bʋtɛbɩ mʋ ntam.

ref: I always look to you, because you rescue me from every trap.
text: Mɩ ansɩ dɩn Nana Bulusʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, tsufɛ mʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ ayabi lɛ ayibitɔ.

ref: I am lonely and troubled. Show that you care and have pity on me.
text: Damli ansɩ kɩ mɩ, afʋwun mɩ nwɛ. Tsufɛ ɔbakʋlɛ ngyi. Mɩ ɩla bʋ nwɛ.

ref: My awful worries keep growing. Rescue me from sadness.
text: Nwɛla ɩtɔ mɩ klʋntɔ. Lɛ mɩ tsu mɩ ɩkplantɔ.

ref: See my troubles and misery and forgive my sins.
text: Kɩ mɩ ɩkplan pʋ́ mɩ asʋn wunhɛ, afʋsi mɩ lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́ kie mɩ.

ref: Look at all my enemies! See how much they hate me.
text: Kɩ alɩá mɩ alupʋ bʋhɩɛ bʋtsɔ, bapʋ owuntɔlɩn bʋdɛ mɩ lu.

ref: I come to you for shelter. Protect me, keep me safe, and don't disappoint me.
text: Kpla mɩ ɔkla wa ɩwɩtɔ, afʋlɛ mɩ. Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ, tsufɛ fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ.

ref: I obey you with all my heart, and I trust you, knowing that you will save me.
text: Fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn, gyo mɩ ɩwɩ; tsufɛ mɩ asʋn da ɔkpa, ɔlala ma mɩ ɩwɩ.

ref: Our God, please save Israel from all its troubles.
text: Oo Bulu, lɛ Israelfɔ lɛ amʋ́ ɩkplan fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.

ref: Show that I am right, Lord! I stay true to myself, and I have trusted you without doubting.
text: Nana Bulu, gyi mɩ asʋn ha mɩ; tsufɛ ɔlala ma mɩ ɩwɩ. Fʋsʋ nɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka, mmɛkɩ gyɔpɩ ntɛ bɩna.

ref: Test my thoughts and find out what I am like.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, sɔ mɩ kɩ. Kɩ mɩ klʋntɔ, afʋkɩ mɩ nwuntɔ.

ref: I never forget your kindness, and I am always faithful to you.
text: Tsufɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka igya mɩ nkpa, nna fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.

ref: I don't spend my time with worthless liars
text: Mɩa afunupʋ anɩtamanatɩ. Mmobuo apinabwɛbi abwɛpʋ.

ref: or go with evil crowds.
text: Ntekisi aha lalahɛ ofiakpa yɔ. Mɩa lalahɛ abwɛpʋ anɩtamatsia.

ref: I wash my hands, Lord, to show my innocence, and I worship at your altar,
text: Nana Bulu, ntɔfwɩ ɩbɩ pʋsuna ánɩ́ lalahɛ kʋkʋ ma mɩ ɩwɩ, asa ntɛba bobomli fʋ afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ,

ref: while gratefully singing about your wonders.
text: wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ kʋklʋkʋʋ, pʋlɛ fʋ ofula fɛ́ɛ́ suna.

ref: I love the temple where you live, and where your glory shines.
text: Nana Bulu, fʋ woyitɔ, igyi fʋ numnyam otsiakpa bʋ mɩ ɔdwɛ.

ref: or full of meanness or who bribe others.
text: Amʋ́gyi aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔgywɩɩn lalahɛ, ŋaintɔ-atɔhɔ labʋla amʋ́ gyɔpɩ.

ref: I stay true to myself. Be kind and rescue me.
text: Mɩ mʋ́ ɔlala ma mɩ ɩwɩ. Gyi mɩ bʋalɛ, afʋhɔ mɩ.

ref: Now I stand on solid ground! And when your people meet, I will praise you, Lord.
text: Nlɩɩ ɔtantasʋ. Nɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.

ref: You, Lord, are the light that keeps me safe. I am not afraid of anyone. You protect me, and I have no fears.
text: Nana Bulu tɔwankɩ mɩ ɔkpasʋ, ɔtɔhɔ mɩ nkpa. Ma nénya ifu? Nana Bulu ntɛsrɩ tanʋ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Ma ɔbɛ́ha opuni bétsii mɩ?

ref: Brutal people may attack and try to kill me, but they will stumble. Fierce enemies may attack, but they will fall.
text: Nɩ aha lalahɛ, alupʋ pʋ́ adʋn bɔkʋsʋ bɛɛ bɔ́wɩ mɩ a, bósutin dɩda kpla.

ref: Armies may surround me, but I won't be afraid; war may break out, but I will trust you.
text: Ɩsa akɔpʋ bɛkafia mɩ kʋraa a, opuni méetsii mɩ. Nɩ ɩsa ɩda mɩsʋ kʋraa a, nɔ́pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ.

ref: I ask only one thing, Lord: Let me live in your house every day of my life to see how wonderful you are and to pray in your temple.
text: Toku kʋlɛ pɛ ndɛ Nana Bulu kʋlɩ. Mʋ́ ɔkpa négya. Mʋ́gyi; nétsia mʋ woyitɔ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́, pʋ mɩ ansibi wun alɩá ɔbʋ alɛ, gywɩɩn mʋ́ ɩwɩ mʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ.

ref: In times of trouble, Lord, you will protect me. You will hide me in your tent and keep me safe on top of a mighty rock.
text: Tsufɛ ɔbɔ́pʋ mɩ ŋain mʋ otsiakpa mɩ ɔkplankɛ. Obéŋain mɩ mʋ woyitɔ. Obótsu mɩ dɩnka ɩbʋta fʋahɛsʋ, mɛnɩ mɩ alupʋ bʋméenya mɩ.

ref: You will let me defeat all my enemies. Then I will celebrate, as I enter your tent with animal sacrifices and songs of praise.
text: Mʋ́ sʋ négyi adʋn amʋʋ bɛkafia mɩ klinklin amʋsʋ. Nɔ́pʋ ansigyi bɔ afɔdɩɛ mʋ otsiakpa. Nɔ́pʋ ɔmɛá ɩbʋ anulɛ wa ɩlʋ, da ɔsankuo ha mʋ.

ref: Please listen when I pray! Have pity. Answer my prayer.
text: Nana Bulu, nosu kpoli fʋ kʋklʋkʋʋ a, nu. Wun mɩ nwɛ, afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.

ref: My heart tells me to pray. I am eager to see your face,
text: Mɩ ɩklʋn ɔbɛɛ, “Dunka mʋ!” Mʋ́ mbɛɛ, “Nana Bulu, fʋ ndedunka.”

ref: so don't hide from me. I am your servant, Lord, and you have helped me. Don't turn from me in anger. You alone keep me safe. Don't reject or desert me.
text: Mápʋ ansɩtɔ ŋain mɩ. Mápʋ ɔblɔ wuta mɩ fʋ osumbi tɛɩa fʋ ɩwɩ. Fʋgyi mɩ ɔbʋapʋ. Mátswɩ mɩ tsalɩfwɩ. Mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, mákpa mɩ ɔma.

ref: Even if my father and mother should desert me, you will take care of me.
text: Tsufɛ mɩ sɩ mʋa mɩ yin basi mɩ tswɩ, tamɛ Nana Bulu mʋ́ ɔbɔ́hɔ mɩ.

ref: Teach me to follow, Lord, and lead me on the right path because of my enemies.
text: Nana Bulu, mɩ alupʋ sʋ suna mɩ fʋ ɔkpa, afʋkpa mɩ tsʋn ɔkpa tswiihɛsʋ.

ref: Don't let them do to me what they want. People tell lies about me and make violent threats,
text: Mási mɩ, ankpa wie mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ, tsufɛ adansɩfɔ afunupʋ bakʋsʋ mɩsʋ, bʋdɛ mɩ huna.

ref: but I know I will live to see how kind you are.
text: Nahogyiá nówun Nana Bulu alɛ asa nówu.

ref: Trust the Lord! Be brave and strong and trust the Lord.
text: Dɩnka ansɩ Nana Bulusʋ, afʋwa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. Nya ɩklʋn, afʋkɩ Nana Bulu ɔkpa!

ref: Only you, Lord, are a mighty rock! Don't refuse to help me when I pray. If you don't answer me, I will soon be dead.
text: Mɩ ɔtanʋkpa Nana Bulu, fʋ ndesu kpoli. Mátila asʋ. Nɩ fɛkpa ɔnɔ bun a, nɔ́bwɛ fɛ ɔha wuhɛ.

ref: Please listen to my prayer and my cry for help, as I lift my hands toward your holy temple.
text: Nɩ nosu kpoli fʋ a, wun mɩ nwɛ. Nɩ nɛtɩnkɩ ɩbɩ sɩsɩ fʋ ɔwankɩkpatɔ-ɔwankɩkpa ɩnʋ a, nu mɩ kokoli.

ref: Don't drag me away, Lord, with those cruel people, who speak kind words, while planning trouble.
text: Mábɩtɩa mɩ tsɩa lalahɛ agyipʋ, lakpan abwɛpʋ anfɩtɔ natɩ. Amʋ́a amʋ́ aba bɛkan wanklaan, tamɛ amʋ́ ɩklʋntɔ tepi ma alɛ.

ref: They don't pay any attention to your wonderful deeds. Now you will destroy them and leave them in ruin.
text: Tsufɛ bʋtamawun mʋ atɔ bwɛhɛ pʋ́ mʋ ɩbɩ ɔnɔ gyumagyihɛ. Obóbwiebwie amʋ́ bun, ɔmɛ́ɛtra lapwɛ amʋ́ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: I praise you, Lord, for answering my prayers.
text: Ɩkanfʋ ɩbwɛ Nana Bulu klɛ, tsufɛ alanu mɩ isu.

ref: You are my strong shield, and I trust you completely. You have helped me, and I will celebrate and thank you in song.
text: Nana Bulu gyi mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. Mʋtegyi ɩban wa mɩ. Mʋsʋ mɩ ɩklʋn dɩn, ɔtɔbʋa mɩ. Ansigyi labʋla mɩ ɩklʋn, napʋ mɩ ɩlʋ ndɛ mʋ ɩpan da.

ref: You give strength to your people, Lord, and you save and protect your chosen ones.
text: Nana Bulu tɔwa mʋ ɔmá ɔwʋnlɩn. Mʋgyi ɔtanʋkpa ha mʋ owieá alada ofuli.

ref: Come save us and bless us. Be our shepherd and always carry us in your arms.
text: Nana Bulu, hɔ fʋ ɔmá! Ha ɩwa alɛ ha fʋ aha, bʋgyi fʋ ogyikpa amʋ. Bwɛ amʋ́ ɔkpapʋ, afʋtsu amʋ́ pia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: All you angels in heaven, honor the glory and power of the Lord!
text: Ɔsʋsʋ atumipʋ, mlɩkanfʋ Nana Bulu. Mlɩpʋ numnyam mʋ́a ɔwʋnlɩn ha mʋ.

ref: Honor the wonderful name of the Lord, and worship the Lord most holy and glorious.
text: Nana Bulu ɩda bʋ numnyam, mlɩkanfʋ mʋ. Mlɩda akpawunu ha mʋ, tsufɛ mʋ nkʋlɛ lɔwankɩ.

ref: The voice of the Lord echoes over the oceans. The glorious Lord God thunders above the roar of the raging sea,
text: Nana Bulu ɔmɛ lalɩn ɔpʋsʋ. Numnyam Bulu ɔmɛ lapʋtɩ fɛ ɔprada. Nana Bulu ɔmɛ lapʋtɩ ntsu akpɔnkpɔntɩsʋ.

ref: and his voice is mighty and marvelous.
text: Mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn, ɩbʋ numnyam.

ref: The voice of the Lord destroys the cedar trees; the Lord shatters cedars on Mount Lebanon.
text: Mʋ ɔmɛ tebiabia Lebanon ndum. Itebiabia Lebanon odum akpɔnkpɔntɩ blublublu.

ref: God makes Mount Lebanon skip like a calf and Mount Hermon jump like a wild ox.
text: Ɔtɛha Lebanon abʋ tofuli kpayi fɛ okufabi. Sirion ɩbʋ ɛ tofuli kpayi fɛ ɔkpalabi.

ref: The voice of the Lord makes lightning flash
text: Mʋ ɔmɛ ɩpʋtɩ a, ogya tɛdalɩ.

ref: and the desert tremble. And because of the Lord, the desert near Kadesh shivers and shakes.
text: Mʋ ɔmɛ tɔpʋtɩ kpɩnkɩ adimbi ɔsʋlʋ. Ɩtɛkpɩnkɩ Kades adimbi ɔsʋlʋ ɛ.

ref: The voice of the Lord makes deer give birth before their time. Forests are stripped of leaves, and the temple is filled with shouts of praise.
text: Nana Bulu ɔmɛ tɔpʋtɩ fiala ndum. Ɩtɛkpakpa nyi atɛ. Mʋ ɔtswɛkpa atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtɔkplʋn blɩ bɛɛ, “Onumnyampʋ!”

ref: The Lord rules on his throne, king of the flood forever.
text: Nana Bulu dɛ iwiegyi ntsu bʋlahɛsʋ. Otsie mʋ owie obiasʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Pray that our Lord will make us strong and give us peace.
text: Nana Bulu tɔwa mʋ ɔmá ɔwʋnlɩn, ɔtɔpʋ iwilwii yula amʋ́.

ref: I will praise you, Lord! You saved me from the grave and kept my enemies from celebrating my death.
text: O Nana Bulu, nótsu fʋ fʋa, tsufɛ fʋlalɛ mɩ, fʋmɛha mɩ alupʋ abʋmɔsɩ mɩ.

ref: I prayed to you, Lord God, and you healed me,
text: Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, nosu tɩ fʋ fɛtsa mɩ ɩlɔ.

ref: saving me from death and the grave.
text: Nana Bulu, fʋlɛlɛ mɩ tsu afulitɔ; fetsinki mɩ, mmowie ɔbɔtɔ.

ref: Your faithful people, Lord, will praise you with songs and honor your holy name.
text: Mlɩá mlɩtamakpa mʋ ɔma, mlɩwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ ɩda, tsufɛ mlɩyin ánɩ́ ogyi ɔtsan.

ref: Your anger lasts a little while, but your kindness lasts for a lifetime. At night we may cry, but when morning comes we will celebrate.
text: Tsufɛ Bulu ɔblɔ tamawa ɔpá. Mʋ awɩtɔlɛ ɩtsɔ ɔha nkpatsiatɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Ɔha tosu onye, tamɛ ɔtɛlamɔsɩ nyankɩ.

ref: I felt secure and thought, “I'll never be shaken!”
text: Brɛá ɩlɔwa alɛ ha mɩ a, nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Tɔtɔ mɛ́ɛtalɩ mɩ.”

ref: You, Lord, were my friend, and you made me strong as a mighty mountain. But when you hid your face, I was crushed.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ awɩtɔlɛ laha nlɩɩ kinkiinkin fɛ ɩbʋ. Tamɛ brɛá fɔpʋ fʋ ansɩtɔ ŋain a, opuni letsii mɩ.

ref: I prayed to you, Lord, and in my prayer I said,
text: Nana Bulu, fʋ nosu kpoli. Mɩ Wie, nokokoli fʋ mbɛɛ,

ref: “What good will it do you if I am in the grave? Once I have turned to dust, how can I praise you or tell how loyal you are?
text: “Ntɔ labi mɩ lowu ɩbɔ́wa ha fʋ nɩ nɔyɔ afulitɔ? Mɩ ɩsɩ bɛ́talɩ kanfʋ fʋ? Ɩbɛ́talɩ da fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔkan?

ref: You have turned my sorrow into joyful dancing. No longer am I sad and wearing sackcloth.
text: Faha mɩ isu lamli ɩtsa. Fakpa tati bibi lɛ mɩ ɩwɩ, pʋ ansigyi dɩda mɩ.

ref: I thank you from my heart, and I will never stop singing your praises, my Lord and my God.
text: Mɛnɩ mɩ ɔkla ɔmɛ́ɛkpa ɔnɔ bun, si ɩlʋ wa kanfʋ fʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: I come to you, Lord, for protection. Don't let me be ashamed. Do as you have promised and rescue me.
text: Nana Bulu, fʋ nasrɩ tanʋ. Máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Yile ɔbwɛpʋ fʋgyi, sʋ hɔ mɩ.

ref: Listen to my prayer and hurry to save me. Be my mighty rock and the fortress where I am safe.
text: Yaa asʋ ha mɩ, afʋwa ɔsa lɛ mɩ! Bwɛ mɩ ɩbʋta ánɩ́ nɛ́srɩ tanʋ. Oŋainkpa kpikpliá ɩbɔ́hɔ mɩ nkpa.

ref: You, Lord God, are my mighty rock and my fortress. Lead me and guide me, so that your name will be honored.
text: Fʋgyi mɩ ɩbʋta pʋ́ mɩ oŋainkpa kpikpli. Fʋ ɩda sʋ gya mɩ nkpa, afʋkpa mɩ.

ref: Protect me from hidden traps and keep me safe.
text: Lɛ mɩ lɛ yibiá bafɩnɩ mɩtɔ, tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa.

ref: You are faithful, and I trust you because you rescued me.
text: Napʋ mɩ ɔŋɛ wa fʋ ɩbɩtɔ. Oo! Nana Bulu, Bulu Ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ, fahɔ mɩ.

ref: I hate the worshipers of worthless idols, but I trust you, Lord.
text: Ntekisi ɩkpɩ atswɛpʋ. Mɩ mʋ́ ntɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋ Nana Bulusʋ.

ref: I celebrate and shout because you are kind. You saw all my suffering, and you cared for me.
text: Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ ɩwɩ bɛ́sankɩ mɩ, nénya ansigyi. Tsufɛ fawun mɩ ɩkplantɔ, fabɩ mɩ asʋn wunhɛ.

ref: You kept me from the hands of my enemies, and you set me free.
text: Fʋmɔkʋsi mɩ wa mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ. Mboun fapʋ mɩ lɩɩ ɔtɛɩkpa.

ref: Have pity, Lord! I am hurting and almost blind. My whole body aches.
text: Ao Nana Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ, tsufɛ mbʋ ɩkplantɔ. Nasu punya ansibi, ɔŋɛ lata mɩ.

ref: I have known only sorrow all my life long, and I suffer year after year. I am weak from sin, and my bones are limp.
text: Isu lagyi mɩ nkpasʋ. Nawa nwɛ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Mɩ lakpan sʋ ɔŋɛ lata mɩ, awútɔ labwiebwie mɩ.

ref: My enemies insult me. Neighbors are even worse, and I disgust my friends. People meet me on the street, and they turn and run.
text: Mɩ alupʋ sʋ namli tɔá ɩbʋ nyanya. Nabwɛ ɔfɔɔ mɩ aba ansɩtɔ. Aha bowun mɩ brɔnʋsʋ bʋsrɩ.

ref: I am completely forgotten like someone dead. I am merely a broken dish.
text: Batan mɩsʋ fɛ ɔha wuhɛ. Namli fɛ planfɔ.

ref: I hear the crowds whisper, “Everyone is afraid!” They are plotting and scheming to murder me.
text: Nanu mɩ ɩwɩ afunu tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá aha bʋdɛwa. Tɔá ɩbʋ ifu labomli mɩ. Bakan mɩsʋ ánɩ́ bɛ́ka mɩ nkpa itin.

ref: But I trust you, Lord, and I claim you as my God.
text: Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, Oo Nana Bulu, fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn. Ndɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Fʋgyi mɩ Bulu.”

ref: My life is in your hands. Save me from enemies who hunt me down.
text: Mɩ nkpa bʋ fʋ ɩbɩtɔ. Lɛ mɩ tsu mɩ alupʋ pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: Smile on me, your servant. Have pity and rescue me.
text: Wa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ, fʋ osumbi. Pʋ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka hɔ mɩ.

ref: I pray only to you. Don't disappoint me. Disappoint my cruel enemies until they lie silent in their graves.
text: Nana Bulu, máha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta mɩ. Tsufɛ fʋ ndekpoli. Pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha lalahɛ, abʋkpa ɔnɔ bun yɔ afulitɔ.

ref: Silence those proud liars! Make them stop bragging and insulting your people.
text: Bʋtotsu ɩwɩ, bʋtɔtɔɩ aha yilesʋ, nya amʋ́ nyanya. Mʋ́ sʋ kpa amʋ́ ɔnɔ bun.

ref: You are wonderful, and while everyone watches, you store up blessings for all who honor and trust you.
text: Atɔ wanklaan ánɩ́ fapʋyaɩ fʋ ifu anyapʋ lɔkʋkʋ moni o. Fapʋha fʋ atanʋpʋ aha ansɩtɔ.

ref: You are their shelter from harmful plots, and you are their protection from vicious gossip.
text: Féŋain amʋ́ fʋ wa si aha ánɩ́ basusu amʋ́sʋ, lɛ amʋ́ lɛ ɩla alɛpʋ ɔnɔ.

ref: I will praise you, Lord, for showing great kindness when I was like a city under attack.
text: Ɩkanfʋ ɩbwɛ Nana Bulu klɛ, tsufɛ ɔlɛhɩɛ lɛ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka suna mɩ brɛá adʋn bɛkafia mɩ wulu, mma tɔtɔ bwɛtɔ.

ref: I was terrified and thought, “They've chased me far away from you!” But you answered my prayer when I shouted for help.
text: Ɩnʋ opuni letsii mɩ nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Alasi mɩ wa ɔkpa”, tamɛ brɛá nosu kpoli mʋ a, olonu mɩ ɔmɛ.

ref: All who belong to the Lord, show how you love him. The Lord protects the faithful, but he severely punishes everyone who is proud.
text: Aha ánɩ́ mlɩtamakpa Nana Bulu ɔma fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩdwɛ mʋ. Bulu tɛkpakpa ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ ɩwɩsʋ ipi, tamɛ ɔtɛhɩɛ bɩtɩ ɩwɩ atsupʋ ɩsʋ.

ref: All who trust the Lord, be cheerful and strong.
text: Mlɩ aha ánɩ́ mlɩdɛ Nana Bulu ɔkpa kɩ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩwa ɩwɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, mlɩtomi, amlɩwa ɩklʋn.

ref: Our Lord, you bless everyone whose sins you forgive and wipe away.
text: Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ Bulu lasi mʋ lakpan kie mʋ, bun ansibi mʋ lakpansʋ.

ref: You bless them by saying, “You told me your sins, without trying to hide them, and now I forgive you.”
text: Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ Nana Bulu mɔ́hɔ mʋ lalahɛ, afunu ɩma mʋtɔ.

ref: Before I confessed my sins, my bones felt limp, and I groaned all day long.
text: Tsufɛ brɛá nekina mɩ lakpan lɛ blɩ a, nosu ekekegyiɛkɛ alɩɩ wʋlɩ lɛ akankawu.

ref: Night and day your hand weighed heavily on me, and my strength was gone as in the summer heat.
text: Tsufɛ fɛbɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ ɔpa mʋ́a onye. Ɔŋɛ lɛta mɩ awútɔ, fɛ alɩá ntsu tɛkpɩ awikpanbɩ. Ɩya.

ref: So I confessed my sins and told them all to you. I said, “I'll tell the Lord each one of my sins.” Then you forgave me and took away my guilt.
text: Ɩnʋ nɛlɛ mɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́ bla fʋ. Mmesi kʋkʋ ŋain fʋ. Nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Nɛ́lɛ mɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́ bla Nana Bulu.” Ɩnʋ fesi mɩ ɩsʋbɩtɩ kie mɩ. Ɩya.

ref: We worship you, Lord, and we should always pray whenever we find out that we have sinned. Then we won't be swept away by a raging flood.
text: Mʋ́ sʋ ha aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa fʋ ɔma fɛ́ɛ́ abʋsu kpoli fʋ, brɛá bɛ́talɩ nya fʋ. Mɛnɩ nɩ ntsu ɩbʋla alɩágyialɩá kʋraa a, ɩmɛ́ɛkɩta amʋ́.

ref: You are my hiding place! You protect me from trouble, and you put songs in my heart because you have saved me.
text: Oŋainkpa fʋgyi ha mɩ, fʋtogyo mɩ ɩwɩ ɩkplanbɩ. Falɛ mɩ, pʋ mʋ́ ɩlʋ bomli mɩ. Ɩya.

ref: You said to me, “I will point out the road that you should follow. I will be your teacher and watch over you.
text: Ɩnʋ Nana Bulu lɛblɩ ɔbɛɛ, “Nósuna fʋ asʋn-asɩnu pʋ́ ɔkpa ánɩ́ fɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ. Nɔ́tɔɩ kpla fʋ, kɩ fʋsʋ.

ref: Don't be stupid like horses and mules that must be led with ropes to make them obey.”
text: Mábwɛ fɛ ɔpɔnkɔ ntɛ ɔpɔnsʋraá omeyin tɔtɔ. Nkɛtɩ fapʋ datɔbi mʋ́a mʋ́ ɩwɩ ɔfɛ wa mʋ ɔnɔtɔ, bɩtɩa mʋ asa ɔtɛba fʋ wa.”

ref: All kinds of troubles will strike the wicked, but your kindness shields those who trust you, Lord.
text: Ɔha lalahɛ ipian ɩhɩɛ tsɔ, tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ a, ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka gyi ɩban wa mʋ.

ref: And so your good people should celebrate and shout.
text: Aha yile, mlɩ ansɩ igyi Bulu ɩwɩ, amlɩtswɩ ope. Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa, mlɩkplʋn kanfʋ mʋ.

ref: You are the Lord's people. Obey him and celebrate! He deserves your praise.
text: Yile abwɛpʋ, mlɩwa ɩlʋ ansigyisʋ ha Nana Bulu. Ɩbʋ alɛá aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn ɩda ɔkpa bɛ́kanfʋ mʋ.

ref: Praise the Lord with harps! Use harps with ten strings to make music for him.
text: Mlɩpʋ nsankuo kanfʋ mʋ. Mlɩda ɩfɛ idu ɔsankuo, amlɩwa ɩlʋ dɛdɛ ha mʋ.

ref: Sing a new song. Shout! Play beautiful music.
text: Mlɩwa ɩlʋ pɔpwɛ ha mʋ. Mlɩda ɔsankuo amʋ wanklaan, amlɩkplʋn ansigyisʋ ha mʋ.

ref: The Lord is truthful; he can be trusted.
text: Tsufɛ Nana Bulu asʋn da ɔkpa. Mʋ bwɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́ igyi ɔnɔkwalɩ.

ref: He loves justice and fairness, and he is kind to everyone everywhere on earth.
text: Otekle yilebwɛ pʋ́ asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ. Mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka labʋla ɔyɩ.

ref: The Lord made the heavens and everything in them by his word.
text: Mʋ asʋn blɩhɛ ɔlɔpʋbwɛ ɔsʋsʋ, Ɔnɔ kɛkɛ ɔlɛlɛ, ntsrakpabi fɛ́ɛ́ bɛdalɩ.

ref: He scooped up the ocean and stored the water.
text: Ɔlɛkpla ntsu fɛ́ɛ́ wa tsukʋlɛ bwɛ ɔpʋ. Oletin mʋ́ wa tsukʋlɛ ha mʋ ɩwɩ.

ref: Everyone in this world should worship and honor the Lord!
text: Ɔsʋlʋsʋ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, bʋnya Nana Bulu ifu. Ɔyɩtɔ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, bʋbu mʋ.

ref: As soon as he spoke the world was created; at his command, the earth was formed.
text: Tsufɛ ɔlɛblɩ, ɩlɛba mʋ́tɔ. Ɔlɛlɛ ɔnɔ, ɩlɛlɩɩ kinkiinkin.

ref: The Lord destroys the plans and spoils the schemes of the nations.
text: Nana Bulu tɛha ɔmá-ɔmá asʋn tesin amʋ́ ɔnɔ, oteyinta amʋ́ nhɩhɩɛtɔ.

ref: But what the Lord has planned will stand forever. His thoughts never change.
text: Nana Bulu asʋn mʋ́ ɩda brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Mʋ nhɩhɩɛ ɛ bʋ ɩnʋ yɛtʋ ɔha abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: The Lord blesses each nation that worships only him. He blesses his chosen ones.
text: Ansɩ igyi ɔmá oduá Nana Bulu gyi amʋ́ Bulu. Aha ánɩ́ ɔlɛlɛ pʋ́ amʋ́ bwɛ mʋ ogyikpa.

ref: The Lord looks at the world
text: Otowun atɔ tsu ɔsʋsʋ kein, ɔdɛ anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ wun.

ref: from his throne in heaven, and he watches us all.
text: Otsie mʋ obiasʋ ɔsʋsʋ, ɔdɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́ wun.

ref: The Lord gave us each a mind, and nothing we do can be hidden from him.
text: Mʋlɔbwɛ okugyiɔkʋ ɩklʋn. Mʋ́ sʋ otonu amʋ́ bwɛhɛ asɩ.

ref: Mighty armies alone cannot win wars for a king; great strength by itself cannot keep a soldier safe.
text: Megyi ɩsa akɔpʋ ɔdʋdʋɔ tɛha owie tegyi ɩsʋ. Megyi ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ onuto ɔwʋnlɩn tɛha mʋ ɔtɔyɔ ɩsa ba.

ref: In war the strength of a horse cannot be trusted to take you to safety.
text: Ɔpɔnkɔ megyi tɔtɔ ɩsa ɔkɔkɛ. Mʋ ɔwʋnlɩn kpɔnkpɔntɩ amʋ ɩmɛ́ɛtalɩ hɔ ɩsa ɔkɔpʋ nkpa.

ref: But the Lord watches over all who honor him and trust his kindness.
text: Kɩ, Nana Bulu ansɩ dɩn aha ánɩ́ bʋtobu mʋsʋ. Amʋ́gyi aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ ansɩ dɩn mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔkasʋ.

ref: He protects them from death and starvation.
text: Ɔbɛ́lɛ amʋ́ tsu lowutɔ, hɔ amʋ́ nkpa akʋnbɩ.

ref: We depend on you, Lord, to help and protect us.
text: Anɩdɛ Nana Bulu ɔkpa kɩ. Mʋgyi anɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ anɩ ɩwɩ ɩban.

ref: You make our hearts glad because we trust you, the only God.
text: Mʋ sʋ ansɩ dɛ anɩ gyi, anɩ ansɩ dɩn mʋ ɩda wankɩhɛ amʋsʋ.

ref: Be kind and bless us! We depend on you.
text: Nana Bulu, ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ibuo anɩ, fɛ alɩá anɩ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋ.

ref: I will always praise the Lord.
text: Nɛ́kanfʋ Nana Bulu brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Mʋ kanfʋ mɛ́ɛta mɩ ɔnɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: With all my heart, I will praise the Lord. Let all who are helpless, listen and be glad.
text: Mʋ mɩ ɔkla tɔpʋtsu ɩwɩ. Ipian awunpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋnu, abʋnya ansigyi.

ref: Honor the Lord with me! Celebrate his great name.
text: Mlɩtsa mɩ awa Nana Bulu numnyam. Mlɩba abwɛ ɩkʋlɛ, atsu mʋ ɩda fʋa.

ref: I asked the Lord for help, and he saved me from all my fears.
text: Nosu kpoli Nana Bulu, ɔlɔsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ. Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ tsu ifu kugyikʋtɔ.

ref: Keep your eyes on the Lord! You will shine like the sun and never blush with shame.
text: Aha ánɩ́ bʋtodunka mʋ ansɩtɔ tɛtɩn. Pɛlɩ mɛ́ɛkɩta amʋ́ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: I was a nobody, but I prayed, and the Lord saved me from all my troubles.
text: Ɔwʋlaba anfɩ losu kpoli mʋ, olonu mʋ ɔmɛ, lɛ mʋ tsu mʋ ɩkplan fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.

ref: If you honor the Lord, his angel will protect you.
text: Nana Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ togyo aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya mʋ ifu ɩwɩ, lɛ amʋ́ lɛ ɩkplantɔ.

ref: Discover for yourself that the Lord is kind. Come to him for protection, and you will be glad.
text: Da mʋ ɔnɔ kɩ, afʋbɩ alɩá ɔbʋ ɔdwɛ. Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɛtanʋ mʋ.

ref: Honor the Lord! You are his special people. No one who honors the Lord will ever be in need.
text: Bulu aha, mlɩbu mʋ. Tsufɛ tɔtɔɔtɔ tamahian aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya mʋ ifu.

ref: Young lions may go hungry or even starve, but if you trust the Lord, you will never miss out on anything good.
text: Ɩwɩ tɛklɩ gyata kʋraa, akʋn tɛkɩta mʋ. Tamɛ itoyile kʋkʋ tamahian ɔha ánɩ́ otodunka Nana Bulu.

ref: Come, my children, listen as I teach you to respect the Lord.
text: Mɩ abi, mlɩba. Mlɩyaa asʋ, mɩ ansuna mlɩ alɩá bʋtenya Nana Bulu ifu.

ref: Do you want to live and enjoy a long life?
text: Mlɩtɔ ma dɛ nkpa kle? Ma nkpa tɩntɩn tsia tɛpɛ ansɩ, odekleá obégyi ɔdwɛ mʋ nkpatɔ?

ref: Then don't say cruel things and don't tell lies.
text: Mʋmʋ kɩ fʋ ɔdandʋ, ɩmáblɩ asʋn lalahɛ. Kɩ fʋ ɔnɔ, ɩmáwa afunu.

ref: Do good instead of evil and try to live at peace.
text: Si lakpan bwɛ, afʋbwɛ tɔá ɩbʋ alɛ. Dunka iwilwii, afʋgya mʋ́ ɔkpa.

ref: If you obey the Lord, he will watch over you and answer your prayers.
text: Nana Bulu ansɩ dɩn yile abwɛpʋsʋ, otonu amʋ́ isu.

ref: But God despises evil people, and he will wipe them all from the earth, till they are forgotten.
text: Tamɛ ɔtɔkʋsʋ lɩɩ lalahɛ abwɛpʋsʋ. Ɔbɔ́mɔ amʋ́ lɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ. Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtra kaɩn amʋ́sʋ.

ref: When his people pray for help, he listens and rescues them from their troubles.
text: Yile abwɛpʋ bosu kpoli Nana Bulu a, otonu. Ɔtɛlɛ amʋ́ tsu amʋ́ ɩkplantɔ.

ref: The Lord is there to rescue all who are discouraged and have given up hope.
text: Ɔma ɩfɔ aha ánɩ́ ɩlakpɔn amʋ́ wa. Ɔtɔhɔ aha ánɩ́ ɔkla lasrɩ amʋ́.

ref: The Lord's people may suffer a lot, but he will always bring them safely through.
text: Yile ɔbwɛpʋ asʋn wunhɛ ɩtsɔ, tamɛ Nana Bulu tɛlɛ mʋ lɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ.

ref: Not one of their bones will ever be broken.
