text: Ɔtɛkɩ mʋsʋ, mʋ iwu kʋlɛ kʋraa tamabia.

ref: Wicked people are killed by their own evil deeds, and if you hate God's people you will be punished.
text: Lalahɛ ɔbɔ́mɔ lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ. Bulu ɔbɛ́ha ɔha ánɩ́ otolu yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɩpɔn.

ref: The Lord saves the lives of his servants. Run to him for protection, and you won't be punished.
text: Nana Bulu tɔhɔ mʋ aha nkpa. Ɔtamaha aha ánɩ́ bʋtɛsrɩ tanʋ mʋ ɩpɔn.

ref: Shield me and help me.
text: Kʋsʋ tsu fʋ akɔtɔ, afʋtin amʋ́ ɔkpa!

ref: Aim your spear at everyone who hunts me down, but promise to save me.
text: Tsu ɩkpan afʋfia aha amʋʋ bʋgya mɩ amʋ. Bla mɩ ɔkla fɛɛ, “Mɩgyi fʋ nkpa Ɔhɔpʋ.”

ref: Let all who want to kill me be disgraced and put to shame. Chase away and confuse all who plan to harm me.
text: Sʋpa aha ánɩ́ bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ, pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lalahɛ dunka, abʋyinki ɔma.

ref: Send your angel after them and let them be like straw in the wind.
text: Bʋbwɛ fɛ ntɛtɛá afu dɛ mʋ́ tsʋn, Nana Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ ogya amʋ́.

ref: Make them run in the dark on a slippery road, as your angel chases them.
text: Ɔkpatɔ iklun wa amʋ́. Mʋ́sʋ ɩwa ɔplɩ, Nana Bulu-ɔbɔpʋ ɔsrɩ gya amʋ́.

ref: Surprise them with disaster! Trap them in their own nets and let them fall and rot in the pits they have dug.
text: Ɩkplan ɩtʋ amʋ́, abʋkpa wie amʋ́ onuto ɔbɔ kwihɛ amʋtɔ, abʋda yibi amʋtɔ.

ref: I will celebrate and be joyful because you, Lord, have saved me.
text: Nana Bulu sʋ ansɩ bégyi mɩ. Ɩwɩ bɛ́sankɩ mɩ, tsufɛ alahɔ mɩ nkpa.

ref: Every bone in my body will shout: “No one is like the Lord!” You protect the helpless from those in power; you save the poor and needy from those who hurt them.
text: Nɛ́lɛ mɩ klʋntɔ blɩ mbɛɛ, “Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔma ɔhaa má ɩnʋ. Fʋtɛlɛ ɔpɔnpʋ lɛ ɔwʋnlɩnpʋ ɩbɩ, lɛ ɔpɔnpʋ pʋ́ ohiani lɛ amʋ́ asisipʋ ɩbɩ.”

ref: Liars accuse me of crimes I know nothing about.
text: Adansɩfɔ afunupʋ bakʋsʋ. Ɩtɔá mmeyin mʋ́ ɩwɩ bʋdɛ mɩ fɩtɛ.

ref: They repay evil for good, and I feel all alone.
text: Bapʋ lalahɛ ka mɩ yile ɩkɔ, baha nawa nwɛ.

ref: When they were sick, I wore sackcloth and went without food. I truly prayed for them,
text: Tamɛ nɩ amʋ́ mʋ́ bʋdɛlɔ a, ntɛdɩda tatida, klɩ ɔnɔ, ko nwuntɔ wa bɔ mpaɩ ha amʋ́.

ref: as I would for a friend or a relative. I was in sorrow and mourned, as I would for my mother.
text: Ntɔbwɛ fɛ mɩ pio, ntɛ mɩ nyawie ndɛ mpaɩ bɔ ha. Ntɔwa nwɛ fɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔdɛ mʋ yin su.

ref: I have stumbled, and worthless liars I don't even know surround me and sneer.
text: Tamɛ brɛá nowie ɩkplantɔ a, ɩlɔwa amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔdwɛ. Bɛtsa bomli, bʋdɛ mɩ ɔblɔla bwɛ. Aha ánɩ́ mmeyin amʋ́ dɛ mɩ ɔblɔla bwɛ, bʋdɛ mɩ kpɔɩ kotoo.

ref: Worthless people make fun and never stop laughing.
text: Aha aplɔɩpʋ bɔbwɛ mɩ ɔblɔla, pɩɛɩ ayin suna mɩ.

ref: But all you do is watch! When will you do something? Save me from the attack of those vicious lions.
text: Oo anɩ Wie, mási tsia kɩ amʋ́. Hɔ mɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩ, afʋhɔ mɩ nkpa anfɩ ntamatsula mʋ́sʋ anfɩ lɛ agyata anfɩ ɩbɩ!

ref: And when your people meet, I will praise you and thank you, Lord, in front of them all.
text: Fówun nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ, kanfʋ fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.

ref: Don't let my brutal enemies be glad because of me. They hate me for no reason. Don't let them wink behind my back.
text: Máha ansɩ igyi afunupʋá bʋdɛ mɩ lu kʋkʋ kpalɩ. Máha mɩ alupʋ abʋkɩ mɩ atin brɛá ndesu.

ref: They say hurtful things, and they lie to people who want to live in peace.
text: Tsufɛ bʋtamablɩ iwilwii asʋn. Bʋtɛha aba ɔnɔ, ka asʋn dɩnka ɔsʋlʋ anfɩsʋ aha lwiihɛsʋ.

ref: They are quick to accuse me. They say, “You did it! We saw you ourselves.”
text: Batɛɩ amʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ gblauun, bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ɛhɛɛn, anɩ onuto anɩlapʋ ansibi wun mʋ́!”

ref: You see everything, Lord! Please don't keep silent or stay so far away.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, yɛ fʋdewun. Mása ntsu wa ɔnɔ. Mɩ Wie, máwa ɩfɔ mɩ wa.

ref: and prove that I am right by your standards. Don't let them laugh at me
text: Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, ɔnɔkwalɩpʋ fʋgyi. Gyi mɩ asʋn ha mɩ. Fówun ansɩ méegyi mɩ anyaba.

ref: or say to each other, “Now we've got what we want! We'll gobble him up!”
text: Máha amʋ́ abʋblɩ wa ɩklʋntɔ bɛɛ, “Ɛhɛɛn. Ɩnɩ anɩdedunka nɩ. Anɩlatu mʋ asɩ.”

ref: Disappoint and confuse all who are glad to see me in trouble; disgrace and embarrass my proud enemies who say to me, “You are nothing!”
text: Pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ mɩ ɩkplan bʋ amʋ́ ansigyi. Ha amʋ abʋgyigya, pɛlɩ mʋ́a nsʋpa ɩtʋ ɩwɩ atsupʋ anfɩ bʋdɛ ɩwɩ tsu suna mɩ anfɩ.

ref: Let all who want me to win be happy and joyful. From now on let them say, “The Lord is wonderful! God is glad when all goes well for his servant.”
text: Ansɩ igyi aha amʋʋ mɩ ɩsʋgyi bʋ amʋ́ ɔdwɛ amʋ. Bʋkplʋn blɩ lablɩ bɛɛ, “Nana Bulu lomoni. Mʋ osumbi yile tegyi mʋ ansɩ.”

ref: Then I will shout all day, “Praise the Lord God! He did what was right.”
text: Nɛ́da fʋ yilebwɛ ɔkan, kanfʋ fʋ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Sinners don't respect God; sin is all they think about.
text: Lakpan tɔtɔɩ kpla owuntɔlɩnpʋ ɩklʋn. Ɔtamatepi nya Bulu ifu.

ref: They like themselves too much to hate their own sins or even to see them.
text: Tsufɛ ɩwɩtsu tɛha mʋ ɔtɛmlɛ ɩwɩ. Ɔtamawun mʋ lakpan, mɛnɩ obési bwɛ.

ref: They tell deceitful lies, and they don't have the sense to live right.
text: Asʋkpan mʋ́a afunu sɔɔn tɛdalɩ mʋ ɔnɔ. Ɔtamatra bwɛ ansɩtɩnla, ɔtamatra bwɛ yile.

ref: Those people stay awake, thinking up mischief, and they follow the wrong road, refusing to turn from sin.
text: Ɔtɔgywɩɩn lalahɛ mʋ ɔklansʋ. Bregyibrɛ ɔlɛda ɩwɩsʋ ha lalahɛbwɛ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔtamakina lalahɛ kʋkʋʋkʋ.

ref: Your love is faithful, Lord, and even the clouds in the sky can depend on you.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɔfʋa wɔ ɔsʋsʋ. Fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɛ ɩlɔfʋa wɔ nwʋlʋta.

ref: Your decisions are always fair. They are firm like mountains, deep like the sea, and all people and animals are under your care.
text: Fʋ yilebwɛ lɔfʋa fɛ abʋ akpɔnkpɔntɩ. Fʋ asʋnbuatɔ bʋ oklu fɛ ɔpʋ ibuntɔ. Oo Nana Bulu, fʋtɛkɩ anyankpʋsa mʋ́a mbwɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.

ref: Your love is a treasure, and everyone finds shelter in the shadow of your wings.
text: Oo Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɔkʋkʋ moni o. Anyankpʋsa bʋteŋain fʋ abambasɩ.

ref: You give your guests a feast in your house, and you serve a tasty drink that flows like a river.
text: Fʋ woyitɔ atɔ ɩhɩɛ tsɔ. Mʋ́ fʋtɔpʋbʋla amʋ́. Fʋtɛha amʋ́ bʋtonun fʋ ɔdwɛ-ntsu bregyibrɛ.

ref: The life-giving fountain belongs to you, and your light gives light to each of us.
text: Tsufɛ fʋ wa nkpa otsukpa bʋ. Fʋ wankɩtɔ anɩtenya wankɩ tsu.

ref: Our Lord, keep showing love to everyone who knows you, and use your power to save all whose thoughts please you.
text: Ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka itsia aha ánɩ́ bʋyin fʋsʋ, afʋbwɛ yile ha aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.

ref: Don't let those proud and merciless people kick me around or chase me away.
text: Máha ɩwɩ atsupʋ abʋtsatsa mɩsʋ, ntɛ awuntɔlɩnpʋ abʋwuta mɩ sɩsɩ.

ref: Look at those wicked people! They are knocked down, never to get up again.
text: Kɩ awuntɔlɩnpʋ ɔdɩdakpa. Amʋ́ bawuta da, kʋsʋ ma amʋ́ ɩnʋ a.

ref: Don't be annoyed by anyone who does wrong, and don't envy them.
text: Mákpla lakpan abwɛpʋ. Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ tɔtɔ mápɛ fʋ ansɩ,

ref: They will soon disappear like grass without rain.
text: tsufɛ ɩmɔ́ɔwa ɔpá kʋkʋ bɔ́bʋ fɛ ɩfa, wʋlɩ fɛ ɔsʋlʋkpan.

ref: Trust the Lord and live right! The land will be yours, and you will be safe.
text: Pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ, afʋbwɛ yile. Tsia ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ, ɩwa alɛ ha fʋ.

ref: Do what the Lord wants, and he will give you your heart's desire.
text: Ansɩ igyi fʋ Nana Bulu ɩwɩ, mɛnɩ ɔbɛ́ha fʋ tɔá fʋ ɩklʋn dekle.

ref: Let the Lord lead you and trust him to help.
text: Pʋ fʋ ɩwɩ wa Nana Bulu ɩbɩtɔ, afʋpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋsʋ, ɔbɔ́bwɛ mʋ́ ha fʋ.

ref: Then it will be as clear as the noonday sun that you were right.
text: Ɔbɛ́ha fʋ yilebwɛ ɩbɛ́lɩn ɔwan fɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ, fʋ asʋngyi ɛ ɩbɔ́wankɩ fɛ ɔpawi.

ref: Be patient and trust the Lord. Don't let it bother you when all goes well for those who do sinful things.
text: Nya ɩklʋn ha Nana Bulu, tsia gyo mʋ. Nɩ ɩdɛ alɛ wa ha ɔkʋ, ntɛ ɔkʋ ɔtsʋn ɔkpa lalahɛsʋ nya ɩwɩ a, mákpla mʋ.

ref: Don't be angry or furious. Anger can lead to sin.
text: Mánya ɔblɔ. Lɛ ɔblɔkpan lɛ fʋtɔ. Mákpla mʋ, ɩtɛkpa ɔha wa lalahɛtɔ.

ref: All sinners will disappear, but if you trust the Lord, the land will be yours.
text: Tsufɛ aha lalahɛ bɛ́ta, tamɛ aha ánɩ́ bɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ obégyi ɔsʋlʋ anfɩ.

ref: Sinners will soon disappear, never to be found,
text: Ɩlasi kpalobi aha lalahɛ bʋmɛ́ɛtra tsia. Fódunka amʋ́ fʋmóowun amʋ́.

ref: but the poor will take the land and enjoy a big harvest.
text: Ɩwɩasɩ abapʋ obégyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ, ɩwɩ bɛ́hɩɛ lwii amʋ́.

ref: Merciless people make plots against good people and snarl like animals,
text: Ɔha lalahɛ tɛkan yile ɔbwɛpʋsʋ, pɩɛɩ ayin suna mʋ,

ref: but the Lord laughs and knows their time is coming soon.
text: tamɛ anɩ Wie dɛ mʋ mɔsɩ, tsufɛ oyin ánɩ́ mʋ nkɛ lawie woyi ta.

ref: The wicked kill with swords and shoot arrows to murder the poor and the needy and all who do right.
text: Aha lalahɛ balɛ amʋ́ ɔflɛtɔ ɔdayi. Babɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩta, bʋdekleá bɛ́lɛ ahianfɔ pʋ́ apɔnpʋ da; abʋmɔ aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa.

ref: But they will be killed by their own swords, and their arrows will be broken.
text: Bulu ɔbɛ́ha amʋ́ onuto ɔdayi békpie amʋ́ ɩklʋn, amʋ́ ɩta ɛ bébiabia.

ref: It is better to live right and be poor than to be sinful and rich.
text: Atɔ kpalobiá ɔha yile bʋ legyi ansɩ, dʋn aha lalahɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ atɔ.

ref: The wicked will lose all of their power, but the Lord gives strength to everyone who is good.
text: Nana Bulu tɛkpa lalahɛ ɔbwɛpʋ ɩba, tamɛ ɔtɔwa yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɔwʋnlɩn.

ref: Those who obey the Lord are daily in his care, and what he has given them will be theirs forever.
text: Nana Bulu tɛkɩ ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlala ma mʋ ɩwɩsʋ ekekegyiɛkɛ. Mʋ ogyikpa bétsia brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: They won't be in trouble when times are bad, and they will have plenty when food is scarce.
text: Ɔtamawa mʋ pɛlɩtɔ mʋ ɩkplanbɩ. Akʋnbɩ kʋraa a, ɔtɛha mʋ atɔ otegyi mwɛ.

ref: Wicked people are enemies of the Lord and will vanish like smoke from a field on fire.
text: Aha lalahɛ bɛ́ta. Nana Bulu alupʋ bʋgyi fɛ mbwɩ ogyikpa ɩfa ntswɩtswɩ. Bʋtɔkɔsɩ fwɩ fɛ ogyasi.

ref: An evil person borrows and never pays back; a good person is generous and never stops giving.
text: Ɔha lalahɛ ɔpan ɔtamaka, tamɛ yile ɔbwɛpʋ mʋ́ bʋ awɩtɔlɛ, otekie atɔ.

ref: Everyone the Lord blesses will receive the land; everyone the Lord curses will be destroyed.
text: Ɔhagyiɔha ánɩ́ Bulu oyula obégyi ɔsʋlʋá alaha mʋ, tamɛ ɔha ánɩ́ Bulu ɔlwɩɩ obówu.

ref: If you do what the Lord wants, he will make certain each step you take is sure.
text: Nana Bulu tɛkɩ ɔha ayabi ɔtsakpa, mʋ bwɛhɛ tegyi mʋ ansɩ.

ref: The Lord will hold your hand, and if you stumble, you still won't fall.
text: Nɩ ɔdɩda kʋraa a, ɔtamasin ɔsʋlʋtɔ; tsufɛ Nana Bulu dɛ mʋ ɩbɩ.

ref: As long as I can remember, good people have never been left helpless, and their children have never gone begging for food.
text: Tɛkɩ kebi ngyi brɛ amʋ, sei nadan. Tamɛ mmɔkʋnu ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ bɛɛ, Bulu lakpa ɔha yile ɔma. Ntɛ mʋ abi bakʋlɩ atogyihɛ.

ref: They gladly give and lend, and their children turn out good.
text: Yile ɔbwɛpʋ bʋ awɩtɔlɛ. Otekie atɔ, ɔtɔpʋ atɔ pan aha. Mʋ́ sʋ mʋ abi bénya oyula.

ref: If you stop sinning and start doing right, you will keep living and be secure forever.
text: Si lalahɛ bwɛ, afʋbwɛ yile, mɛnɩ fétsia ɔsʋlʋ amʋsʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: The Lord loves justice, and he won't ever desert his faithful people. He always protects them, but destroys the children of the wicked.
text: Tsufɛ Nana Bulu tekle asʋngyi ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ. Ɔmɛ́ɛkpa aha ánɩ́ bʋtamayinki mʋ ɔma, ɔma ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Ɔbɛ́kɩta amʋ́ kɔnkɔn ɩbrɛ fɛ́ɛ́, tamɛ aha lalahɛ asɩ bɛ́ta.

ref: God's people will own the land and live here forever.
text: Yile abwɛpʋ obégyi ɔsʋlʋ amʋ, tsia mʋ́sʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Words of wisdom come when good people speak for justice.
text: Nyansa asʋn tɛdalɩ ɔha yile ɔnɔ, otegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.

ref: They remember God's teachings, and they never take a wrong step.
text: Mʋ Bulu atosunahɛ bʋ mʋ ɩklʋntɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔtamasrɛɩ dalɩ mʋ ɔkpasʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: The wicked try to trap and kill good people,
text: Aha lalahɛ bʋtɛtɛ yile abwɛpʋ, dunka ɔkpa ánɩ́ bɔ́tsʋn mʋ́sʋ mɔ amʋ́.

ref: but the Lord is on their side, and he will defend them when they are on trial.
text: Tamɛ Nana Bulu méesi amʋ́ wa amʋ́ ɩbɩtɔ, ntɛ ha amʋ́ abʋgyi ɩpɔn asʋn agyipʋ ansɩtɔ.

ref: Trust the Lord and follow him. He will give you the land, and you will see the wicked destroyed.
text: Kɩ Nana Bulu ansɩtɔ, afʋkɩta mʋ mblatɔ. Ɔbɔ́pʋ ɔsʋlʋ amʋ ha fʋ, pʋwa fʋ numnyam. Fówun aha lalahɛ owukpa.

ref: I have seen brutal people abuse others and grow strong like trees in rich soil.
text: Nowun ɔha lalahɛ ɔkʋá ogyi owuntɔlɩnpʋ, alatsu ɩwɩ fʋa, yɛyɛɩ fɛ Lebanon odum lenya ɔlɩɩkpa.

ref: Suddenly they disappeared! I looked, but they were gone and no longer there.
text: Tamɛ nɛlakɩ a, alafwɩ. Nodunka mʋ kʋraa mmowun mʋ.

ref: Think of the bright future waiting for all the families of honest, innocent, and peace-loving people.
text: Hɩɛ yile ɔbwɛpʋ nsʋ, afʋlɛ ansɩ kɩ ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa, tsufɛ ɔha ánɩ́ ololwii asɩ bɛ́klɛɩ.

ref: But not a trace will be left of the wicked or their families.
text: Tamɛ mblasʋ magyipʋ bɛ́ta. Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ asɩ bótu plɩplɩplɩ.

ref: The Lord protects his people, and they can come to him in times of trouble.
text: Nana Bulu ɩbɩtɔ yile abwɛpʋ bʋtenya amʋ́ nkpahɔ tsu. Ogyi ɔtanʋkpa ha amʋ́ brɛá bʋbʋ ɩkplantɔ.

ref: The Lord helps his people and saves them from the wicked because they run to him.
text: Otegyi amʋ́ bʋalɛ, lɛ amʋ́. Ɔtɛlɛ amʋ́ aha lalahɛ ɩbɩtɔ. Ɔtɔkɔ ha amʋ́, tsufɛ batanʋ mʋ.

ref: When you are angry, Lord, please don't punish me or even correct me.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mápʋ ɔblɔ wa ɩyɩn wa mɩ! Mápʋ ansɩpɛpɛ bɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ!

ref: You shot me with your arrows, and you struck me with your hand.
text: Fʋ ɔbɩn lakpie yi mɩ, fayia mɩ manta ɔsʋlʋtɔ.

ref: My body hurts all over because of your anger. Even my bones are in pain, and my sins
text: Fʋ ɩyɩn sʋ, ɩwɩ ma mɩ ɔnlɩn. Mɩ lakpan sʋ awútɔ labwiebwie mɩ.

ref: are so heavy that I am crushed.
text: Mɩ lakpan ladʋbɩ. Ɩlabwɛ atɔ sʋrahɛá mmɛtalɩ sʋra.

ref: Because of my foolishness, I am covered with sores that stink and spread.
text: Mɩ mimla sʋ mɩ nlɔ laplɔ, idebon.

ref: My body is twisted and bent, and I groan all day long.
text: Naklo, ndɛ ipian wun. Nawa nwɛ, ndesu ekekegyiɛkɛ.

ref: Fever has my back in flames, and I hurt everywhere.
text: Awútɔ ɩdɛ mɩ okunku, ɩdɛ mɩ dwindwiin.

ref: I am worn out and weak, moaning and in distress.
text: Ɔŋɛ lata mɩ fɛ́ɛ́, awútɔ labwɛ mɩ yɔyɔɔyɔ. Mɩ klʋn dɛ mɩ han. Nasu kʋklʋkʋʋ, ndɛkɩmɩ.

ref: You, Lord, know every one of my deepest desires, and my noisy groans are no secret to you.
text: Mɩ Wie, fʋyin tɔá ndedunka. Tɔá sʋá ndesu wa ɩwɩtɔ ɩda fʋ ansɩtɔ.

ref: My heart is beating fast. I feel weak all over, and my eyes are red.
text: Mɩ klʋn dɛda ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ. Ɔŋɛ lata mɩ, mɩ ansibi lapunya tin.

ref: Because of my sickness, no friends or neighbors will come near me.
text: Mɩ ɩlɔ sʋ mɩ adwɛpʋ pʋ́ mɩ anyawie basrɩ mɩ. Mɩ abusuanfɔ onuto kʋraa bawa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ.

ref: All who want me dead set traps to catch me, and those who want to harm and destroy me plan and plot all day.
text: Aha ánɩ́ bʋmɛdɛ mɩ yile kle bafɩnɩ mɩ ayibi. Mɩ lalahɛ adunkapʋ ɛ bʋdekleá bɛ́lɛ mɩ ɩnʋ. Ɔpa-onye bʋdɛ mɩ ɩwɩ agywɩɩn lalahɛ susu.

ref: I am not able to hear or speak a word;
text: Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ netila asʋ fɛ ɩsʋtin. Nɛkpa mɩ ɔnɔ bun mwɩ fɛ omumu.

ref: I am completely deaf and can't make a sound.
text: Nɔbwɛ ɩwɩ ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋ letin, ɔtamalɛ ɩla ɔnɔ.

ref: I trust you, Lord God, and you will do something.
text: Tsufɛ Nana Bulu, mɩ ansɩ dɩn fʋsʋ. Oo mɩ Wie, mɩ Bulu, fʋ ɔbɛ́lɛ mʋ́ ɔnɔ.

ref: I said, “Don't let them laugh or brag when I slip and fall.”
text: Mɩ asʋn ánɩ́ nɛblɩ gyi, “Máha ansɩ igyi mɩ alupʋ nɩ nɛsrɛɩ dɩda.”

ref: I am about to collapse from constant pain.
text: Tsufɛ nna ndɛ afu kɔ, ndɛ ɩwɩɔsɩn wun ekekegyiɛkɛ.

ref: I told you my sins, and I am sorry for them.
text: Nalɛ mɩ lakpan blɩ. Ɩlahɔ mɩ ɔsɩn ánɩ́ nabwɛ mʋ́.

ref: Many deadly and powerful enemies hate me,
text: Ɩwɩ bʋ mɩ alupʋ ɔnlɩn, bʋbʋ ɔwʋnlɩn. Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋtolu mɩ kʋkʋ kpalɩ.

ref: and they repay evil for good because I try to do right.
text: Aha ánɩ́ bɔpʋ lalahɛ ka mɩ yile ɩkɔ bakʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ, tsufɛ yile ɔkpa ngya.

ref: You are the Lord God! Stay nearby and don't desert me.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mákpa mɩ ɔma. Mɩ Bulu, máwa ɩfɔ mɩ ɩwɩ.

ref: You are the one who saves me. Please hurry and help.
text: Mɩ Wie, mɩ Ɔhɔpʋ, wa ɔsa bɔhɔ mɩ!

ref: I told myself, “I'll be careful not to sin by what I say, and I'll muzzle my mouth when evil people are near.”
text: Nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Nɛ́kɩ mɩ natɩtɔ, mɛnɩ tsitsa kʋkʋ móotsu mɩ ɔnɔ. Nɔ́wa mɩ ɔnɔ ɩkan, tsufɛ aha lalahɛtɔ mbʋ.”

ref: I kept completely silent, but it did no good, and I hurt even worse.
text: Ɩnɩá nemli omumu, mmobwii ɔnɔ, nɛkpa ɔnɔ bun yilesʋ o a, ɩwɩ mɛsankɩ mɩ.

ref: I felt a fire burning inside, and the more I thought, the more it burned, until at last I said:
text: Mɩ klʋn lɛblɩ ogya wa mɩ ɩwɩtɔ pɩnpɩɩnpɩn. Brɛá ndɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ gywɩɩn kotoo a, iletsii ogya. Mʋ́ sʋ nɛblɩ mbɛɛ,

ref: “Please, Lord, show me my future. Will I soon be gone?
text: “Nana Bulu, suna mɩ mɩ nkpa ɔfʋnkpa, pʋ́ nkɛá ɩlasi mɩ. Suna mɩ alɩá mɩ lowu bɔ́wa ɔsa.

ref: You made my life short, so brief that the time means nothing to you. “Human life is but a breath,
text: Kɩ, fɔbwɛ mɩ nkpa ɩfɔtɔ ɩbɩta pɛ. Mɩ nkɛ megyi tɔtɔ fʋ ansɩtɔ. Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, nyankpʋsa nkɛ igyi fɛ ɔtsawʋlɛ ɔŋɛ fʋhɛ fʋ ansɩtɔ.” Ɩya.

ref: and it disappears like a shadow. Our struggles are senseless; we store up more and more, without ever knowing who will get it all.
text: “Lɛlɛ mʋ́ a, nyankpʋsa na ɔdɛtsʋn fɛ yiyi! Lɛlɛ a, ipian odewun kpalɩ. Atɔ ɔna odekle yaɩ, omeyin mʋ́ ogyipʋ.”

ref: “What am I waiting for? I depend on you, Lord!
text: “Mɩ Wie, ntɔ ntsie ngyo? Fʋsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn.

ref: Save me from my sins. Don't let fools sneer at me.
text: Lɛ mɩ tsu mɩ lakpan fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Mási mɩ ha, aha mimlahɛ abʋmɔsɩ mɩ.

ref: You treated me like this, and I kept silent, not saying a word.
text: Namli omumu, mma ɔnɔ bwii, tsufɛ fʋlaha mʋ́ ɩlaba alɩ.

ref: “Won't you stop punishing me? You have worn me down.
text: Kokoli, mátra bɩtɩ mɩ ɩsʋ! Tsufɛ fʋ atswɛ ladʋn mɩ.

ref: You punish us severely because of our sins. Like a moth, you destroy what we treasure most. We are as frail as a breath.
text: Nɩ fɛbɩtɩ nyankpʋsa ɩsʋ mʋ lakpan sʋ a, fʋteyinta tɔá ɩhɩɛ bʋ labi ha mʋ fɛ tɛplɛ lawɩ tati. Lɛlɛ mʋ a, nyankpʋsa nkpa igyi fɛ ɔtsawʋlɛ ɔŋɛ fʋhɛ.” Ɩya.

ref: “Listen, Lord, to my prayer! My eyes are flooded with tears, as I pray to you. I am merely a stranger visiting in your home as my ancestors did.
text: “Oo Nana Bulu, nu mɩ mpaɩ, afʋnu mɩ isu. Mákina nu. Tsufɛ ɔfɔɔ ngyi, ndɛka tsʋn kɛkɛ fɛ mɩ anain.

ref: Stop being angry with me and let me smile again before I am dead and gone.”
text: Kalaki ansɩ lɛ mɩsʋ, ansɩ ɩtra kalagyi mɩ asa mɩ anwu fɛ́ɛ́.”

ref: I patiently waited, Lord, for you to hear my prayer. You listened
text: Nenya ɩklʋn tsia gyo Nana Bulu. Ɔlɛyaa asʋ mɩ wa, nu mɩ asʋn, sɔ mɩ ɔnɔ.

ref: and pulled me from a lonely pit full of mud and mire. You let me stand on a rock with my feet firm,
text: Olotsu mɩ lɛ lowu ɔbɔtɔ. Ɔlɛlɛ mɩ lɛ ɔdɩba makpiitɔ. Ɔlɔpʋ mɩ lɩɩ ɩbʋtasʋ. Nɩ nna a, ntenya anatɩlɛ.

ref: and you gave me a new song, a song of praise to you. Many will see this, and they will honor and trust you, the Lord God.
text: Ɔlɔpʋ anɩ Bulu kanfʋ ɩlʋ pɔpwɛ wa mɩ ɔnɔ. Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bówun nya ifu, pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ.

ref: You bless all of those who trust you, Lord, and refuse to worship idols or follow false gods.
text: Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ ɔlɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka Nana Bulusʋ, ɔmɔpʋdɩnka ɩwɩ atsupʋ ntɛ ɩkpɩ asumpʋsʋ.

ref: You, Lord God, have done many wonderful things, and you have planned marvelous things for us. No one is like you! I would never be able to tell all you have done.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mɩ Bulu, ofula tsɔtsɔɔtsɔá fabwɛ ha mɩ, pʋ́ atɔá fahɩɛ ha mɩ lɔdʋbɩ. Tɔtɔ má ɩnʋá nɔ́pʋkapʋ fʋ. Nɩ mbɛɛ, mbwii ɔnɔ blɩ mʋ́ a, ɩma ɩklatɔ.

ref: Sacrifices and offerings are not what please you; gifts and payment for sin are not what you demand. But you made me willing to listen and obey.
text: Atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ mʋ́a lakpan-afɔdɩɛ tamagyi fʋ ansɩ. Faha nawun ánɩ́ fʋtamakle mbwɩá bapʋ amʋ́ bɔ ogya-afɔdɩɛ pʋ́ lakpan-afɔdɩɛ.

ref: And so, I said, “I am here to do what is written about me in the book, where it says,
text: Mʋʋ nɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Nanaa. Nɛba bɔbwɛ fʋ ɔdwɛla, fɛ alɩá bɔwanlɩn mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn wa fʋ asʋn wanlɩnhɛ amʋtɔ.

ref: ‘I enjoy pleasing you. Your Law is in my heart.’ ”
text: Oo mɩ Bulu, ɩbʋ mɩ ɔdwɛá nɔ́bwɛ fʋ ɔdwɛla, tsufɛ fʋ atosunahɛ ɩdɩn mɩ ɩklʋnsʋ.”

ref: When your people worshiped, you know I told them, “Our Lord always helps!”
text: Nada fʋ yilebwɛ ɔkan fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ anɩ ɔpasuatɔ. Nana Bulu, fʋ onuto fʋyin ánɩ́ mmɔkʋkpa ɔnɔ bun.

ref: When all your people met, I did not keep silent. I said, “Our Lord is kind. He is faithful and caring, and he saves us.”
text: Mmesi fʋ yile ŋain mɩ ɩklʋntɔ. Nɛkpalɩ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩwa pʋ́ fʋ nkpahɔ ɩwɩ asʋn. Mmesi fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ŋain fʋ aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ ansɩtɔ, anɩ ɔpasuatɔ.

ref: You, Lord, never fail to have pity on me; your love and faithfulness always keep me secure.
text: Oo Nana Bulu, mákina mɩ nwɛ wun ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩkpa mɩ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: I have more troubles than I can count. My sins are all around me, and I can't find my way. My sins outnumber the hairs on my head, and I feel weak.
text: Asʋn wunhɛ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ labomli mɩ, ɩma klatɔ. Mɩ lakpan lamli atɔ sʋrahɛ ha mɩ. Ɩlaha ntra mmɛdɛ atɔ wun. Ɩtsɔ dʋn mɩ nwunsʋ-imi, ɩlakpɔn mɩ.

ref: Please show that you care and come to my rescue. Hurry and help me!
text: Oo Nana Bulu, tsula bɔhɔ mɩ! Nana Bulu, wa ɔsa begyi mɩ bʋalɛ.

ref: Disgrace and confuse all who want me dead; turn away and disgrace all who want to hurt me.
text: Ha pɛlɩ ɩkɩta aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lowu kle, amʋ́ nwun ikotsoli. Ha aha ánɩ́ bʋdekleá bɔ́pʋ lalahɛ gyi mɩ abʋpʋ nsʋpa yinki.

ref: Embarrass and shame everyone who says, “Just look at you now!”
text: Ha ansɩ iwu aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ bɛɛ, “Ɛhɛɛn, ɛhɛɛn, anɩlanya mʋ!”

ref: Our Lord, let your worshipers rejoice and be glad. They love you for saving them, so let them always say, “The Lord is wonderful!”
text: Tamɛ ha ɩwɩ ɩsankɩ aha ánɩ́ bʋtodunka fʋ fɛ́ɛ́, abʋnya fʋ ɩwɩ ansigyi. Ansɩ igyi aha ánɩ́ fʋ nkpahɔ legyi amʋ́ ansɩ, abʋkplʋn blɩ lablɩ bɛɛ, “Nana Bulu lomoni!”

ref: I am poor and needy, but, Lord God, you care about me, and you come to my rescue. Please hurry and help.
text: Mɩ mʋ́ a, ohiani ngyi, mma tɔtɔ. Bulu, gywɩɩn mɩ ɩwɩ. Mɩ Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ mɩ ɔlɛpʋ. Mási tsia mʋ́sʋ.

ref: You, Lord God, bless everyone who cares for the poor, and you rescue those people in times of trouble.
text: Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ otosusu ɔpɔnpʋ ɩwɩ. Nana Bulu tɛlɛ mʋ lɛ ɩkplantɔ.

ref: You protect them and keep them alive. You make them happy here in this land, and you don't hand them over to their enemies.
text: Otogyo mʋ ɩwɩ, ɔtɛha mʋ nkpa. Ɔtɛha ɩtɔwa alɛ ha mʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ. Ɔtamasi mʋ wa mʋ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: You always heal them and restore their strength when they are sick.
text: Ɔtɛkɩ mʋsʋ mʋ ɩlɔklansʋ, tsa mʋ ɩlɔ, ɔtɔkʋsʋ ɔna.

ref: I prayed, “Have pity, Lord! Heal me, though I have sinned against you.”
text: Mɩ mʋ ndɛblɩ mbɛɛ, “Oo Nana Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ, afʋtsa mɩ ɩlɔ; tsufɛ napʋ ɩla gyi fʋ.”

ref: My vicious enemies ask me, “When will you die and be forgotten?”
text: Mɩ alupʋ bʋtamablɩ mɩ yile dʋn “Ɔmɛnkɛ kʋraa obówu, mʋ ɩda bɔ́fwɩ?”

ref: When visitors come, all they ever bring are worthless words, and when they leave, they spread gossip.
text: Bʋtɛba bɛkɩ mɩ, fɛ amʋ́ ba. Tamɛ bɔyɔ a, bapʋ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn lalahɛ bɛya.

ref: My enemies whisper about me. They think the worst,
text: Mɩ alupʋ amʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtetsii mɩ, blɩ mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn bɛɛ,

ref: and they say, “You have some fatal disease! You'll never get well.”
text: “Ɩlɔ lalahɛ lada mʋ tswɩ. Ɔmɛ́ɛtra kʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.”

ref: My most trusted friend has turned against me, though he ate at my table.
text: Mɩ nyawie klakla ánɩ́ mɩa mʋnyɔ anɩtɔwa ɩbɩ ɔlɛpɛtɔ kʋraa lakʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ.

ref: Have pity, Lord! Heal me, so I can pay them back.
text: Tamɛ Nana Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ, afʋtsa mɩ ɩlɔ; mɩ anka mɩ alupʋ ɩkɔ!

ref: Then my enemies won't defeat me, and I will know that you really care.
text: Ɩlaha nawun ánɩ́ fʋtekle mɩ asʋn, tsufɛ fʋmɛ́ɛha mɩ alupʋ abʋnya mɩ ɩwɩ ansigyi.

ref: You have helped me because I am innocent, and you will always be close to my side.
text: Ɔlala ɩma mɩ ɩwɩ, sʋ fatsu mɩ lɩɩ tɩntɩn. Faha ansɩ dɛ mɩgyi fʋ ansɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: You, the Lord God of Israel, will be praised forever! Amen and amen.
text: Bʋkanfʋ Nana Bulu, Israel Bulu amʋ; tsu brɛá ɩtamata yɛfʋn brɛá ɩtamata. Ɩbá mʋ́tɔ, ɩtra laba mʋ́tɔ.

ref: As a deer gets thirsty for streams of water, I truly am thirsty for you, my God.
text: Alɩá nani tɛnatɩ dunka abʋnkpatɔ ntsu a, alɩ ntodunka Bulu nɩ.

ref: In my heart, I am thirsty for you, the living God. When will I see your face?
text: Bulu ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mɩ ɔkla. Ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mɩ ha Bulu ɔkɩankpapʋ. Ɔmɛnkɛ nówun mʋ?

ref: Day and night my tears are my only food, as everyone keeps asking, “Where is your God?”
text: Ntsú ɩtsan mɩ ɔpa-onye, tsufɛ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ fɩtɛ bregyibrɛ bɛɛ, “Nkɩ fʋ Bulu amʋ mɛ?”

ref: Sorrow floods my heart, when I remember leading the worshipers to your house. I can still hear them shout their joyful praises.
text: Nɩ nɛkaɩn alɩá mʋ ɔdɔm bʋteyi opiansʋ a, asʋn tɛhan mɩ ɩklʋn. Tsufɛ alɩ brɛ amʋtɔ ntegya amʋ́ nkpa, anɩtɔpʋ ɩpan mʋ́a ope yɔ Bulu woyitɔ brɛá anɩdɛ nkɛ gyi nɩ.

ref: Why am I discouraged? Why am I restless? I should trust you, Lord. I will praise you again because you help me,
text: Mɩ ɔkla, ntogyi sʋ asʋn dɛ fʋ han alɩ? Ntogyi sʋ fawa nwɛ alɩ? Pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ, tsufɛ nɛ́lakanfʋ mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ

ref: and you are my God. I am deeply discouraged, and so I think about you here where the Jordan begins at Mount Hermon and at Mount Mizar.
text: pʋ́ mɩ Bulu. Asʋn dɛ mɩ ɔkla han. Mʋ́ sʋ ndɛ Yordan ntsu ɔnɔ ɔsʋlʋ, Hermon ɩbʋ pʋ́ Misar ɩbʋsʋ kaɩn.

ref: Your vicious waves have swept over me like an angry ocean or a roaring waterfall.
text: Faha ntsu labʋla wa mɩ, fɛ ntsuá ɩbʋ oklu dɛda, ntɛ ntsu bʋlahɛá ɩdɛkpayi ɔwʋnlɩnsʋ.

ref: Every day, you are kind, and at night you give me a song as my prayer to you, the God of my life.
text: Ekekegyiɛkɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ Nana Bulu tɔpʋ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sɩsɩ mɩ. Onyegyionye ntɔwa ɩlʋ kanfʋ mʋ. Ntɔbɔ mpaɩ ha mɩ Bulu. Mʋtɛha mɩ nkpa.

ref: You are my mighty rock. Why have you forgotten me? Why must enemies mistreat me and make me sad?
text: Nɛfɩtɛ mɩ Bulu, ogyi mɩ ɩbʋta mbɛɛ, “Ntogyi sʋ fatan mɩsʋ? Ntogyi sʋ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ, mʋ́ sʋ nɔ́wa nwɛ natɩ tsʋntsʋn?”

ref: Even my bones are in pain, while all day long my enemies sneer and ask, “Where is your God?”
text: Ɔblɔla ánɩ́ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ bwɛ, bʋdɛ mɩ fɩtɛ bregyibrɛ bɛɛ, “Nkɩ fʋ Bulu amʋ mɛ?” ɩlabwɛ ɔlɔ wa mɩ awútɔ, ɩdɛ mɩ dwiin.

ref: Why am I discouraged? Why am I restless? I trust you, Lord! And I will praise you again because you help me, and you are my God.
text: Mɩ ɔkla, ntogyi sʋ asʋn dɛ fʋ han alɩ? Ntogyi sʋ fawa nwɛ alɩ? Pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ, tsufɛ nɛ́lakanfʋ mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ mɩ Bulu.

ref: Show that I am right, God! Defend me against everyone who doesn't know you; rescue me from each of those deceitful liars.
text: Oo Bulu, gyi mɩ asʋn ha mɩ. Kɔ ɔmá ánɩ́ bʋtɛkpa fʋ ɔma. Lɛ mɩ tsu afunupʋ pʋ́ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ anfɩ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: I run to you for protection. Why do you turn me away? Why must enemies mistreat me and make me sad?
text: Tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ Bulu pʋ́ mɩ ɔtanʋkpa. “Ntogyi sʋ fasi mɩ wa ɔkpa? Ntogyi sʋ mɩ alupʋ bʋdɩn mɩsʋ, mʋ́ sʋ nɔ́wa nwɛ natɩ tsʋntsʋn?”

ref: Send your light and your truth to guide me. Let them lead me to your house on your sacred mountain.
text: Ha fʋ ɩwankɩ pʋ́ fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩkpa mɩ ya fʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋʋ igyi fʋ otsiakpa amʋsʋ.

ref: Then I will worship at your altar because you make me joyful. You are my God, and I will praise you. Yes, I will praise you as I play my harp.
text: Mɛnɩ nɔ́yɔ Bulu afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩ asɩ ɩnʋ. Nɔ́yɔ mɩ Buluá ɔtɛhɩɛ ha ansɩ tegyi mɩ wa. Oo Bulu, mɩ Bulu! Nɛ́da ɔsankuo kanfʋ fʋ.

ref: Why am I discouraged? Why am I restless? I trust you, Lord! And I will praise you again because you help me, and you are my God.
text: Mɩ ɔkla, ntogyi sʋ asʋn dɛ fʋ han alɩ? Ntogyi sʋ fawa nwɛ alɩ? Pʋ ansɩ dɩnka Bulusʋ, tsufɛ nɛ́lakanfʋ mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ pʋ́ mɩ Bulu.

ref: Our God, our ancestors told us what wonders you worked and we listened carefully.
text: Oo Bulu, anɩ onuto anɩlanu. Anɩ anain babla anɩ gyʋma ánɩ́ fegyi amʋ́ bɩsʋ bɩmbɩ amʋ.

ref: You chased off the nations by causing them trouble with your powerful arm. Then you let our ancestors take over their land.
text: Fɔpʋ ɩbɩ gya ɔmá-ɔmá, tamɛ fɛha anɩ anain mʋ́ bɛlɛ nlin. Fobwie ɔmá-ɔmá, tamɛ fɛha amʋ́ mʋ́ bɛklɛɩ.

ref: Their strength and weapons were not what won the land and gave them victory! You loved them and fought with your powerful arm and your shining glory.
text: Megyi amʋ́ akɔtɔ bɔpʋnya ɔsʋlʋ amʋ. Megyi amʋ́ ɔwʋnlɩn bɔpʋgyi ɩsʋ ɩsatɔ. Fʋtɔdwɛ amʋ́. Mʋ́ sʋ fʋ tumi, fʋ gyɔpɩ pʋ́ fʋ ɩwɩwankɩ legyi ɩsʋ ha amʋ́.

ref: You are my God and King, and you give victory to the people of Jacob.
text: Fʋgyi anɩ Wie pʋ́ anɩ Bulu. Tsula, Yakob ogyi ɩsʋ.

ref: By your great power, we knocked our enemies down and trampled on them.
text: Ɩna fʋsʋ anɩtɛlɛ anɩ alupʋ da. Fʋ ɩdatɔ anɩtɛtsatsa anɩ adʋnsʋ.

ref: I don't depend on my arrows or my sword to save me.
text: Anɩtamapʋ ansɩ dɩnka anɩ ɩtasʋ, anɩ ɔdayi ɛ mɔ́ɔhɔ anɩ.

ref: But you saved us from our hateful enemies, and you put them to shame.
text: Tamɛ falɛ anɩ anɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ, faha anɩ adʋn basʋpa.

ref: We boast about you, our God, and we are always grateful.
text: Bulu, fʋ sʋ anɩtotsu ɩwɩ ɔpa-onye. Abɛ́da fʋ ɩpan brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Ɩya.

ref: But now you have rejected us; you don't lead us into battle, and we look foolish.
text: Tamɛ sei fasi anɩ wa ɔkpa, anɩlasʋpa. Fʋmɛkpa anɩ ya ɩsa.

ref: You made us retreat, and our enemies have taken everything we own.
text: Faha anɩlakɔ srɩ. Anɩ alupʋ balupa anɩ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: You let us be slaughtered like sheep, and you scattered us among the nations.
text: Faha fɛɛ, bʋtɩn anɩ fɛ akufa. Fada anɩ saɩn wa ɔmá-ɔmátɔ.

ref: You sold your people for little or nothing, and you earned no profit.
text: Fafɛ fʋ aha ibia pɔnhɛ, fʋmenya tɔtɔ anɩsʋ.

ref: You made us look foolish to our neighbors; people who live nearby insult us and sneer.
text: Faha anɩlasʋpa apio aba ansɩtɔ. Aha ánɩ́ bʋtsie bomli anɩ betsia mɔsɩ anɩ, bwɛ anɩ ɔblɔla.

ref: Foreigners joke about us and shake their heads.
text: Anɩlemli blɩbi ha ɔmá-ɔmá. Ɔmá bambasʋfɔ bowun anɩ bakpʋkpʋ nwuntɔ, bwɛ anɩ ɔblɔla.

ref: I am embarrassed every day, and I blush with shame.
text: Pɛlɩ dɛ anɩ ɔpa-onye. Ɩlamli anɩ nsʋpa,

ref: But others mock and sneer, as they watch my enemies take revenge on me.
text: anɩ ɔblɔla abwɛpʋ pʋ́ anɩsʋ apleipʋ ansɩtɔ; anɩ alupʋ pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋtamasi ɩla kie ansɩtɔ.

ref: All this happened to us, though we didn't forget you or break our agreement.
text: Anɩlɔtsʋn ɩnɩ fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Mʋ́ o a, anɩmɔkʋtan fʋsʋ, ntɛ kina fʋ ntamsʋ gyi.

ref: We always kept you in mind and followed your teaching.
text: Anɩmɔkʋdamli ɔma ha fʋ, ntɛ dalɩ fʋ ɔkpasʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: But you crushed us, and you covered us with deepest darkness where wild animals live.
text: Tamɛ febiabia anɩ, si anɩ tswɩ mkpataku otsiakpa. Fesi anɩ wa oklun tuuntɔ.

ref: We did not forget you or lift our hands in prayer to foreign gods.
text: Nɩ anɩlatan fʋ ɩdasʋ, ntɛ tsu ɩbɩ fʋa bɔ mpaɩ ha ɔmá bamba ɔkpɩ ɔkʋ a,

ref: You would have known it because you discover every secret thought.
text: Bulu, tɛkɩ fʋmɛ́ɛbɩ? Tsufɛ fʋyin anɩ agywɩɩntɔ asʋn ŋainhɛ kugyikʋ.

ref: We face death all day for you. We are like sheep on their way to be slaughtered.
text: Ee! Fʋ sʋ anɩtefia lowu ɔpa-onye, fɛ akufa bapʋ bɛya ɔmɔkpa.

ref: Wake up! Do something, Lord! Why are you sleeping? Don't desert us forever.
text: Kʋsʋ! Mɩ Wie, ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛdɩdɩ? Kʋsʋ, mádɩdɩ si anɩ wa ɔkpa fɛ́ɛ́!

ref: Why do you keep looking away? Don't forget our sufferings and all our troubles.
text: Ntogyi sʋ fadɩnkɩ ansɩ anɩsʋ? Fatan anɩ ipian pʋ́ alɩá anɩ alupʋ bʋdɛ anɩ yia wa ntsu fɛ́ɛ́?

ref: We are flat on the ground, holding on to the dust.
text: Tsufɛ bada anɩ lɛda ɔsʋlʋtɔ tantaantan. Anɩ ɔyʋlʋ latɛ manta ɔsʋlʋ.

ref: Do something! Help us! Show how kind you are and come to our rescue.
text: Kʋsʋ gyi anɩ bʋalɛ! Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ ka lɛ anɩ.

ref: My thoughts are filled with beautiful words for the king, and I will use my voice as a writer would use pen and ink.
text: Ɩlakɩta mɩ ɩklʋn ánɩ́ nɔ́wanlɩn owie ɩwɩ ɩlʋ. Mɩ ɔdandʋ bʋ ɔsa, fɛ atɔ ɔwanlɩnpʋ ɩbɩ.

ref: No one is as handsome as you! Your words are always kind. That is why God will always bless you.
text: Nanain, ɔhaa má akɩlɛ ɔyasubi fɛ fʋ! Asʋn ánɩ́ ɩbʋ anulɛ bɔ fʋ ɔnɔ. Bulu layula fʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Mighty king, glorious ruler, strap on your sword
text: Otumipʋ, tsu fʋ ɔdayi tsan. Kɩta fʋ numnyam pʋ́ fʋ iwiegyitɔ.

ref: and ride out in splendor! Win victories for truth and mercy and justice. Do fearsome things with your powerful arm.
text: Kɩta fʋ iwiegyitɔ, afʋkɔ yɔ nkpa. Kɔ ha ɔnɔkwalɩ mʋ́a yilebwɛ pʋ́ ɩwɩasɩba. Fʋ gyɔpɩ ɩlɛ fʋ ofula ɔwan.

ref: Send your sharp arrows through enemy hearts and make all nations fall at your feet.
text: Fʋ mbɩn pɩɔnpɩɔn ifuti fʋ alupʋ klʋn, ɔmá-ɔmá abʋba ɩwɩasɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ.

ref: You are God, and you will rule forever as king. Your royal power brings about justice.
text: Oo Bulu, fʋ owie-obia mɛ́ɛta ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Ɔnɔkwalɩ gyi fʋ akɔnfra.

ref: You love justice and hate evil. And so, your God chose you and made you happier than any of your friends.
text: Fʋtekle yilebwɛ. Lalahɛbwɛ mʋ́ a, fʋtekisi. Mʋ́ sʋ fʋ Wie Bulu lada fʋ ofuli, pʋ ansigyi bʋla fʋtɔ dʋn fʋ aba.

ref: The sweet aroma of the spices myrrh, aloes, and cassia covers your royal robes. You enjoy the music of harps in palaces decorated with ivory.
text: Ohuam, pɩprɩ, ɔhɩɛn pʋ́ atɔ fanfan ɩdɛ ɔfan wa fʋ atadɩɛ tɩntɩntɔ fanfaanfan. Owie woyiá bɔpʋ srʋfɔ-ɩsɛn hɩhɩɛ mʋ́tɔ, ndondo aná dɛ mʋ́tɔ tsia bʋ fʋ ɔdwɛ.

ref: Daughters of kings are here, and your bride stands at your right side, wearing a wedding gown trimmed with pure gold.
text: Awie abi tsɩhɛ bʋbʋ fʋ akatɔ. Ɔtsɩá owie detsia lɔwa Ofir sika atɔ wanklaan, ɔlɩɩ fʋ gyɔpɩsʋ.

ref: Bride of the king, listen carefully to me. Forget your own people and your father's family.
text: Ɔtsɩ, kɩ, yaa asʋ afʋnu. Tan fʋ abusuanfɔ pʋ́ fʋ sɩ woyisʋ,

ref: The king adores you. He is your master, so do what he desires.
text: mɛnɩ owie ansɩ bégyi fʋ ɩwɩ. Fʋ wie nɩ. Mʋ́ sʋ ba ɩwɩasɩ ha mʋ.

ref: All of the richest people from the city of Tyre will try to influence you
text: Tirofɔ bɔ́sʋra atokiehɛ ba. Ɔyɩtɔ ɩwɩ anyapʋ bɔ́pɔpɔ fʋ.

ref: with precious treasures. Your bride, my king, has inward beauty, and her wedding gown is woven with threads of gold.
text: Owie mʋ bi tsɩhɛ onumnyampʋ anfɩ tsie obutotɔ. Ɔlɔwa atadɩɛ tɩntɩn ánɩ́ bɔpʋ sika pɛpɛ lʋ mʋ́.

ref: Wearing the finest garments, she is brought to you, followed by her young friends, the bridesmaids.
text: Ɔlɔwa atadɩɛ tɩntɩn ánɩ́ ɩhɩɛ bʋ akɩlɛ, bakpa mʋ bɛya owie amʋ. Mʋ aba mbitebi bʋbuo mʋ.

ref: Everyone is excited, as they follow you to the royal palace.
text: Ansigyi mʋ́a oseyee bapʋkpa mʋ bɛya owie-woyitɔ.

ref: Your sons and your grandsons will also be kings as your ancestors were. You will make them rulers everywhere on earth.
text: Nanain, fʋ abi yinhɛ bétsia fʋ asɩ́ mbiasʋ. Fɛ́yaɩ amʋ́ awie ɔmá-ɔmátɔ.

ref: I will make your name famous from now on, and you will be praised forever and ever.
text: Bulu ɔbɛ́ha abi-aná fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kaɩn fʋ ɩdasʋ. Ɩnɩ sʋ ɔmá-ɔmá bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: God is our mighty fortress, always ready to help in times of trouble.
text: Bulu gyi anɩ okpikplikpa pʋ́ anɩ ɔwʋnlɩn. Ɔma ɔka anɩ wa anɩ ɔkplankɛ.

ref: And so, we won't be afraid! Let the earth tremble and the mountains tumble into the deepest sea.
text: Mʋ́ sʋ nɩ ɔyɩ lɛkpɩnkɩ, abʋ lɛkpa yewie ɔpʋ nsɩnɛ kʋraa a, anɩméenya ifu.

ref: Let the ocean roar and foam, and its raging waves shake the mountains.
text: Nɩ ɔpʋ lɛda, bwɛ afu kpʋɔkpʋɔ, ɩlɛkpɩnkɩ abʋ kʋraa a, anɩméenya ifu. Ɩya.

ref: A river and its streams bring joy to the city, which is the sacred home of God Most High.
text: Ntsu tsʋnhɛ ɩkʋ ɩna Bulu wulu amʋtɔ, ɩtɛha ɩnʋ atsiapʋ ansɩ tegyi amʋ́. Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie amʋ onuto otsiakpa nɩ.

ref: God is in that city, and it won't be shaken. He will help it at dawn.
text: Bulu bʋ wulu amʋtɔ, ɩmɛ́ɛdɩda. Ɔbɔ́bʋa mʋ́ bakɛ.

ref: Nations rage! Kingdoms fall! But at the voice of God the earth itself melts.
text: Kpokiti lɛda ɔmá-ɔmátɔ, iwie ogyikpa lɛdɩda. Ɩnʋ Bulu lɛlɛ ɔnɔ, ɔsʋlʋ lɛŋlaɩn.

ref: The Lord All-Powerful is with us. The God of Jacob is our fortress.
text: Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu bʋ anɩ wa. Yakob Bulu amʋ gyi anɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin. Ɩya.

ref: Come! See the fearsome things the Lord has done on earth.
text: Mlɩbɛkɩ Nana Bulu gyumagyihɛ. Alɩá alaha ɔsʋlʋsʋ atɔ layinta.

ref: God brings wars to an end all over the world. He breaks the arrows, shatters the spears, and burns the shields.
text: Ɔtɛka ɩsa tin ɔyɩtɔ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ. Otebiabia ɩta, kaka ɩkpantɔ anyɔ; wa ɩsa akɔtɔ fɛ́ɛ́ ogya.

ref: Our God says, “Calm down, and learn that I am God! All nations on earth will honor me.”
text: Mlɩtsia diin, amlɩbɩá mɩgyi Bulu. Batsu mɩ fʋa ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́tɔ. Bawa mɩ numnyam ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: The Lord All-Powerful is with us. The God of Jacob is our fortress.
text: Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu bʋ anɩ wa. Yakob Bulu amʋ gyi anɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin. Ɩya.

ref: All of you nations, clap your hands and shout joyful praises to God.
text: Ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩpʋ ansigyi da apian, amlɩtswɩ ope kanfʋ Bulu,

ref: The Lord Most High is fearsome, the ruler of all the earth.
text: tsufɛ Nana Bulu, Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ mʋ Wie amʋ ɩwɩ bʋ ifu. Owie kpɔnkpɔɔnkpɔntɩ ogyi ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.

ref: God has put every nation under our power,
text: Ɔtɛba ɔmá-ɔmá asɩ, pʋ amʋ́ wa anɩ asɩ. Ɔlɛha anɩlegyi ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ.

ref: and he chose for us the land that was the pride of Jacob, his favorite.
text: Otekle anɩ Yakob abi-aná asʋn. Mʋ́ sʋ ɔlɛlɛ ɔsʋlʋá igyi anɩ ogyikpa ha anɩ, anɩtɔpʋtsu ɩwɩ. Ɩya.

ref: God goes up to his throne, as people shout and trumpets blast.
text: Bulu lɔpʋ ansigyi dʋ ɔyɔ. Nana Bulu lɔdʋ ɔyɔ, bʋdɛ okitikiti, ɩkpɛ dɛfʋlɩ.

ref: the ruler of all the earth! Praise God with songs.
text: tsufɛ Bulu gyi ɔyɩ fɛ́ɛ́ Owie. Mlɩwa ɩlʋ sunahɛ ha mʋ.

ref: God rules the nations from his sacred throne.
text: Bulu tsie mʋ onuto owie-obiasʋ, ɔdɛ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́sʋ gyi.

ref: Their leaders come together and are now the people of Abraham's God. All rulers on earth surrender their weapons, and God is greatly praised!
text: Ɔmásʋ agyipʋ bafia. Abraham Bulu aha bafia, tsufɛ Bulu bʋ́ ɔyɩtɔ awie fɛ́ɛ́. Batsu mʋ fʋa ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ.

ref: The Lord God is wonderful! He deserves all praise in the city where he lives. His holy mountain,
text: Nana Bulu lomoni. Ɩlɛkana ánɩ́ bɛ́hɩɛ kanfʋ mʋ. Bɛ́kanfʋ mʋ mʋ wulutɔ, igyi wuluá ɩdɩn mʋ onuto ɩbʋ amʋsʋ.

ref: beautiful and majestic, brings joy to all on earth. Mount Zion, truly sacred, is home for the Great King.
text: Sion ɩbʋ lɔfʋa, ɩhɩɛ bʋ akɩlɛ. Ɩbʋ ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ ansigyi. Sion ɩbʋ igyi Bulu otsiakpa. Igyi owie otumipʋ kpɔnkpɔntɩ wulu.

ref: God is there to defend it and has proved to be its protector.
text: Bulu onuto bʋ awie amʋ woyitɔ. Alalɛ ɩwɩ ɔwan ánɩ́ mʋgyi ɔtanʋkpa kinkin ha mʋ́.

ref: Kings joined forces to attack the city,
text: Kɩ, awie bɛtɩ aba fia, kʋsʋ yɔ wulu anfɩ ɔkɔkpa.

ref: but when they saw it, they were terrified and ran away.
text: Tamɛ brɛá bowun mʋ́ a, opuni letsii amʋ́. Begyigya, yinki srɩ.

ref: They trembled all over like women giving birth
text: Bɛkpɩnkɩ kpakpakpakpa, fɛ ɩkwɩɩ dɛ ɔtsɩ dwiin.

ref: or like seagoing ships wrecked by eastern winds.
text: Fɛ alɩá atsufu totsu owi ɔdalɩkpa bobwiebwie Tarsisfɔ ɔpʋsʋ-ayɛn.

ref: We had heard about it, and now we have seen it in the city of our God, the Lord All-Powerful. This is the city that God will let stand forever.
text: Asʋn amʋʋ anɩlonu amʋ anɩlawun a. Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Nana Bulu wulu nɩ. Anɩ Bulu amʋ wulu nɩ. Ɔbɛ́ha ɩbɛ́lɩɩ kinkin brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Ɩya.

ref: Our God, here in your temple we think about your love.
text: Oo Bulu, anɩdɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka ɩwɩ gywɩɩn fʋ ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ.

ref: You are famous and praised everywhere on earth, as you win victories with your powerful arm.
text: Oo Bulu, alɩ amʋʋ fʋ ɩda bʋ ɔtɩnɛgyiɔtɩnɛ amʋ a, alɩ kɛn bʋtɛkanfʋ fʋ yɛtʋ ɔyɩ ɔka nɩ. Yilebwɛ labʋla fʋ gyɔpɩ.

ref: Mount Zion will celebrate, and all Judah will be glad, because you bring justice.
text: Ha ansɩ igyi Sionbʋsʋ atsiapʋ, ansɩ igyi Yuda awulu, tsufɛ fʋtobua asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ.

ref: Let's walk around Zion and count its towers.
text: Mlɩnatɩ tsʋntsʋn Sion. Mlɩki bomli mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́, amlɩkla mʋ́tɔ mbu fʋahɛ.

ref: We will see its strong walls and visit each fortress. Then you can say to future generations,
text: Mlɩlɛ ansɩ kɩ mʋ́ abunti wanklaan. Mlɩkɩ awie-woyi amʋ wanklaan. Fówun mlɔ́pʋbla mlɩ abi-aná mlɩaa,

ref: “Our God is like this forever and will always guide us.”
text: “Alɩ Bulu gyi nɩ. Mʋgyi anɩ Bulu brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Ɔbɛ́kpa anɩ yɛfʋn anɩ owukɛ.”

ref: Everyone on this earth, now listen to what I say!
text: Mlɩ ɔmá fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩnu asʋn anfɩ! Ɔyɩtɔ atsiapʋ fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩyaa asʋ.

ref: Listen, no matter who you are, rich or poor.
text: Nyebi-ahandɛ, ɩwɩ anyapʋ pʋ́ ahianfɔ fɛ́ɛ́!

ref: I speak words of wisdom, and my thoughts make sense.
text: Tsufɛ nɛba bɛblɩ nyansala, mɩ nwuntɔ asʋn ɩbɛ́ha asʋn-asɩnu.

ref: I have in mind a mystery that I will explain while playing my harp.
text: Nɛ́yaa asʋ nu ayebi. Nɔ́pʋ ɔsankuo lɛ ɔtɛ kutuklu asɩ.

ref: Why should I be afraid in times of trouble, when I am surrounded by vicious enemies?
text: Nɩ nowie ɩkplantɔ, mɩ amlɛpʋ bɛkafia mɩ a, ntogyi sʋ nénya ifu?

ref: They trust in their riches and brag about all their wealth.
text: Ɩwɩ anyapʋ anfɩ bapʋ ansɩ dɩnka amʋ́ ɩnyasʋ, bʋdɛpʋ amʋ́ atɔ tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ tsu ɩwɩ.

ref: You cannot buy back your life or pay off God!
text: Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ ka lɛ mʋ pio. Ɔhaa mɛ́ɛtalɩ ka Bulu ɩkɔ, pʋhɔ mʋ pio nkpa.

ref: It costs far too much to buy back your life. You can never pay God enough
text: Tsufɛ ɔha ka lɛ ibia mɛda asɩ. Mátepi bwɛ mʋ́ ɩwɩ agywɩɩn,

ref: to stay alive forever and safe from death.
text: fɛɛ, ilehian ánɩ́ ɔha obétsia nkpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, ɔmɔ́ɔyɔ fuli-ɔbɔtɔ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: We see that wise people die, and so do stupid fools. Then their money is left for someone else.
text: Ɔhagyiɔha towun ánɩ́ anyansapʋ bʋtowu. Aha mimlahɛ pʋ́ aha gyɩmɩhɛ ɛ bʋtowu, si amʋ́ atɔ ha aha bamba.

ref: The grave will be their home forever and ever, although they once had land of their own.
text: Ɩbʋ mʋ́tɔá bʋtɔpʋ amʋ́ ada dɩnka amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ, tamɛ ntsantɔ gyi amʋ́ otsiakpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Our human glory disappears, and, like animals, we die.
text: Nyankpʋsa ɔhɩhɩɛ ɩwɩ alɩágyialɩá a, oméetsia nkpa yɔ. Ogyi fɛ ɔbwɩ, ɔtɔkɔsɩ wu.

ref: Here is what happens to fools and to those who trust the words of fools:
text: Alɩ ɩtɛba ha aha mimlahɛ anfɩ, pʋ́ aha ánɩ́ bʋtegyi amʋ́ asʋnsʋ nɩ. Ɩya.

ref: They are like sheep with death as their shepherd, leading them to the grave. In the morning God's people will walk all over them, as their bodies lie rotting in their home, the grave.
text: Bʋgyi fɛ akufa. Amʋ́ ɔyɔkpa gyi afulitɔ. Lowu ɔbɔ́bwɛ amʋ́ ɔkpapʋ. Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa bégyi amʋ́sʋ nyankɩ. Amʋ́ ɔyʋlʋ bɔ́plɔ fɛ́ɛ́, ɩmɛ́ɛtra dɩ amʋ́ ɔsʋlʋsʋ. Afulitɔ ɔbɔ́bwɛ amʋ́ woyi.

ref: But God will rescue me from the power of death.
text: Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ a, Bulu ɔbɛ́ka lɛ mɩ afulitɔ, tsufɛ ɔbɔ́hɔ mɩ. Ɩya.

ref: Don't let it bother you when others get rich and live in luxury.
text: Nɩ ɔkʋ atonyahɛ imoni, numnyam ɩba mʋ woyisʋ alɩágyialɩá a, ɩmáhan fʋ.

ref: Soon they will die and all their wealth will be left behind.
text: Tsufɛ nɩ owu a, omóotsu kʋkʋ natɩ. Mʋ numnyam ɛ ɩmɛ́ɛkpa mʋ ya.

ref: We humans are praised when we do well, and all of us are glad to be alive.
text: Nɩ ɔtɛkɩá mʋbʋ ansigyitɔ ɔyɩ anfɩtɔ, aha bʋtɛkanfʋ mʋ ánɩ́ oyin mʋ ɩwɩsʋ kɩ kʋraa a,

ref: Our human glory disappears, and, like animals, we die.
text: Nyankpʋsa ɔhɩhɩɛ ɩwɩ alɩágyialɩá a, oméetsia nkpa yɔ. Ogyi fɛ ɔbwɩ, ɔtɔkɔsɩ wu.

ref: From east to west, the powerful Lord God has been calling together everyone on earth.
text: Bulu, Otumipʋ, Nana Bulu dɛtɔɩ. Alatɔɩ tɩ ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́, tsu owi ɔdalɩkpa yeyi mʋ́ ɔkplɩwiekpa.

ref: God shines brightly from Zion, the most beautiful city.
text: Bulu tɔwankɩ tsu Sion, wuluá ɩbʋ akɩlɛ ɔyɩtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Our God approaches, but not silently; a flaming fire comes first, and a storm surrounds him.
text: Anɩ Bulu ɔba, ɔmɛ́ɛkpa ɔnɔ bun. Ogya plɛnplɛn gya mʋ nkpa, ɩdɛ ntobi hɔ. Afu kinkiinkin lɛkafia mʋ.

ref: God comes to judge his people. He shouts to the heavens and to the earth,
text: Alatɩ ɔsʋ mʋ́a asɩ befia ánɩ́ obégyi mʋ aha asʋn.

ref: “Call my followers together! They offered me a sacrifice, and we made an agreement.”
text: Ɔbɛɛ, “Mlɩkpa aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa mɩ ɔma wa abatɔ ha mɩ. Aha amʋʋ bʋtɔbɔ afɔdɩɛ, ka ntam ha mɩ amʋ!”

ref: The heavens announce, “God is the judge, and he is always honest.”
text: Ɔsʋsʋ ɩdɛ mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɔwan lɛ, tsufɛ Bulu onuto amʋ gyi asʋn ogyipʋ. Ɩya.

ref: My people, I am God! Israel, I am your God. Listen to my charges against you.
text: “Oo! mɩ ɔmá, mlɩnu asʋn ánɩ́ nɛ́blɩ. Israelfɔ, nɛ́lɛ mlɩ ɩwɩ asʋn blɩ. Mɩ anfɩ gyi mlɩ Bulu nɩ.

ref: Although you offer sacrifices and always bring gifts,
text: Megyi afɔdɩɛá mlɩdɛbɔ ha mɩ ɩwɩ asʋn ndɛblɩ. Mlɩ atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ ɩbʋ mɩ ansɩtɔ bregyibrɛ.

ref: I won't accept your offerings of bulls and goats.
text: Tamɛ hɔ mmɔ́ɔhɔ mlɩ nnantswie mʋ́a mlɩ akpala,

ref: Every animal in the forest belongs to me, and so do the cattle on a thousand hills.
text: tsufɛ pututɔ mʋ́a abʋsʋ mbwɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyi mɩ klɛ.

ref: I know all the birds in the mountains, and every wild creature is in my care.
text: Mɩbʋ afutɔ mbubwi pʋ́ mbwɩá bʋna ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́.”

ref: If I were hungry, I wouldn't tell you, because I own the world and everything in it.
text: “Nɩ akʋn dɛ mɩ a, mmɛ́ɛbla mlɩ, tsufɛ mɩbʋ ɔyɩ mʋ́a mʋ́tɔ atɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: I am God Most High! The only sacrifice I want is for you to be thankful and to keep your word.
text: Pʋ ɩpan bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha mɩ, afʋka akɔá fotsula ha mɩ Ɔsʋsʋʋsʋ Mʋ Wie.

ref: Pray to me in time of trouble. I will rescue you, and you will honor me.
text: Kpoli mɩ fʋ ɔkplankɛ, nɛ́lɛ fʋ; afʋwa mɩ numnyam.”

ref: But to the wicked I say: “You don't have the right to mention my laws or claim to keep our agreement!
text: Tamɛ Bulu dɛ ɔha lalahɛ mʋ́ fɩtɛ ɔbɛɛ, “Ɔkpa ɔmɔmʋ sʋ fʋdɛ mɩ amandɩɛ blɩ, ntɛ pʋ mɩ ntam dɩnka fʋ ɔnɔsʋ?

ref: You refused correction and rejected my commands.
text: Tsufɛ fʋ mʋ́ fʋtamakleá ntswii fʋ. Fʋtɔtswɩ mɩ asʋn ɛ tsalɩfwɩ.

ref: You made friends with every crook you met, and you liked people who break their wedding vows.
text: Fowun owikplu fakpla buo mʋ. Fʋa mbʋa atɔpʋ bʋ mba.

ref: You talked only about violence and told nothing but lies;
text: Asʋkpan kugyikʋ tɛtalɩ dalɩ fʋ ɔnɔ. Fʋhɩɛ fʋbʋ afunu.

ref: you sat around gossiping, ruining the reputation of your own relatives.”
text: Fʋtetsia asɩ blɩ fʋ pio ɩwɩ asʋn. Fʋtɛtalɩ kpɔɩ fʋ yin mʋ bi kʋraa.

ref: When you did all this, I didn't say a word, and you thought, “God is just like us!” But now I will accuse you.
text: Ɩnɩá fʋdɛ ntobi anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bwɛ mmɛkpla fʋ sʋ a, fʋkɩ fɛɛ, ngyi fɛ fʋ. Nɛ́lɛ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ blɩ, wa ɩyɩn wa fʋ ngya.”

ref: You have ignored me! So pay close attention or I will tear you apart, and no one can help you.
text: “Mɩsʋ atanpʋ, mlɩyi ɩnɩ oyibi. Nɩ megyi alɩ nɛ́tɩtɩ mlɩtɔ pransapransa, ɔhɔpʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋá ɔbɔ́hɔ mlɩ.

ref: The sacrifice that honors me is a thankful heart. Obey me, and I, your God, will show my power to save.
text: Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔtɔpʋ ɩpan bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha mɩ lawa mɩ numnyam. Ɔha ánɩ́ ɔna yilebwɛ ɔkpasʋ a, mʋ nɔ́hɔ nkpa.”

ref: You are kind, God! Please have pity on me. You are always merciful! Please wipe away my sins.
text: Oo Bulu, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ wa awɩtɔlɛ ha mɩ. Fʋ nwewun sʋ tsitsi mɩ lalahɛ.

ref: Wash me clean from all of my sin and guilt.
text: Fwɩ mɩ tsitsa lɛ mɩ ɩwɩ, afʋgyʋra mɩ lɛ mɩ lakpantɔ,

ref: I know about my sins, and I cannot forget the burden of my guilt.
text: tsufɛ nyin lalahɛá nabwɛ. Mɩ ansɩ dɩn mɩ lakpansʋ bregyibrɛ.

ref: You are really the one I have sinned against; I have disobeyed you and have done wrong. So it is right and fair for you to correct and punish me.
text: Fʋ nkʋlɛ, fʋ nkʋlɛ pɛ napʋ ɩla gyi. Nabwɛ ɩtɔá igyi lalahɛ fʋ ansɩtɔ. Mʋ́ sʋ fʋbʋ ɔkpa ha mɩ ɩpɔn, ɔhaa mɛ́ɛlɛ fʋ ɩla.

ref: I have sinned and done wrong since the day I was born.
text: Negyi ɩpɔn brɛá bɔkwɩɩ mɩ. Brɛá mɩ yin dɛ mɩ ɔmɛ kʋraa a, lakpan ɔbwɛpʋ ngyi.

ref: But you want complete honesty, so teach me true wisdom.
text: Ɔnɔkwalɩá itsu ɩklʋn ɔtɔtɔ fʋtekle. Mʋ́ sʋ suna mɩ ɩklʋn ɔtɔtɔɔtɔ nyansa.

ref: Wash me with hyssop until I am clean and whiter than snow.
text: Pʋ ɔtsandɩ gyʋra mɩ, mɩ ɩwɩ ɩtɩn. Bie mɩ ntsu, mɩ anlɩn fɛ atsufolibi.

ref: Let me be happy and joyful! You crushed my bones, now let them celebrate.
text: Ha mɩ annu asʋn ánɩ́ ɩbɛ́ha ansɩ bégyi mɩ. Ha ansɩ igyi mɩ awuá fabiabia.

ref: Turn your eyes from my sin and cover my guilt.
text: Bun ansibi mɩ lakpansʋ, afʋtsitsi mɩ lalahɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Create pure thoughts in me and make me faithful again.
text: Oo Bulu, bwɛ ɩklʋn ánɩ́ mʋ́tɔ lɔwankɩ wa mɩtɔ, afʋlapʋ ɔŋɛ pɔpwɛá ɩbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ wa mɩtɔ.

ref: Don't chase me away from you or take your Holy Spirit away from me.
text: Mátswɩ mɩ tsalɩfwɩ. Máhɔ fʋ Ɔŋɛ Wankɩhɛ lɛ mɩ ɩbɩ.

ref: Make me as happy as you did when you saved me; make me want to obey!
text: Lapʋ ansigyiá ɩbʋ fʋ nkpahɔtɔ wa mɩtɔ. Ha fʋ asʋnsʋgyi ɩbwɛ mɩ ɔdwɛla.

ref: I will teach sinners your Law, and they will return to you.
text: Nósuna aha ánɩ́ bʋtamagyi fʋ mblasʋ fʋ ɔkpa, lakpan abwɛpʋ béyinki ba fʋ wa.

ref: Keep me from any deadly sin. Only you can save me! Then I will shout and sing about your power to save.
text: Oo Bulu, mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, natsitsa obugya, sikie mɩ. Mɛnɩ nɔ́wa fʋ nkpahɔ ɔkpayi.

ref: Help me to speak, and I will praise you, Lord.
text: Mɩ Wie, bwii mɩ ɔnɔ, mɩ antswɩ ope kanfʋ fʋ,

ref: Offerings and sacrifices are not what you want.
text: tsufɛ afɔdɩɛ tamagyi fʋ ansɩ. Nɩ nɔbɔ atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ kʋraa a, fʋmedekle.

ref: The way to please you is to be truly sorry deep in our hearts. This is the kind of sacrifice you won't refuse.
text: Afɔdɩɛá fʋtekle gyi ɩklʋn ánɩ́ ɩlanu ɩwɩasɩ. Oo Bulu, fʋtamakɩ ɔha ánɩ́ alanu ɩwɩasɩ si lakpan bwɛ, ki nwun.

ref: Please be willing, Lord, to help the city of Zion and to rebuild its walls.
text: Bwɛ yile ha Sion, afʋgyi mʋ bʋalɛ. Layinki yi Yerusalem abunti.

ref: Then you will be pleased with the proper sacrifices, and we will offer bulls on your altar once again.
text: Mʋmʋ anɩ afɔdɩɛ yile ibégyi fʋ ansɩ, abɔ́bɔ atɔtɔhɛ-afɔdɩɛ pʋ́ atɔ ogya-afɔdɩɛ, labɔ nnantswie-afɔdɩɛ fʋ afɔdɩɛ-ɔswɩsʋ ha fʋ.

ref: You people may be strong and brag about your sins, but God can be trusted day after day.
text: Ɔha yinhɛ, ntogyi sʋ fʋdɛ ɩwɩ adabi da, lalahɛá fʋdɛpʋgyi Bulu aha sʋ? Ekekegyiɛkɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛ fɛ́ɛ́,

ref: You plan brutal crimes, and your lying words cut like a sharp razor.
text: fʋdɛ lalahɛ susu. Ofunupʋ olembiapʋ, fʋ ɔdandʋ bʋ ogya fɛ ɔdayibi.

ref: You would rather do evil than good, and tell lies than speak the truth.
text: Fʋtekle lalahɛ dʋn yile, fʋtekle afunu ɛ dʋn ɔnɔkwalɩ. Ɩya.

ref: You love to say cruel things, and your words are a trap.
text: Ofunupʋ, asʋkpan ánɩ́ ɩbɛ́tɩ lowu ha fʋ aba fʋtekle.

ref: God will destroy you forever! He will grab you and drag you from your homes. You will be uprooted and left to die.
text: Tamɛ Bulu ɔbɛ́da fʋ lɛ da, fʋmɛ́ɛtra kʋsʋ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ. Ɔbɛ́lɛ fʋ lɛ fʋ tati-obuto, puli fʋ lɛ akɩankpapʋ ɔsʋlʋsʋ. Ɩya.

ref: When good people see this fearsome sight, they will laugh and say,
text: Aha yile bówun, nya ifu. Bɔ́mɔsɩ fʋ blɩ bɛɛ,

ref: “Just look at them now! Instead of trusting God, they trusted their wealth and their cruelty.”
text: “Kɩ, ntɔ dɛ ɔha yinhɛ anfɩ bwɛ? Ɔtamasrɩ tanʋ Bulu, ɩnyasʋ ɔlɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka, pʋ atonyahɛ bwɛ mʋ ɔtanʋkpa.”

ref: But I am like an olive tree growing in God's house, and I can count on his love forever and ever.
text: Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ ngyi fɛ olif-oyiá ɩlayɛyɛɩ, ɩlɩɩ Bulu woyitɔ. Mɩ ansɩ dɩn Bulu ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔkasʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: I will always thank God for what he has done; I will praise his good name when his people meet.
text: Oo Bulu, nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, fʋ bwɛhɛ sʋ. Nɛ́da fʋ ɩda ɔkan aha ánɩ́ bʋtamakpa fʋ ɔma ansɩtɔ, tsufɛ fʋbʋ alɛ.

ref: Only a fool would say, “There is no God!” People like that are worthless! They are heartless and cruel and never do right.
text: Aha mimlahɛ nkʋlɛ dɛ amʋ́ ɩwɩ bla bɛɛ, “Bulu má ɩnʋ.” Bayinta, bamli mbusuo abɔpʋ. Ɔbakʋlɛ kʋraa mɛ́dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.

ref: From heaven God looks down to see if anyone is wise enough to search for him.
text: Nana Bulu tɛkɩ anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ sɩsɩ tsu ɔsʋsʋ, kɩ bɛɛ, menya ɔtɩansɩpʋ ɔkʋá otodunka mʋ ɔkpa.

ref: But all of them are crooked and corrupt. Not one of them does right.
text: Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ badamli ɔma ha Bulu. Amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bafwɩ ɔkpa. Yile ɔbwɛpʋ ɔkʋkʋ má ɩnʋ. Ɔbakʋlɛ kʋraa mɛ́dalɩ amʋ́tɔ.

ref: Won't you lawbreakers learn? You refuse to pray, and you gobble up the people of God.
text: Nana Bulu ɔbɛɛ, “Mʋ́ sʋ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋmóonu asʋn asɩ ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ? Bʋdɛ mɩ aha wɩ fɛ iye bʋdɛwɩ, bʋtamasu kpoli mɩ.”

ref: But you will be terrified worse than ever before. God will scatter the bones of his enemies, and you will be ashamed when God rejects you.
text: Ɩnʋ ifu bɛ́kɩta amʋ́ ɔtɩnɛá ifu ɩma, tsufɛ Bulu ɔbɛ́da Israelfɔ alupʋ awú saɩn. Pɛlɩ bɛ́kɩta amʋ́, tsufɛ Bulu lakpa amʋ́ ɔma.

ref: I long for someone from Zion to come and save Israel! Our God, when you bless your people again, Jacob's family will be glad, and Israel will celebrate.
text: Nhɩɛ ndɛ Bulu kokoli mbɛɛ, ɔkʋ otsu Sionbʋsʋ bɔhɔ Israelfɔ. Ɛkɛá Bulu ɔbɛ́latsu mʋ aha kʋsʋ a, ɩhɩɛ wa Yakob abi-aná ɔdwɛ, ansɩ ɩhɩɛ gyi Israelfɔ.

ref: Save me, God, by your power and prove that I am right.
text: Oo Bulu, pʋ fʋ ɩda hɔ mɩ, afʋpʋ fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn gyi mɩ asʋn ha mɩ.

ref: Listen to my prayer and hear what I say.
text: Oo Bulu, nu mɩ mpaɩ. Yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ kokoli.

ref: Cruel strangers have attacked and want me dead. Not one of them cares about you.
text: Afɔɔ bakʋsʋ lɩɩ mɩsʋ. Awuntɔlɩnpʋá Bulu mégyi tɔtɔɔtɔ amʋ́ ansɩsʋ bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ. Ɩya.

ref: You will help me, Lord God, and keep me from falling;
text: Kɩ, Bulu gyi mɩ bʋalɛ ogyipʋ. Mɩ Wie dɛ mɩ nkpa ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: you will punish my enemies for their evil deeds. Be my faithful friend and destroy them.
text: Pʋ mɩ alupʋ lalahɛ ka amʋ́ ɩkɔ. Fʋbʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ ha mɩ, sʋ mɔ amʋ́.

ref: I will bring a gift and offer a sacrifice to you, Lord. I will praise your name because you are good.
text: Nɔ́bɔ mɩ apɛtɔ-afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ. Nana Bulu, nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ ɩda, tsufɛ fʋbʋ alɛ.

ref: Listen, God, to my prayer! Don't reject my request.
text: Oo Bulu, yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ mpaɩ. Mákina mɩ kokoli.

ref: Please listen and help me. My thoughts are troubled, and I keep groaning
text: Yaa asʋ nu mɩ isu, afʋsɔ mɩ ɔnɔ. Mɩ asʋn wunhɛ ladʋn mɩ. Nagyigya,

ref: because my enemies attack with loud shouts. They treat me terribly and hold angry grudges.
text: mɩ alupʋ asʋn blɩhɛ pʋ́ aha lalahɛ asɩá bʋdɛ mɩ ba sʋ. Tsufɛ bapʋ ipian dɩnka mɩsʋ, mɩ ɩwɩ ɔblɔ laha bʋdɛ mɩ lu.

ref: My heart is racing fast, and I am afraid of dying.
text: Mɩ ɩklʋn mɛdɩ mɩ asɩ. Opuni dɛ mɩ tsii, ndekle anwu.

ref: I am trembling with fear, completely terrified.
text: Ifu dɛ mɩ, ndɛkpɩnkɩ kpakpakpakpa. Ɩwɩ mesi mɩ kpɩnkɩ.

ref: I wish I had wings like a dove, so I could fly far away and be at peace.
text: Ao! Tɛkɩ nɩ mbʋ atɛ fɛ lɔpɔ a, tɛkɩ nófuli yɛda ɔkpʋnʋ ɔtɩnɛkʋ.

ref: I would go and live in some distant desert.
text: Ee, tɛkɩ nɔ́yɔ tsutsuutsu, ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ ɔtɩnɛkʋ. Ɩya.

ref: I would quickly find shelter from howling winds and raging storms.
text: Tɛkɩ nɔ́kɔsɩ dunka oŋainkpa ha ɩwɩ, si afu mʋ́a alankpla anfɩ.

ref: Confuse my enemies, Lord! Upset their plans. Cruelty and violence are all I see in the city,
text: Mɩ Wie, ha amʋ́ abʋgyigya, amʋ́ ɔdandʋ imlimli, tsufɛ owuntɔlɩn mʋ́a ɩkɔ́ gyi tɔá ndewun wulu amʋtɔ.

ref: and they are like guards on patrol day and night. The city is full of trouble, evil,
text: Bʋtobomli wulu amʋ ɔpa-onye, lalahɛbwɛ mʋ́a asʋn wunhɛ sɔɔn bʋ mʋ́tɔ.

ref: and corruption. Troublemakers and liars freely roam the streets.
text: Asʋkpangyi bʋ wulu amʋtɔ. Ahamlɛ pʋ́ ahasisi tamakpa mʋ́ dɩnsʋ.

ref: My enemies are not the ones who sneer and make fun. I could put up with that or even hide from them.
text: Nɩ mɩ olupʋ dɛ mɩ sʋpa a, tɛkɩ nótomi. Nɩ mɩ olupʋ dɛ ɩwɩ tsu suna mɩ a, tɛkɩ nódunka ɩwɩ ɔwakpa.

ref: But it was my closest friend, the one I trusted most.
text: Tamɛ fʋ mɩ ba, mɩ nyawie pʋ́ mɩ ɔbɩsʋfɛá nhɩɛ nyin fʋ, dɛpʋ ɩnɩ gyi mɩ.

ref: We enjoyed being together, when we went with others to your house, our God.
text: Tɛkɩ mɩa fʋnyɔ tɛbla aba anɩ awuntɔsʋ, natɩ buo ɔdɔm yɔ Bulu woyitɔ.

ref: All who hate me are controlled by the power of evil. Sentence them to death and send them down alive to the world of the dead.
text: Mɩ alupʋ lowu ifwie amʋ́tɔ. Bʋyɔ afulitɔ amʋ́ ansɩ bʋya, tsufɛ lalahɛ labʋla amʋ́ woyi pʋ́ amʋ́ klʋntɔ.

ref: I ask for your help, Lord God, and you will keep me safe.
text: Mɩ mʋ́ nósu kpoli Bulu. Nana Bulu ɔbɔ́hɔ mɩ.

ref: Morning, noon, and night you hear my concerns and my complaints.
text: Nyankɩ, ɔpa, ntʋpwɛ fɛ́ɛ́ nósu kʋklʋkʋʋ bla mʋ mɩ asʋn, obónu mɩ ɔmɛ.

ref: I am attacked from all sides, but you will rescue me unharmed by the battle.
text: Aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋdɛ mɩ ɩsa kɔ, tamɛ ɔbɛ́lɛ mɩ lɛ amʋ́ ɩbɩ. Tɔtɔɔtɔ mɔ́ɔbwɛ mɩ.

ref: You have always ruled, and you will hear me. You will defeat my enemies because they won't turn and worship you.
text: Bulu dɛ iwiegyi tsu bɩmbɩ ɔpá. Ɩya. Obónu mɩ isu, ba amʋ́ asɩ. Tsufɛ mɩ alupʋ amʋ bʋtamatsɛ, bʋtamanya Bulu ifu.

ref: My friend turned against me and broke his promise.
text: Mɩ nyawie lakpa mʋ nyawie ɔma. Alatʋn mɩa mʋnyɔ ntam.

ref: His words were smoother than butter, and softer than olive oil. But hatred filled his heart, and he was ready to attack with a sword.
text: Mʋ asʋn blɩhɛ bʋ ɔdwɛ dʋn ɔkwɛn, tamɛ ɩsakɔ asʋn bʋ mʋ ɩklʋntɔ. Mʋ asʋn lɔpɔn dʋn adɔmpɔ, tamɛ igyi fɛ ɔdayiá bapio mʋ́ lɛ.

ref: Our Lord, we belong to you. We tell you what worries us, and you won't let us fall.
text: Pʋ fʋ asʋn fɛ́ɛ́ wa Nana Bulu ɩbɩtɔ, ɔbɛ́kpa fʋ. Ɔmɛ́ɛha ɔha yile mɛ́ɛdɩda.

ref: But what about those people who are cruel and brutal? You will throw them down into the deepest pit long before their time. I trust you, Lord!
text: Tamɛ fʋ Bulu, fɔ́tswɩ aha lalahɛ amʋ wa ɔbɔ kluklu amʋtɔ dodoodo, asa amʋ́ nkɛ ɩbɛ́ta fʋn. Tsufɛ fɛ́kpa aha amɔpʋ pʋ́ afunupʋ tsitsa, tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ nɔ́pʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ.

ref: Have pity, God Most High! My enemies chase me all day.
text: Oo Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ, tsufɛ aha batsatsa mɩsʋ. Alupʋ bʋdɛ mɩ yia manta ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́.

ref: Many of them are pursuing and attacking me,
text: Mɩ alupʋ batsatsa mɩsʋ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́, aha tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ bʋdɛ mɩ kɔ ɩwɩtsusʋ.

ref: but even when I am afraid, I keep on trusting you.
text: Nɩ ifu ɩkɩta mɩ a, ntɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka fʋsʋ.

ref: I praise your promises! I trust you and am not afraid. No one can harm me.
text: Bulu asʋn ntɛkanfʋ. Bulusʋ ntɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka, ifu tamakɩta mɩ. Ntɔ nyankpʋsa ɔbɛ́talɩ bwɛ mɩ?

ref: Enemies spend the whole day finding fault with me; all they think about is how to do me harm.
text: Bʋtɛtsɛ mɩ ɔnɔ ekekegyiɛkɛ ɔyɩkɛhɛtɔ fɛ́ɛ́. Mɩ ɩwɩ agywɩɩn lalahɛ kotoo bʋtɔbwɛ.

ref: They attack from ambush, watching my every step and hoping to kill me.
text: Bakpa aba bʋdɛ mɩ tɛ, bʋdɛ yabi kugyikʋá ndɛlɛ kɩ. Bʋdekleá bɔ́mɔ mɩ kokooko.

ref: They won't get away with these crimes, God, because when you get angry, you destroy people.
text: Amʋ́ owuntɔlɩn sʋ ka amʋ́ ɩkɔ. Oo Bulu, pʋ ɔblɔ lɛ ɔmá-ɔmá anfɩ da.

ref: You have kept record of my days of wandering. You have stored my tears in your bottle and counted each of them.
text: Fʋyin mɩ ɩkplan fɛ́ɛ́. Sʋta mɩ ntsú wa fʋ otuntutɔ. Megyi fʋ ɔwʋlʋtɔ mʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋ?

ref: When I pray, Lord God, my enemies will retreat, because I know for certain that you are with me.
text: Mʋmʋ ɛkɛá nokpoli fʋ a, mɩ alupʋ fɛ́ɛ́ béyinki ɔma. Nhɩɛ nyin ánɩ́ fʋbuo mɩ.

ref: I praise your promises!
text: Bulu asʋn ntɛkanfʋ. Nana Bulu asʋn ntɛkanfʋ.

ref: I trust you and am not afraid. No one can harm me.
text: Bulusʋ ntɔpʋ ansɩ dɩnka, ifu tamakɩta mɩ. Ntɔ nyankpʋsa ɔbɛ́talɩ bwɛ mɩ?

ref: I will keep my promises to you, my God, and bring you gifts.
text: Oo Bulu, ilehian ánɩ́ nɛ́ka akɔá notsula ha fʋ, pʋ ɩpan bɔ afɔdɩɛ ha fʋ.

ref: You protected me from death and kept me from stumbling, so that I would please you and follow the light that leads to life.
text: Tsufɛ fɛlɛ mɩ tsu lowutɔ. Ee, fʋmɛha mmosutin. Mʋ́ sʋ nɛ́talɩ natɩ fʋ ansɩtɔ, fʋ wankɩá ɩtɛha nkpatɔ.

ref: God Most High, have pity on me! Have mercy. I run to you for safety. In the shadow of your wings, I seek protection till danger dies down.
text: Wun mɩ nwɛ. Oo Bulu, wun mɩ nwɛ! Tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa. Fʋ abambasɩ naŋain, yɛfʋn brɛá alankpla anfɩ ɩlaka itin.

ref: You will send help from heaven and save me, but you will bring trouble on my attackers. You are faithful, and you can be trusted.
text: Ɔbɔ́wa tsu ɔsʋsʋ bɔhɔ mɩ. Ɔbɔ́sʋpa aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩsʋ tsatsa. Ɩya. Ɔbɔ́wa mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ mʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ sɩsɩ.

ref: My enemies are fierce, much worse than lions! They have spears and arrows instead of teeth, and they have sharp swords instead of tongues.
text: Alupʋá bʋgyi fɛ agyata nsɩnɛ nkplan. Amʋ́tɛtɩtɩ nyankpʋsa aye. Amʋ́ ayin gyi fɛ ɩkpan mʋ́a mbɩn. Amʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ogya fɛ ɔdayi.

ref: May you, my God, be honored above the heavens; may your glory be seen everywhere on earth.
text: Oo Bulu, tsu fʋ ɩwɩ fʋa dafa ɔsʋsʋ, afʋha fʋ numnyam ɩbʋla ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́!

ref: Enemies set traps for my feet and struck me down. They dug a pit in my path, but fell in it themselves.
text: Bafɩnɩ ayibi mɩ ɔtsʋnkpa. Awʋrɛhɔ lada mɩ tswɩ. Bakwi ɔbɔ mɩ ɔkpasʋ, tamɛ amʋ́ onuto bakpawie mʋ́tɔ. Ɩya.

ref: I am faithful to you, and you can trust me. I will sing and play music for you, my God.
text: Fʋ nkʋlɛsʋ mɩ ansɩ dɩn. Oo Bulu, mɩ ɩklʋn dɩn fʋsʋ. Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ, ee nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ.

ref: I feel wide awake! I will wake up my harp and wake up the sun.
text: Mɩ ɔkla, tsinki. Akwɛ mʋ́a nsankuo, mlɩtsinki. Nétsinki bakɛ.

ref: I will praise you, Lord, for everyone to hear, and I will sing hymns to you in every nation.
text: Mɩ Wie, nɛ́da fʋ ɩpan ahatɔ. Nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɔmá-ɔmátɔ.

ref: Your love reaches higher than the heavens; your loyalty extends beyond the clouds.
text: Tsufɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka lɔfʋa dafa ɔsʋsʋ. Fʋ ɔnɔkwalɩ lɔfʋa wɔ nwʋlʋta.

ref: May you, my God, be honored above the heavens; may your glory be seen everywhere on earth.
text: Oo Bulu, tsu fʋ ɩwɩ fʋa dafa ɔsʋsʋ, afʋha fʋ numnyam ɩbʋla ɔsʋlʋsʋ fɛ́ɛ́!

ref: Do you mighty people talk only to oppose justice? Don't you ever judge fairly?
text: Atumipʋ, lɛlɛ mlɩtɛblɩ asʋn ánɩ́ ɩda ɔkpa? Mlɩtegyi asʋn ɔnɔkwalɩsʋ ha aha?

ref: You are always planning evil, and you are brutal.
text: O-o, lalahɛ bʋ mlɩ ɩklʋntɔ. Owuntɔlɩnla mlɩtɔbwɛ ɔsʋlʋsʋ.

ref: You have done wrong and lied from the day you were born.
text: Lalahɛ abwɛpʋ bʋbʋ ɩwɩtɔ, bɔfwɩ ɔkpa. Tsu amʋ́ ɩkwɩɩbɩ ɔpá bʋna bʋdɛtsʋntsʋn, bʋdɛ afunu wa.

ref: Your words spread poison like the bite of a cobra
text: Bʋbʋ elin fɛ ɩwɔ. Bʋgyi sapa ɔkʋá oletila asʋ.

ref: that refuses to listen to the snake charmer.
text: Ɔfapʋ ɔkplʋn wa mʋ, ɔtamakpla. Ɔfapʋá ɔlɛhɩɛ blɩ ɔfa mʋ, ɩtamakɩta mʋ.

ref: My enemies are fierce as lions, Lord God! Shatter their teeth. Snatch out their fangs.
text: Oo Bulu, kpakpa lalahɛ abwɛpʋ anfɩ ayín. Oo Nana Bulu, tsii gyata-abi anfɩ ayín-kɩtatɔ!

ref: Make them disappear like leaking water, and make their arrows miss.
text: Ha abʋŋa fɛ ntsu kpɩhɛ. Nɩ bɛbɩtɩ amʋ́ ɩta a, amʋ́ mbɩn ɔnɔ iwu.

ref: Let them dry up like snails or be like a child that dies before seeing the sun.
text: Bʋbwɛ fɛ obiɛn ánɩ́ ɔna ɔdɛkpɩkpɩ. Bʋmáwun owi fɛ ɔmɛtsitsa.

ref: Wipe them out quicker than a pot can be heated by setting thorns on fire.
text: Fɔ́pʋ ɔblɔ fɛɩ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ tsitsa ɔsasʋ, dʋn alɩá ntsuá ɩdɩn abotodua ogyasʋ tɔkɔsɩ fu.

ref: Good people will be glad when they see the wicked getting what they deserve, and they will wash their feet in their enemies' blood.
text: Ɔha yile ansɩ bégyi mʋ nɩ owun ɔha lalahɛ ɩkɔ ɔkakpa. Ɔbɔ́fwɩ mʋ ayabi ɔha lalahɛ obugyatɔ.

ref: Everyone will say, “It's true! Good people are rewarded. God does indeed rule the earth with justice.”
text: Aha bɛ́blɩ bɛɛ, “Lɛlɛ, yile ɔbwɛpʋ bʋ mʋ ɩpanda. Lɛlɛ, Bulu bʋ ɩnʋá otegyi aha asʋn ɔsʋlʋsʋ.”

ref: Save me, God! Protect me from enemy attacks!
text: Mɩ Bulu, lɛ mɩ lɛ mɩ alupʋ ɩbɩtɔ. Gyi ɩban wa mɩ tsu mɩsʋ akʋsʋlɩɩpʋ ɩbɩtɔ.

ref: Keep me safe from brutal people who want to kill me.
text: Lɛ mɩ lɛ lalahɛ abwɛpʋ ɩbɩ. Hɔ mɩ lɛ obugya atsitsapʋ ɩbɩ.

ref: Merciless enemies, Lord, are hiding and plotting, hoping to kill me. I have not hurt them in any way at all.
text: Kɩ, bʋgyoá bɔ́mɔ mɩ. Awuntɔlɩnpʋ bafia mɩ nwunsʋ. Nana Bulu, megyi lalahɛ kʋkʋ nabwɛ, ntɛ asʋkpan ɩkʋ nagyi.

ref: But they are ready to attack. Do something! Help me! Look at what's happening.
text: Tsufɛ megyi mɩ bwɛhɛ kʋkʋ sʋ bʋsrɩ bʋdɛ ɩwɩsʋ da. Kʋsʋ kɩ tɔá ɩdɛ mʋ́sʋ yɔ, afʋbʋa mɩ.

ref: Lord God All-Powerful, you are the God of Israel. Punish the other nations and don't pity those terrible and rebellious people.
text: Ɩsa Ɔnɔ Ɔlɩɩpʋ Bulu, Nana Bulu, fʋgyi Israel Bulu! Kʋsʋ afʋbɩtɩ ɔmá anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɩsʋ. Máwun aha atɔpʋ lalahɛ ɔkʋkʋ nwɛ. Ɩya.

ref: My enemies return at evening, growling like dogs roaming the city.
text: Bʋteyinki ba ntʋpwɛ, bʋdɛkplʋn fɛ akɩaɩ, bomli wulu amʋ.

ref: They curse, and their words cut like swords, as they say to themselves, “No one can hear us!”
text: Kɩ, bʋtɛkpakpa asiabi bun. Amʋ́ ɔnɔ klakla fɛ ɔdayi, bʋdɛblɩ bɛɛ, “Ɔhaa medenu.”

ref: You, Lord, laugh at them and sneer at the nations.
text: Tamɛ Nana Bulu, mɔsɩ fʋdɛ amʋ́, fʋdɛ ɔmá anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ ɔblɔla bwɛ.

ref: You are my mighty fortress, and I depend on you.
text: Mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, ndɛ fʋ ɔkpa kɩ, tsufɛ fʋ Bulu gyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin.

ref: You love me and will let me see my enemies defeated.
text: Mɩ Bulu ɔbɔ́pʋ mʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka befia mɩ. Ɔbɛ́ha nówun alɩá nagyi mɩ alupʋsʋ.

ref: Don't kill them, or everyone may forget! Just use your mighty power to make them tremble and fall. You are a shield for your people.
text: Mámɔ amʋ́, mɛnɩ mɩ aha Israelfɔ bʋmɛ́ɛtan mʋ́sʋ. Pʋ fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn da amʋ́ saɩn, afʋfɩn amʋ́ da. Oo anɩ Wie, fʋgyi anɩ kʋtʋ.

ref: My enemies are liars! So let them be trapped by their boastful lies.
text: Amʋ́ asʋn lalahɛ blɩ, amʋ́ ɔnɔ asʋn sʋ ha amʋ́ ɩwɩtsu ɩkpa kɩta amʋ́ fɛ agbla. Amʋ́ ɩlwɩɩ pʋ́ amʋ́ afunuwa sʋ,

ref: Get angry and destroy them. Leave them in ruin. Then all the nations will know that you rule in Israel.
text: pʋ ɔblɔ mɔ amʋ́. Mɔ amʋ́ plɩplɩplɩ. Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́ abʋwun ánɩ́ Bulu dɛ iwie gyi Yakob ɔmásʋ. Ɩya.

ref: Those liars return at evening, growling like dogs roaming the city.
text: Bʋteyinki ba ntʋpwɛ, bʋdɛkplʋn fɛ akɩaɩ, bomli wulu amʋ.

ref: They search for scraps of food, and they snarl until they are stuffed.
text: Bʋna bʋdeki dunka atogyihɛ, tamɛ nɩ bʋmɔmwɛ a, bʋtɔkplʋn.

ref: But I will sing about your strength, my God, and I will celebrate because of your love. You are my fortress, my place of protection in times of trouble.
text: Tamɛ mɩ mʋ́ nɔ́wa fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn ɩwɩ ɩlʋ. Nyankɩ-nyankɩ nɔ́pʋ ansigyi kplʋn wa ɩlʋ, fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka sʋ. Tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin pʋ́ mɩ oŋainkpa mɩ ɔkplankɛ.

ref: I will sing your praises! You are my mighty fortress, and you love me.
text: Mɩ ɔwʋnlɩn, nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ, tsufɛ Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin. Fʋtɛlɛ fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka suna mɩ.

ref: You, God, are angry with us! We are rejected and crushed. Make us strong again!
text: Ao Bulu, fasi anɩ wa ɔkpa, fabwii ɩbɩ anɩsʋ. Fanya ɔblɔ wa anɩ, lakpa anɩ wa.

ref: You made the earth shake and split wide open; now heal its wounds and stop its trembling.
text: Fʋlɛha ɔsʋlʋ lɛkpɩnkɩ, ɩlɛbaba. Yinkia mʋ́ tsa aba, tsufɛ idekle ɩmaɩn-maɩn.

ref: You brought hard times on your people, and you gave us wine that made us stagger.
text: Faha fʋ aha bahɩɛ wun ipian. Faha anɩ nta anɩlanun bʋ, anɩna anɩdɛ ntinta bɔ.

ref: You gave a signal to those who worship you, so they could escape from enemy arrows.
text: Fʋlayi ɔfranka ha fʋ ifu anyapʋ, mɛnɩ bɛ́srɩ yɔ mʋ́ asɩ, amʋ́ alupʋ mbɩn mɛ́ɛda amʋ́. Ɩya.

ref: Answer our prayers, God! Use your powerful arm and give us victory. Then the people you love will be safe.
text: Pʋ fʋ tumi ha anɩ agyi ɩsʋ, afʋsɔ anɩ ɔnɔ, mɛnɩ fɛ́lɛ fʋ adwɛpʋ.

ref: Our God, you solemnly promised, “I would gladly divide up the city of Shechem and give away Succoth Valley piece by piece.
text: Bulu latɔɩ tsu mʋ otsiakpa ɔbɛɛ, “Néye Sekem wulutɔ ansigyisʋ. Nósusu Sukot tsonkoli, ye mʋ́tɔ.

ref: The lands of Gilead and Manasseh are mine. Ephraim is my war helmet, and Judah is the symbol of my royal power.
text: Mɩbʋ Gilead pʋ́ Manase. Efraim gyi mɩ kʋtʋpa. Yuda ɛ gyi mɩ akɔnfra.

ref: Moab is merely my washbasin. Edom belongs to me, and I shout in triumph over the Philistines.”
text: Tamɛ Moab gyi mɩ atɔ ɔfwɩkpa. Edom gyi mɩ ntʋkʋta ɔwɔɩtswɩkpa. Filistifɔsʋ ntɔwa ɔkpayi.”

ref: Our God, who will bring me to the fortress, or lead me to Edom?
text: Oo Bulu, ma ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ ya wulu anfɩ bɔpwɛ abunti kpekple fʋahɛ wa mʋ́ anfɩtɔ? Ma ɔbɛ́kpa mɩ négyi Edomsʋ?

ref: Have you rejected us and deserted our armies?
text: Bulu, megyi fʋlasi anɩ wa ɔkpa? Fasi anɩ akɔpʋ kpa.

ref: Help us defeat our enemies! No one else can rescue us.
text: Tsa anɩ agyi anɩ alupʋsʋ. Nyankpʋsa mbʋa mʋ́ kpalɩ igyi.

ref: You will give us victory and crush our enemies.
text: Anɩ hayinhɛbwɛ itsu Bulu wa, tsufɛ mʋ ɔbɛ́tsatsa anɩ alupʋsʋ.

ref: Please listen, God, and answer my prayer!
text: Oo Bulu, nu mɩ isu. Yaa asʋ afʋnu mɩ mpaɩ.

ref: I feel hopeless, and I cry out to you from a faraway land. Lead me to the mighty rock high above me.
text: Nlɩɩ ɔsʋlʋ ɔka tsutsuutsu, ndesu kpoli fʋ. Asʋn ladʋn mɩ klʋn, tsu mɩ lɩɩ bʋta fʋahɛsʋ.

ref: You are a strong tower, where I am safe from my enemies.
text: Tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔtanʋkpa, obu fʋahɛá iletri mɩ alupʋ sʋ.

ref: Let me live with you forever and find protection under your wings, my God.
text: Ha mɩ antsia fʋ otsiakpa brɛ fɛ́ɛ́! Mɩ anya ɔtanʋkpa fʋ abambasɩ. Ɩya.

ref: You heard my promises, and you have blessed me, just as you bless everyone who worships you.
text: Tsufɛ Bulu, fanu ɩkɔá notsula ha fʋ. Fapʋ aha ánɩ́ bʋtenya fʋ ɩda ifu ogyikpa ɩkʋ ha mɩ.

ref: Let the king have a long and healthy life.
text: Dɩnka owie nkɛsʋ, mʋ abi-aná abʋdan tʋ mʋ.

ref: May he always rule with you, God, at his side; may your love and loyalty watch over him.
text: Oo Bulu, ha mʋ ogyi iwie fʋ ansɩtɔ brɛ fɛ́ɛ́. Ha fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka pʋ́ ɔnɔkwalɩ ɩkpa mʋ.

ref: I will sing your praises forever, God, and will always keep my promises.
text: Mɛnɩ nɔ́wa ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ ɩda brɛ fɛ́ɛ́, brɛá ndɛ mɩ ɩkɔá notsula ka ekekegyiɛkɛ.

ref: Only God can save me, and I calmly wait for him.
text: Mɩ ɔkla labwɛ diin, ɔdɛ Bulu ansɩtɔ kɩ wʋlɛ, tsufɛ mʋ ɩbɩtɔ nénya nkpahɔ tsu.

ref: God alone is the mighty rock that keeps me safe and the fortress where I am secure.
text: Mʋ nkʋlɛ gyi mɩ ɩbʋta, mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ pʋ́ mɩ okpikplikpa. Mʋ́ sʋ mmɛ́ɛdɩda ɛkɛkɛɛkɛ.

ref: I feel like a shaky fence or a sagging wall. How long will all of you attack and assault me?
text: Ɔmɛnkɛ mlési mɩ nkʋlɛ han? Mlɩ fɛ́ɛ́ mlɩdekleá mlɛ́lɛ mɩ ɩnʋ, fɛ bunti ntɛ ɩban bwiehɛ?

ref: You want to bring me down from my place of honor. You love to tell lies, and when your words are kind, hatred hides in your heart.
text: Lɛlɛ, mlɩlabwɛ agywɩɩn kʋlɛ, mlɛ́kplɩ mɩ obiasʋ. Afunuwa bʋ mlɩ ɔdwɛ. Mlɩtɔpʋ ɔnɔ yula mɩ, tamɛ mlɩ ɩklʋntɔ mʋ́ lwɩɩ mlɩdɛ mɩ. Ɩya.

ref: Only God gives inward peace, and I depend on him.
text: Mɩ ɔkla, tsia diin afʋkɩ Bulu ansɩtɔ; tsufɛ mʋ ɔkpa ndɛkɩ.

ref: God alone is the mighty rock that keeps me safe, and he is the fortress where I feel secure.
text: Mʋ nkʋlɛ gyi mɩ ɩbʋta, mɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ pʋ́ mɩ ɔtanʋkpa kinkin. Mʋ́ sʋ mmɛ́ɛdɩda.

ref: God saves me and honors me. He is that mighty rock where I find safety.
text: Mɩ nkpahɔ pʋ́ mɩ numnyam itsu Bulu wa. Mʋgyi mɩ ɩbʋta kpekple pʋ́ mɩ okpikplikpa.

ref: Trust God, my friends, and always tell him each of your concerns. God is our place of safety.
text: Anyankpʋsa, mlɩpʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋsʋ bregyibrɛ. Mlɩlɛ mlɩ ɩkplan fɛ́ɛ́ bla mʋ, tsufɛ mʋgyi anɩ okpikplikpa. Ɩya.

ref: We humans are only a breath; none of us are truly great. All of us together weigh less than a puff of air.
text: Lɛlɛ, nyebi-ahandɛ bʋgyi fɛ afu. Ɩwɩ anyapʋ ɛ bʋmegyi tɔtɔ. Kali amʋ́ afʋkɩ. Amʋ́ aku anyɔ anfɩ fɛ́ɛ́ bʋgyi fɛ dantapu.

ref: Don't trust in violence or depend on dishonesty or rely on great wealth.
text: Mápʋ ansɩ dɩnka adufudɩɛ atɔsʋ. Másusuá fénya tɔkʋ tsu owitɔ. Nɩ fʋ atɔ ɩklɛɩ kʋraa a, mápʋ ansɩ dɩnka mʋ́sʋ.

ref: I heard God say two things: “I am powerful,
text: Bulu latɔɩ, nanu mʋ́ lanu ánɩ́ mʋbʋ tumi.

ref: and I am very kind.” The Lord rewards each of us according to what we do.
text: Mɩ Wie, ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka igyi fʋ klɛ, tsufɛ fʋtɛka nyankpʋsa ɩkɔ mʋ bwɛhɛ ɔnɔ.

ref: You are my God. I worship you. In my heart, I long for you, as I would long for a stream in a scorching desert.
text: O Bulu, fʋgyi mɩ Bulu. Fʋ ndedunka. Fʋ ɩwɩ ɔmɛwʋlɩ dɛ mɩ ɔkla. Fʋ dunka laha ɩwɩ labwɛ mɩ yɔyɔɔyɔ, fɛ ɔsʋlʋ wʋlɩhɛ dɛ ntsu dunka.

ref: I have seen your power and your glory in the place of worship.
text: Brɛ ɩkʋtɔ nowun fʋ fʋ otsiakpa ɩnʋ, nowun fʋ tumi pʋ́ fʋ numnyam.

ref: Your love means more than life to me, and I praise you.
text: Fʋ ɔdwɛá ɩma ɔka bʋ alɛ dʋn nkpa. Mʋ́ sʋ nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ.

ref: As long as I live, I will pray to you.
text: Nɛ́kanfʋ fʋ mɩ nkpatɔ fɛ́ɛ́, tsu ɩbɩ fʋa kpoli fʋ ɩda.

ref: I will sing joyful praises and be filled with excitement like a guest at a banquet.
text: Mɩ ɔkla lagyi atɔ wanklaan mwɛ. Nɔ́wa ansigyi-ɩlʋ kanfʋ fʋ.

ref: I think about you, God, before I go to sleep, and my thoughts turn to you during the night.
text: Nɩ nda ɔklansʋ oo ntɛkaɩn fʋsʋ. Ntɔgywɩɩn fʋ ɩwɩ onye fɛ́ɛ́,

ref: You have helped me, and I sing happy songs in the shadow of your wings.
text: tsufɛ fʋgyi mɩ ɔbʋapʋ. Fʋ abambasɩ olulukpa ntɔwa ansigyi-ɩlʋ.

ref: I stay close to you, and your powerful arm supports me.
text: Mɩ mʋ́ natrʋ kɩta fʋ. Fʋ gyɔpɩ dɛ mɩ kinkiinkin.

ref: All who want to kill me will end up in the ground.
text: Tamɛ aha ánɩ́ bʋdɛ mɩ lowu kle bɔ́yɔ afulitɔ.

ref: Because of you, our God, the king will celebrate with your faithful followers, but liars will be silent.
text: Tamɛ Bulu sʋ owie ansɩ bégyi mʋ. Aha ánɩ́ bʋtɔpʋ Bulu ɩda ka ntam bɔ́pʋ mʋ tsu ɩwɩ, tsufɛ ɔbɛ́kpa afunupʋ ɔnɔ bun.

ref: Listen to my concerns, God, and protect me from my enemies' threats.
text: Oo Bulu, nu mɩ kokoli. Mbʋ ɩkplantɔ. Gyo mɩ ɩwɩ, mɛnɩ mɩ alupʋ bʋmɔ́ɔwa mɩ ifu.

ref: Keep me safe from secret plots of corrupt and evil gangs.
text: Ŋain mɩ, mɛnɩ awuntɔlɩnpʋá batsu agywɩɩn lalahɛ mɩsʋ bʋméenya mɩ.

ref: Their words cut like swords, and their cruel remarks sting like sharp arrows.
text: Baya amʋ́ ɔnɔ klakla fɛ ɔdayi. Bama amʋ́ ɔnɔtɔ asʋn kɩtakɩta fɛ mbɩn.

ref: They fearlessly ambush and shoot innocent people.
text: Bʋteŋain tswɩ ɔha ánɩ́ mʋ asʋn da ɔkpa. Bʋtɔtswɩ amʋ́ mbɩn hwim, bʋtamanya ifu.

ref: They are determined to do evil, and they tell themselves, “Let's set traps! No one can see us.”
text: Bʋdɛ amʋ́ agywɩɩn lalahɛtɔ kinkiinkin. Bʋtɛblɩá bɛ́fɩnɩ agbla ŋaintɔ, bʋtɛfɩtɛ ɩwɩ bɛɛ, “Ma obówun anɩ?”

ref: They make evil plans and say, “We'll commit a perfect crime. No one knows our thoughts.”
text: Bʋtɔbwɛ agywɩɩn lalahɛ blɩ bɛɛ, “Anɩlahɩɛ bwɛ agywɩɩn wanklaan!” Tsufɛ nyankpʋsa klʋntɔ mʋ́a mʋ agywɩɩntɔ bʋ oklu.

ref: But God will shoot his arrows and quickly wound them.
text: Tamɛ Bulu ɔbɔ́tswɩ mbɩn wɔ amʋ́, bépilan ɔtsawʋlɛ pɛ.

ref: They will be destroyed by their own words, and everyone who sees them will tremble with fear.
text: Amʋ́ onuto ɔnɔtɔ asʋn blɩhɛ sʋ bɛ́dɩda. Amʋ́ awunpʋ fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́kpɩnkɩ kpakpakpa.

ref: They will be afraid and say, “Look at what God has done and keep it all in mind.”
text: Anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ bénya ifu. Bɛ́lɛ Bulu gyumagyihɛ blɩ, gywɩɩn mʋ bwɛhɛ ɩwɩ.

ref: May the Lord bless his people with peace and happiness and let them celebrate.
text: Aha yile bénya Nana Bulu ɩwɩ ansigyi, srɩ tanʋ mʋ. Aha ánɩ́ amʋ́ asʋn da ɔkpa fɛ́ɛ́ bʋkanfʋ mʋ.

ref: Our God, you deserve praise in Zion, where we keep our promises to you.
text: Oo Bulu, ɩbʋ alɛá bɛ́kanfʋ fʋ Sion wulutɔ. Bɛ́ka ɩkɔá botsula ha fʋ ɩnʋ.

ref: Everyone will come to you because you answer prayer.
text: Mpaɩ onupʋ, fʋ wa anyankpʋsa fɛ́ɛ́ bɛ́ba.

ref: When our sins get us down, you forgive us.
text: Anɩ lalahɛ legyi anɩsʋ, tamɛ fesikie anɩ.

ref: You bless your chosen ones, and you invite them to live near you in your temple. We will enjoy your house, the sacred temple.
text: Ansɩ igyi ɔha ánɩ́ falɛ, kpɩa mʋ manta ɩwɩ, otsie fʋ wunsɩnɛsʋ. Fʋ woyitɔ, igyi fʋ onuto ɔtswɛkpa ɩnʋ atɔ wanklaan ɩbɔ́mwɛ anɩ.

ref: Our God, you save us, and your fearsome deeds answer our prayers for justice! You give hope to people everywhere on earth, even those across the sea.
text: Oo anɩ nkpa ɔhɔpʋ Bulu, fɔsɔ anɩ ɔnɔ, bwɛ ofula lɛ anɩ. Fʋ ɔkpa ɔyɩtɔ aha bʋdɛkɩ. Amʋ́á bʋbʋ ɔpʋ ɔbɩn kʋraa.

ref: You are strong, and your mighty power put the mountains in place.
text: Fʋ ɔwʋnlɩn fɔpʋha abʋ lɛlɩɩ kinkiinkin, fɔpʋ ɔwʋnlɩn saba.

ref: You silence the roaring waves and the noisy shouts of the nations.
text: Fʋtɛha ɔpʋ mʋ́a atsufuá mʋ́ ɔnɔ bʋ ɔnlɩn pʋ́ ɔmá-ɔmá okitikiti tɔlʋa.

ref: People far away marvel at your fearsome deeds, and all who live under the sun celebrate and sing because of you.
text: Aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ ɔyɩ ɔka fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtenya fʋ osuna ifu. Fʋtɛha aha ánɩ́ bʋbʋ owi ɔdalɩkpa yɛdalɩ owi ɔkplɩwiekpa fɛ́ɛ́ bʋtɔkplʋn ansigyisʋ.

ref: You take care of the earth and send rain to help the soil grow all kinds of crops. Your rivers never run dry, and you prepare the earth to produce abundant grain.
text: Fʋtɛbɛkɩ ɔsʋlʋ, wʋlɩ ntsu mʋ́sʋ, ha mʋ́ ɩtɔwa nfɔ. Fʋtɛha ntsu tɔbʋla fʋ abʋnkpa, ɩtɛha amʋ́ atɔ-abi tɔwa alɛ. Tsufɛ alɩ fɛhɩɛ mʋ́ nɩ.

ref: You water all its fields and level the lumpy ground. You send showers of rain to soften the soil and help the plants sprout.
text: Fʋtɔwʋlɩ ntsu amʋ́ flɛsʋ, ha mʋ́ ɩtɔwɔɩ. Fʋtɛha nyankpʋntsubi tɔwɔɩ mʋ́tɔ aklun. Fʋtoyula amʋ́ atɔ-abi, ɩtɔkɔsɩ dan.

ref: Wherever your footsteps touch the earth, a rich harvest is gathered.
text: Atɔ-abi tsɔtsɔɔtsɔ fʋtɔpʋmɔ ofi ɔnɔ. Fʋ oyula tɔwʋlɩ fʋ ɔtsʋnkpa, ɩnʋ atɔ tɔwa alɛ.

ref: Desert pastures blossom, and mountains celebrate.
text: Mbwɩ ogyikpa ánɩ́ ɩbʋ ɔsʋlʋkpansʋ kʋraa bʋ nfɔ, ansigyi tɛba nkukusʋ.

ref: Meadows are filled with sheep and goats; valleys overflow with grain and echo with joyful songs.
text: Akufa baklɛɩ bʋla amʋ́ atɔ ogyikpa. Atɔ-abi lahɩɛ wa alɛ ntsu ɔtɩakpa. Ansɩ ɩdɛ amʋ́ fɛ́ɛ́ gyi, bʋdɛkplʋn wa ɩlʋ.

ref: Tell everyone on this earth to shout praises to God!
text: Ɔyɩtɔ aha fɛ́ɛ́, mlɩtswɩ ope kanfʋ Bulu.

ref: Sing about his glorious name. Honor him with praises.
text: Mlɩwa ɩlʋ wa mʋ ɩda numnyam. Mlɩkanfʋ mʋ numnyam.

ref: Say to God, “Everything you do is fearsome, and your mighty power makes your enemies come crawling.
